You can find and use over **70 different weapons, masks, and items**. Personalize your **"Faceless" character** with more than **40 unique skills** to create diverse playstyles. The **"Nightmare" environment constantly changes**, featuring multiple areas and over **50 bosses and enemies**, each with **complex attack patterns** to learn.

Designed for **easy access**, "Living the Nightmare" uses **simple, mouse-only controls**, allowing you to concentrate on **challenging battles and survival**. Even picking up items is automatic for a **smooth experience**. A short tutorial introduces the basics before you're thrown into the fray. The game follows the **"easy to learn, hard to master"** principle, with a retro guide available for those who want to **fully grasp its intricate systems**.

Name: Dungeon Limbus
Description:
A mysterious blacksmith and a young woman who manages the village of resurrection at the border between death and life. Head deep into the dungeon in search of lost memories. Repeated death will make you stronger. Dungeon Limbus is a turn-based Roguelike, and has the following six features. 1. Easy play with turn-based control in tile maps. 2. Character growth through drawing equipment and making weapons. 3. The use of colleagues, magic, and cooking through the construction of card deck in a village. 4. Random maps of various themes give different fun each time. 5. Strategic battle with the patterned giant boss. 6. Various collection elements and multi endings to enjoy for a long time.

Name: 中国象棋-残局大师
Description:
'中国象棋-残局' is a single leisure chess game. This game mainly focuses on the classic remnant game of Chinese chess, currently provides 60 levels, followed by nearly 460 levels. In the final game, the principle is 'red first, red must win'. If you go the right way. The red side will surely win. If you miss a step, you will lose everything.

**Embark on a Hilarious Dungeon Crawl in C:\raft!**

Prepare for an **unconventional adventure** where you're not the hero, but a **slave to the Crafting Goddess Joann**! This isn't your typical fantasy tale; you've been **chosen by a trans-dimensional entity** for a peculiar purpose: to craft items for her. Your mission? To delve into the **digital dungeons** of your own hard drive and create the items Joann demands.

**What Makes C:\raft Unique?**

*   **Dungeons Born from Your Files:** Forget pre-designed levels! C:\raft **randomly generates dungeons** based on the files you select.
    *   **Larger files** translate to **larger, more complex dungeons**.
    *   **Different file types** determine the **variety of loot** you'll discover.
*   **Randomly Generated Everything:**
    *   **Items, craftables, and monsters** all boast **unique, randomly generated names** with quirky adjectives.
    *   Even the **crafting requirements are randomized**, keeping you on your toes!
*   **Engaging Gameplay Features:**
    *   **Randomly generated dungeons** based on your personal files.
    *   **Randomly generated items** for endless discovery.
    *   **Epic BOSS FIGHTS** await your crafting prowess.
    *   Experience **unpredictable playtime** – you never know how long a session will last!
    *   Enjoy the freedom of **playing with one hand**, perhaps with a beverage in the other.
    *   Discover **multiple paths to achieve your goals**.
    *   Appreciate the **charming hand-drawn pixel art**, crafted with dedication.

**A Word from the Developer:**

C:\raft is a **text-heavy, no-holds-barred experience** designed by a fan of classic roguelikes for fellow enthusiasts. The game explains its mechanics through **dialogue, tooltips, and in-game manuals**. Players are encouraged to consult these resources to **master complex mechanics** and unlock new gameplay elements. While **accessible and expansive**, it may present a steeper learning curve for those new to the roguelike genre.

Dive in and within minutes, you'll be **collecting loot, exploring your hard drive's depths, and, of course, dying** – a hallmark of the genre! C:\raft offers **minimal story but abundant replayability**, with its crafting system acting as a glorified fetch quest. There's **plenty to keep you engaged**, and its design emphasizes **quick play sessions**, perfect for a coffee break.

Portal 2 builds on the success of its award-winning predecessor, offering an expanded and enhanced experience for fans of innovative puzzle gameplay, compelling stories, and memorable music. The original game, celebrated for its unique mechanics and captivating narrative, earned over 70 industry awards and cultivated a devoted following.

The **single-player campaign** in Portal 2 introduces a **vibrant new cast of characters** and **novel puzzle mechanics**. Players will explore **uncharted areas** within Aperture Science Labs and encounter the **famously unpredictable AI, GLaDOS**, once again. As one critic observed, "GLaDOS remains a captivating, if slightly terrifying, presence." The game features a **considerably larger array of challenging test chambers**, pushing the boundaries of the original's inventive physics engine.

Portal 2 also introduces a **robust two-player cooperative mode**. This mode boasts its own **distinct campaign, unique story, specialized test chambers**, and **two new playable characters**. The developers emphasize that this cooperative element requires players to "think cooperatively, not just act cooperatively," demanding a **fresh approach to problem-solving**.

Key features of Portal 2 include:

*   **Extensive Single Player:** Experience next-generation gameplay with a deeply engaging story.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** Dive into a multiplayer mode with its own dedicated narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics:** The game's physics engine allows for a wide spectrum of inventive challenges, creating a larger, yet still accessible, game.
*   **Original Music:** Enjoy a soundtrack composed specifically for the game.
*   **Massive Sequel:** The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Editing Tools:** Portal 2 includes comprehensive tools for players to create their own content.

**Portal**, a unique single-player game from Valve, immerses players in the mysterious **Aperture Science Laboratories**. This game fundamentally alters how you interact with and perceive your environment. Much like the **Gravity Gun in Half-Life 2** revolutionized object manipulation, **Portal** demands a fresh perspective and inventive problem-solving.

Within Aperture Science, you will encounter numerous intricate, physics-based challenges. Your primary tool is the **portal gun**. This ingenious device enables the creation of two linked portals, facilitating **rapid transit** between any two locations in the game. It also allows for the movement of both yourself and objects. This core mechanic encourages players to discover novel approaches to navigating each space, resulting in a **fresh and captivating gameplay experience**.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

**Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time - A Classic Action-Adventure**

Step into the **rich and dangerous** world of ancient Persia with *Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time*. This **highly praised** action-adventure game tells a story of **betrayal and deception**.

Here's what happens:

*   A young Prince is **tempted by a mystical dagger**.
*   This action unleashes a **terrible evil** upon his homeland.
*   With the help of a **clever princess** and the **powerful Sands of Time**, the Prince must journey through the **cursed Palace**.
*   His goal is to bring peace back to his **devastated kingdom**.

Developed by Ubisoft's Montreal Studio, *The Sands of Time* is celebrated for its **innovative design** and is considered a **major advancement** in action-adventure gaming. It set **new industry benchmarks** with its creative use of physics, lighting, graphics, and animation.

Players control the Prince, who possesses:

*   **Exceptional acrobatic abilities**.
*   **Strong combat skills**.
*   The **unique power to control time**.

This time-manipulation ability allows players to:

*   **Rewind past mistakes**.
*   **See glimpses of the future**.
*   **Freeze the present moment**.

This **revolutionary gameplay feature** opens up **many strategic options**.

The game immerses you in the **vast and exotic lands** of medieval Persia, a setting rich in legend and danger that was **largely untouched** in the genre before. This **grand tale** of betrayal and eventual victory brings to life the **epic myths and terrifying creatures** of ancient Persia. The **exciting story**, with more twists than the Palace's **winding halls**, offers an **unforgettable experience**. As critics have stated, the Prince is an **"exceptional hero"** who returns to the genre with **remarkable achievements** and the **ability to change his fate**.

**It Takes Two** is an unforgettable cooperative adventure built exclusively for two players. This game offers a unique experience where you and a friend can tackle a wide range of inventive gameplay challenges together, and you can even invite a friend to join for free using the Friend's Pass.

You step into the roles of Cody and May, a couple who have been magically transformed into dolls. Trapped in a whimsical world, they must reluctantly work together to mend their strained relationship.

Here's what makes **It Takes Two** stand out:

*   **Designed for Two:** This thrilling adventure is **pure co-op perfection**, playable either locally with split-screen or online. You'll face constantly changing challenges where **teamwork is absolutely crucial for success**.
*   **Endlessly Inventive Gameplay:** Prepare for a wild ride! The game features **genre-bending challenges and new character abilities** that you'll need to master in each level. From battling rogue vacuum cleaners to charming love gurus, you'll never know what's coming next. This innovative approach blends gameplay and story, redefining interactive storytelling. As game director Josef Fares stated, "We wanted to create something that was truly unique and pushed the boundaries of what co-op games could be."
*   **A Heartfelt Story:** Discover a touching narrative about the complexities of relationships. Help Cody and May overcome their differences as you encounter a diverse cast of strange and memorable characters.

In **It Takes Two**, you'll master unique and interconnected character abilities in every new level. You'll help each other overcome numerous unexpected obstacles and share hilarious moments. The game throws you into a variety of scenarios, such as battling gangster squirrels, piloting a pair of underpants, DJing a lively nightclub, and bobsledding through a magical snow globe. Experience a heartfelt and funny story where the narrative and gameplay weave together into a uniquely metaphorical journey.

Developed by the award-winning studio Hazelight, a pioneer in cooperative play, **It Takes Two** offers a wild and wonderful ride. As the developers emphasize, "**We're better together**."

Hazelight is an acclaimed independent game development studio based in Stockholm, Sweden. Founded in 2014 by Josef Fares, a film director and creator of the celebrated game *Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons*, Hazelight is committed to expanding the creative horizons of interactive entertainment. In 2018, Hazelight released the BAFTA award-winning *A Way Out*, the first-ever co-op only, third-person action-adventure, as part of the EA Originals program. EA Originals supports passionate, independent, and talented game studios globally, offering innovative and unforgettable gaming experiences.

Name: Psychonauts 2
Description:
Razputin “Raz” Aquato, trained acrobat and powerful young psychic, has realized his lifelong dream of joining the international psychic espionage organization known as the Psychonauts! But these psychic super spies are in trouble. Their leader hasn't been the same since he was rescued from a kidnapping, and what's worse, there's a mole hiding in headquarters. Combining quirky missions and mysterious conspiracies, Psychonauts 2 is a platform-adventure game with cinematic style and tons of customizable psychic powers. Psychonauts 2 serves up danger, excitement and laughs in equal measure as players guide Raz on a journey through the minds of friends and foes on a quest to defeat a murderous psychic villain. Experience an imaginative, cinematic story that mixes humor and intrigue, brought to you by legendary game designer Tim Schafer (Grim Fandango, Brütal Legend, Broken Age). Explore unique environments using Raz’s ability to dive into people’s brains to battle their inner demons, unlock hidden memories, and resolve their emotional baggage. Leap acrobatically through the air, traversing tightropes and trapezes in a varied, challenging, and joyful platforming experience. Wield a powerful array of psychic powers to blast, burn and levitate things, or even slow down time itself to solve environmental puzzles and battle strange enemies.

Name: Psychonauts
Description:
A Psychic Odyssey Through the Minds of Misfits, Monsters, and Madmen. This classic action/adventure platformer from acclaimed developers Double Fine Productions follows the story of a young psychic named Razputin. In his quest to join the Psychonauts--an elite group of international psychic secret agents--he breaks into their secret training facility: Whispering Rock Psychic Summer Camp. But this is no average psychic summer camp! A mysterious villain has kidnapped Raz’s fellow campers and stolen their brains. Now he must use his psychic powers of Telekinesis, Levitation, and most of all his ability to project himself into the minds of others--to find the loose noodles and keep them from falling into the wrong hands. Fight mental demons! Uncover hidden memories! Sort emotional baggage! Explore the fantastic realm of the inner mind! Join the Psychonauts!

**OlliOlli World: Skate Through a Vibrant Utopia**

Dive into **OlliOlli World**, a stunning skateboarding action-platformer set in the unique and **vibrant world of Radlandia**. This game captures the thrill of skateboarding, inviting players to **"flip and flow through Radlandia."** Your adventure introduces you to **"colorful characters"** as you seek the **"mystical skate gods"** and aim to reach Gnarvana.

**Explore, Express, and Compete**

**OlliOlli World** encourages exploration and player freedom. Journey through a **"delightful and weird world,"** completing missions and challenges while forming new friendships. The game offers **extensive customization**, letting you personalize your character's look, tricks, and style. Its explorable levels feature **multiple paths**, providing **"opportunities for player expression."**

For competitive players, **OlliOlli World** includes global Leagues to test your skills. You can also challenge friends to beat your high scores on **"millions of sharable levels."** The game is praised for its **"accessibility, depth, and player freedom,"** all tied to its signature **"flow state gameplay."**

**A Masterpiece from Roll7**

This is the third game in the acclaimed OlliOlli series, developed by **Roll7**, a BAFTA-winning studio. The setting is a **"lush skateboarding utopia,"** filled with **"eccentric characters and vibrant locations."** Discover new routes, side quests, and trick opportunities in areas like Inflatable Alley and Los Vulgas. The experience is enhanced by a soundtrack of **"IDM and Electronica tracks."**

Roll7 highlights the game's refined mechanics, stating **"super tight controls combine with highly refined gameplay for a silky smooth ride."** **OlliOlli World** is designed to be **welcoming to newcomers**. Developers assure, **"Not a Pro? Don’t worry – OlliOlli World welcomes you, allowing new players to tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting."**

**Depth for Dedicated Skaters**

Experienced players will find significant depth. Master the game through the sandbox mode's **"millions of unique levels"** or compete globally in Leagues. The game features a **"hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine"** for high scores. Unlock special rewards for further character customization, from looks to tricks. Developers emphasize the game's **inclusive nature**, proclaiming, **"Want to skate in your flip flops… go for it. Want to wear a bumble bee onesie …ok then… no judgement. In OlliOlli World as long as you’re on board anything goes!"**

**Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones™: A Darker Journey Awaits**

*Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones™* plunges players back into the war-torn homeland of Babylon. The Prince returns with Kaileena, the Empress of Time, only to find his kingdom in chaos. In a desperate act, Kaileena sacrifices herself, unleashing the Sands of Time to save him.

Now a fugitive, the Prince is haunted by his past and a **deadly Dark Prince**, a manifestation of his inner turmoil, begins to possess him. This **duality** allows players to "wield the powers and weapons of two master warriors with different combat styles, attitudes, and histories," as explained by Ubisoft.

The game emphasizes player choice in combat, allowing you to **master the expanded Free-Form Fighting system** to destroy enemies in your own style. New stealth tactics are introduced, such as surprise decapitations or the "deadly Daggertail" for ranged strangulation. Players will **battle freely through Babylon**, navigating perilous rooftops, chaotic streets, and dark underground passageways. The narrative promises "unparalleled depth in storytelling," immersing players in a "twisting tale filled with adrenaline, tension and discovery."

Time manipulation remains a core mechanic. Players can **execute powerful attacks** by slowing down or rewinding time, or employ **all-new Sands of Time powers** for surprise attacks. *The Two Thrones™* delivers a "masterful blend of gameplay," combining action combat, agility challenges, and story-driven puzzles, true to the acclaimed Prince of Persia franchise.

**Death's Door: A Grim Reaper's Quest for a Stolen Soul**

In the **grim and often monotonous world of the Crows**, the task of reaping souls is a daily grind. However, for one particular Crow, this routine is **shattered when an assigned soul is stolen**. This theft propels the Crow on a desperate chase into a realm where death holds no sway. Here, creatures defy their natural lifespans, becoming saturated with **insatiable greed and formidable power**.

**Engage in Talon-Sharp Combat:**
Master a **dynamic combat system** that blends melee weapons, arrows, and magic. You'll face a fantastical array of beasts and demigods, where **every mistake carries a consequence**, and victory is hard-earned. To gain an advantage, players can **customize their character's stats** and master a variety of abilities and upgrades.

**Explore a Beautifully Bleak World:**
Venture beyond the enigmatic Doors and discover a land teeming with **twisted inhabitants and hidden secrets**. As you navigate this strange landscape, you'll bring a glimmer of hope to the peculiar and wonderful characters you encounter.

**Unravel a Dark Mystery:**
Embark on a quest to track down and defeat **colossal tyrants**, each with their own compelling stories and motivations. This somber yet darkly comedic tale invites players to uncover the profound truths behind the flow of souls, the vital role of the Crows, and the very origin of the Doors. This narrative journey is further enriched by insights from game developers at Acid Nerve, who have emphasized the game's focus on **challenging gameplay and atmospheric storytelling**. According to a preview by IGN, the game's art direction contributes significantly to its unique, melancholic charm.

**The Ramp: Pure Vert Skateboarding Thrills**

For those seeking an authentic vert skateboarding experience, **The Ramp** delivers an unadulterated thrill. While keyboard input is supported, the game is best enjoyed with a controller, according to the developer. This digital toy is crafted for players who crave pure flow and the exhilarating sensation of shredding a halfpipe, intentionally stripped of unnecessary complexities.

**The Ramp** focuses on delivering satisfying and unique skateboarding gameplay that emphasizes smooth, continuous movement. It's designed to be accessible for newcomers yet challenging to master, offering a rewarding progression. Unlike many games, **The Ramp** features no unlockable content, no scorekeeping, no missions, and no external objectives. The developer's intention was to capture the unparalleled feeling of real-life vert skateboarding, presenting it as a focused experience akin to a digital toy. This deliberate omission of extraneous elements, such as guns or explosions, allows players to immerse themselves in those crucial moments of flow that can elevate an ordinary day. The developer encourages feedback and welcomes positive experiences from players.

**When Ski Lifts Go Wrong: A Thrilling Engineering Challenge**

Embark on an exciting journey in **When Ski Lifts Go Wrong**, a game that tests your engineering prowess from gentle foothills to treacherous mountain peaks. Your mission is to design and build safe and efficient ski lift systems, ensuring every passenger reaches their destination. Prepare for **realistic physics** that can lead to hilarious disasters!

**Build and Conquer Diverse Challenges**

Construct a variety of facilities, including chairlifts, gondolas, jumps, bridges, and ramps. As you progress through over **100 challenging levels**, you'll build increasingly complex structures. **Manage your materials wisely**; cutting corners might save money, but it could lead to comical passenger mishaps!

**Master Original Physics Puzzles**

Step into the role of a mountain resort engineer and **master rope physics**. Understand the stresses and strains on different structures you build. Seamlessly switch between **Build Mode and Simulation Mode** to refine your designs.

**Experience Extreme Sports**

After construction, the fun continues with a range of extreme sports! From winter to summer, enjoy snowboarding, skiing, motorbiking, and more. **Take direct control of your riders**, feel the mountain air, and give them that extra push to reach their destination and claim the top spot on the leaderboards.

**Climb the Ranks**

Keep a close eye on your **budget** and complete bonus objectives to ascend the **online leaderboards**. Collect all the trophies and tackle puzzles ranging from easy green to challenging black difficulty.

**Unleash Your Creativity in Sandbox Mode**

Once you've mastered the game's slopes, dive into the **Sandbox Builder Mode**. This intuitive level editor allows you to create your own challenges, limited only by your imagination.

**Engage with the Community**

Test your engineering skills against creations from players worldwide via the **Steam Workshop**. Share your proudest moments or most spectacular failures with the community using the built-in **GIF and MP4 exporter**, making it easy to share your replays and creations online.

Name: Steep™
Description:
Ride a massive open world across the Alps, where the powder is always fresh and the run never ends. Tame the wilderness on the American continent in the Alaska free update, a new region filled with challenges. The mountain is yours to explore. So strap in, suit up, and drop in. - RIDE YOUR WAY -Conquer the world's most epic mountains on skis, wingsuits, snowboards, and paragliders. - LIVE UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS WITH OTHERS -Ride solo or drop in next to other players to share thrilling, adrenaline-fueled rides. - THE MOUNTAIN IS YOURS TO EXPLORE -Create your own path through a massive open-world, and share your best custom lines with friends. - PUT YOUR SKILLS TO THE TEST -Prove that you're king of the mountain in unique and spectacular challenges. - SHARE EVERYTHING -Capture your most insane stunts and share via social media. A permanent internet connection is required in order to play the game. - SET YOUR SIGHTS ON THE ALPS Rip through the terrains of a snowy open world. Strap in and suit up for some epic stunts as you ride your way to the peak of the excitement. Experience 360° of visual freedom while you explore the Alps. Let your gaze immerse you in the massive winter playground. Situational awareness has never been more fluid with the integrated Tobii Eye Tracking feature set. Using your gaze to shred the hills enhances your gameplay and lets you embark on the ride of your life. Compatible with all Tobii Eye Tracking gaming devices. ---- Additional notes: Eye tracking features available with Tobii Eye Tracking.

Name: Endless Ski
Description:
Rediscover the 90s classic Ski Free, re-imagined in Unreal Engine The player controls a skier on a mountain slope, avoiding obstacles, performing stunts, and avoiding that Yeti! Features Exciting snow landscape adventure Perfect game for all ages! Dodge the dog. Dodge the snowboarder. But most importantly dodge that Yeti! Ski through flags to gain the points The longer you ski, the greater the score! Fun atmospheric music to listen to Special Effects! (In the Menu's)

Name: K-Point Ski Jumping
Description:
Become professional Ski Jumper ! Starting in Junior Cup, you will cllimb the ladder to become next Wolrd Cup winner ! Compete on 34 real world based ski jumping hills located all around the world. Take part in famous tournements like 4 Hills, Raw Sky, Winter Olympics, World Cup, Summer Grand Prix or Ski Flying. Earn money and buy your dream car or dream house, hire coach. Keep track of your morale. Better you do in competitions, your morale will grow higher. Choose on of 4 Ski Jumping styles , including old school one ! Be the best in the world and try to beat online world records!

Name: Snowtopia: Ski Resort Builder
Description:
Welcome to Snowtopia, a world of endless winter fun. Build the ideal ski resort to keep your skiers smiling all the way down the mountain. Get to know every cliff and crevice as you plan pistes, place lifts and build essential facilities. Take on the challenge to create a resort where life is always good! Plan your pistes Place pistes on the mountainside in just a few clicks with the easy-to-use creation tool. Read the terrain, and choose the best spot to lay down trails for every skier ability. 11 different types of ski lift give you plenty of choice for scaling the heights. 12-person gondola lifts are fast, but tricky to build on the steep mountain slopes. A two-person chairlift might be a better choice, but watch out for queues at the bottom! Luckily, ever-advancing ski lift technology means there are always new options to try. The latest models can make even the highest peaks accessible in no time. Plan, build and improve until you’ve created your dream ski area. Welcome skiers of every kind You might have thought perfect pistes were enough to keep skiers happy, but it’s not so simple. With 12 different skier profiles in the game, some are more interested in a good raclette, while others come to commune with nature. And then there are the hardcore ski fanatics, who won’t settle for anything less than the longest run the mountain has to offer. There’s no money in Snowtopia. Make your skiers happy enough and they might join the team of volunteers running the resort. Divide your workforce between the lift operators, maintenance crew, service facilities, and resort improvement team. Growing the reputation of your resort leads to more skiers on the slopes. But beware - more skiers means more accidents! Make sure you have enough snow groomers and ski patrols to keep the slopes safe at all times. Remember, no one likes a broken chairlift, but everyone loves sunbathing on the terrace! Sit back and chill on the mountain Once your resort is built and your skiers are happy, you deserve a little break. So find yourself a perfect little corner on the mountain to drink it all in, maybe near a pretty forest piste next to a ski lift perched on a picturesque clifftop. You’re in the mountains. Enjoy the frosty kiss of the cold air on your face and kick back to some cool tunes. Welcome to Snowtopia, the game where it’s good to just chill.

**Gustav Vasa: A King's Perilous Journey Through the Dales**

In 1522, young nobleman Gustav Eriksson Vasa faced a dire threat. His father had been murdered in the Stockholm Bloodbath, and King Kristian of Denmark was hunting him. To survive, Gustav fled into the rugged Swedish Dales, a region that would shape his destiny.

This game puts players in Gustav's skis, beginning with his desperate flight. Danish soldiers relentlessly pursue Gustav through the snow-covered Dales. He travels from village to village, seeking help from the locals. The game features thrilling 3D chase sequences where players must use the environment to evade the accurate arrows of the Danish soldiers.

Between the chases, players experience engaging 2D sidescrolling adventure segments. These parts tell the story of Gustav Vasa, a Swedish nobleman destined for the throne. The narrative mixes historical facts with legends about this important figure. Players will witness key moments, like Gustav's passionate speech in Falun that rallied the Dalesfolk, and his eventual coronation in Stockholm.

The game boasts a distinct and captivating visual style. Beautifully hand-painted environments and characters are inspired by classic Swedish art from the Dales region. This unique look creates an immersive and memorable experience.

Developed by Ingeborg Asplund, Stanislav Hallberg, Natali Hallberg, Joakim Bengtsson, and Gertrud Bondesson, this game blends action and story, letting players live the early adventures of a future king.

**Let's Go! Skiing VR** offers an engaging virtual reality sports experience for all ages. This game is an excellent choice for parties, encouraging children to get active. Players will **feel the excitement of competitive skiing** as they speed down slopes, collect coins, and skillfully navigate around obstacles.

A standout feature is the **local leaderboard**, fostering friendly competition and tracking top scores among friends. The game also presents a **"dangerous track"** packed with challenges, including the thrilling threat of avalanches. As the game's description highlights, "Let's go! Skiing features cartoon-style graphics, making it perfect for kids!"

The game's controls are **remarkably simple**. Developers explain, "In the game, you use the controllers like ski poles and steer with your head. It couldn't be simpler!" This **intuitive design** allows players to quickly dive into the virtual skiing fun and enjoy the experience immediately.

**Just Ski+** offers a **unique and demanding physics-driven skiing experience**. This minimalist game is designed to **initially challenge and even frustrate players**, but ultimately provides a profound sense of **accomplishment and mastery** upon successful navigation.

The **innovative control scheme** for Just Ski+ is inspired by the mechanics of the defunct title, Ski Stunt Simulator. Players exert control over the skier solely through mouse movements: **moving the mouse downwards initiates a crouch**, while **moving it upwards causes the skier to extend**. While this mechanic is **straightforward to grasp conceptually**, achieving proficiency necessitates **considerable practice and dedication**.

A **critical element for success** in Just Ski+ lies in mastering aerial rotation. The game elegantly simulates the principle of **conservation of angular momentum**. By **crouching, players can accelerate their spin**, whereas **extending the skier's body will decelerate it**. The ultimate objective is to **skillfully ski to the designated cabin**.

The **learning curve** of Just Ski+ can be likened to learning to ride a bicycle. Initially, the gameplay may feel **awkward and seemingly insurmountable**. However, as players develop their skills and **internalize the game's physics**, the experience transforms into one of **fluidity and deep satisfaction**. The **balanced challenge** ensures that the game remains **consistently engaging and rewarding**.

We hope you enjoy playing Just Ski+! Thank you for your participation.

Name: Ski Park Tycoon
Description:
Gameplay mechanics The core gameplay mechanics of Ski Park Tycoon lie in ski lift and slope construction. Before building a park, the player needs to study the mountain topography and terrain. Therefore, it was imperative to allow the player complete freedom of camera movement. Building lifts and slopes is as easy as drawing lines on the ground. Skiers coming to the resort want to enjoy their stay so - apart from lifts and slopes - the player also needs to provide other infrastructure such as restaurants, ski patrols, snow cannons etc. This is where the economic simulation aspect of the game comes into play. You can learn more about the game in the online tutorial ( ). Game features classic tycoon gameplay full 3D environment explore your park in third person view hundreds of skiers in one resort 7 types of lifts 12 types of buildings campaign with 29 missions of various objectives sandbox and unlimited game modes real world ski resorts

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Master WWII Strategy**

The **Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition** offers a direct path to the celebrated World War II real-time strategy experience. Purchasing this edition also provides access to the latest version, simply named 'Company of Heroes,' on Steam. For online multiplayer, **ensure you are using the updated 'Company of Heroes' version.** The vibrant **COH1 Steam Community** and its rich **Modding scene** are also available to enhance your gameplay.

**Immerse Yourself in WWII Battles**

Company of Heroes revolutionized real-time strategy with its **powerful depiction of World War II**. The game vividly portrays the sacrifices of soldiers, the destruction of war-torn landscapes, and the ever-changing nature of battlefield combat. Your campaign starts with the D-Day invasion of Normandy, where you will command Allied forces against the German military. Advance through a gripping single-player story that places you in pivotal WWII battles, showcasing **intense action and the courage of soldiers**.

**Core Gameplay Elements:**

*   **Compelling Single-Player Campaign:** Feel the strategic depth and emotional weight of World War II.
*   **Smart Squad AI:** Troops react realistically, finding cover and employing tactics to gain an advantage.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Relic's advanced engine delivers **impressive graphical detail** and a physics-driven world.
*   **Adaptive Environmental Combat:** Real-time physics and a **completely destructible environment** create unique battles. You can **destroy most objects**, reshaping the battlefield. Utilize structures and terrain for cover or to block opponents.
*   **Exciting Multiplayer:** Compete in **2-8 player matches** through LAN or online. Form alliances for intense Axis versus Allied confrontations.

Name: Company of Heroes
Description:
DISCLAIMER FOR ADDITIONAL USER REVIEWS , please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page. DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

**Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare: Redefining the Modern Combat Experience**

**Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare** didn't just enter the action game genre; it **revolutionized** it. Developed by Infinity Ward, this title **masterfully depicted modern warfare** with **unprecedented realism and thrilling intensity**. Players are thrust into a **perilous global crisis**, assuming the roles of both a **hardened U.S. Marine** and a **highly skilled British S.A.S. operative**. This dual perspective offers **unique insights into diverse conflict zones**. The narrative is packed with **unexpected twists and turns**, demanding players utilize **cutting-edge weaponry, advanced technology, and strategic planning**. Success hinges on **lightning-fast reflexes, pinpoint accuracy, and seamless teamwork**.

The arsenal available is **truly impressive**, featuring over **70 authentic firearms**. Players can wield assault rifles equipped with **laser sights**, devastating sniper rifles, and the formidable M-249 SAW. For covert operations, **night-vision goggles and ghillie suits** provide a crucial edge. The combat sequences are **remarkably lifelike**, enhanced by **dynamic air support, dramatic helicopter insertions, and intense attack helicopter engagements**. Visually, the game boasts **state-of-the-art graphics**, **believable physics**, and **immersive sound design** that transports you directly to the **heart of the battlefield**. Beyond its compelling single-player campaign, **Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare** features a **hugely popular online multiplayer mode**. The innovative "create-a-class" system allows for **deep character customization**. Players earn points to **unlock a vast array of new weapons and potent skills**. **Robust matchmaking and competitive leaderboards** elevate the online experience, fostering a **vibrant and dedicated player community**.

**Call of Duty®: Relive World War II Through the Eyes of Soldiers**

Experience the intense and realistic world of World War II with **Call of Duty®**. This game places you in the boots of ordinary soldiers from various Allied nations, showcasing how their **bravery and teamwork** were essential in shaping history. You'll join a squad and face the **chaos of war**, providing cover fire, rescuing teammates, and witnessing how each soldier's unique skills and personality emerge under pressure. Remember, victory in this war was a **collective effort**, not the achievement of a single individual or nation.

For the first time, Call of Duty® allows you to see the war through the eyes of **American, British, and Russian soldiers**. Explore 24 missions across 4 interconnected historical campaigns. These missions involve daring sabotage, all-out assaults, stealth operations, vehicle combat, and crucial rescue missions. The game features **authentic World War II elements**, including accurate weaponry, historically accurate locations, period vehicles, and immersive sound design, all designed to deliver the most realistic experience possible.

© 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

**Silent Hunter® III: The Definitive WWII Submarine Simulation**

Silent Hunter® III stands as the ultimate WWII submarine simulation, offering an unparalleled level of realism and authentic naval action. Developed by Ubisoft, this installment features an all-new 3D engine, enhanced crew command, and captivating gameplay that appeals to both hardcore simulation fans and newcomers. The game meticulously recreates the suspenseful atmosphere of underwater warfare with realistic 3D water, dynamic day/night cycles, and historically accurate submarines, ships, and aircraft. Ubisoft highlights the detailed U-boat interiors, evolving weather, and immersive audio design as key elements contributing to the definitive WWII submarine experience. Players can command a variety of U-boats, including the Type II, VII, IX, and XXI, engaging Allied convoys and warships through stealthy torpedo attacks or direct surface engagements.

The game's dynamic campaign allows players to craft their own WWII naval narratives, with career progression influenced by strategic command decisions in an unscripted, non-linear environment. Silent Hunter® III is designed for accessibility, featuring a helpful naval academy tutorial and customizable realism settings to suit a broad range of players. Crew members respond to orders and develop based on patrol outcomes, adding another layer of depth. For a collaborative experience, Silent Hunter® III supports cooperative multiplayer for up to eight players over LAN.

Name: Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition
Description:
Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: EMPIRE, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release: Take on the Warpath Campaign and lead one of 5 new Native American factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Build up your armies with the Elite Units of the East, Elite Units of the West, Elite Units of America and the Special Forces Units & Bonus Content packs, which together add over 50 elite new units. Total War: EMPIRE Definitive Edition offers hundreds and hundreds of hours of absorbing gameplay and every bit of content made for the game. See below for full details. About Total War: EMPIRE Control the land, command the seas, forge a new nation, and conquer the globe. Total War: EMPIRE takes the Total War franchise to the eighteenth century Age of Enlightenment a time of political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought, captured in stunning detail. Total War: EMPIRE introduces a host of revolutionary new features, including true 3D naval combat. For the first time in the Total War series, you will be able to intuitively command single ships or vast fleets upon seascapes rich with extraordinary water and weather effects that play a huge role in your eventual glorious success or ignominious defeat. After pummelling your enemy with cannon fire, close in to grapple their ship and prepare to board, taking control of your men as they fight hand-to-hand on the decks of these wooden behemoths. In addition, Total War: EMPIRE will see further enhancements to the Total War series’ signature 3D battles and turn-based campaign map. Real-time battles will pose new challenges with the addition of cannon and musket, challenging players to master new formations and tactics as a result of the increasing role of gunpowder within warfare. And the Campaign Map, the heart of Total War introduces a variety of new and upgraded elements, including new systems for Trade, Diplomacy and Espionage with agents; a refined and streamlined UI; improved Advisors; and a vastly extended scope, taking in the riches of India, the turbulence of Europe and, for the first time, the untapped potential of the United States of America. About The Warpath Campaign A new detailed North American Campaign Map expands the Total War: EMPIRE experience, with 5 brand new Native American factions, new units and technologies. Experience battles in the new Warpath Campaign and lead one of the 5 new factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Or take these units and their unique strengths into multiplayer battles. • 5 New Playable Factions including the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo and Cherokee nations. • Expanded North American Territories - A new, more detailed North American Campaign Map featuring new regions and a new start date. • New Elite Units including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors and many more. • Two New Agent Types - Infiltrate enemy territory with the new Shaman unit and sabotage the opposition with the cunning Scout. • 18 New Tribal Technologies including Spirit Medicine, the Call of the Wild and Dreamwalking creating a brand new tribal technology tree. • New Winning Objectives for each of the playable factions. About Elite Units of the East The Elite Units of the East adds 12 new elite units to the Maratha and Ottoman factions and expands the map further East than any previous Total War game. Most of these soldiers' expertise developed on the battlefield - some are fearsome brigands, others of them are drawn from a strong academic background, learned warriors. They will provide a vast array of tactical options: intimidating and cowing your enemies. • Haydut Irregulars (Ottoman Empire) • Wallachian Boyars (Ottoman Empire) • Bosnian Panduks (Ottoman Empire) • Circassian Armoured Cavalry (Ottoman Empire) • Armenian Archers (Ottoman Empire) • Libyan Kuloglu (Ottoman Empire) • Palestinian Auxiliaries (Ottoman Empire) • Cairo Janissaries (Ottoman Empire) • Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit (Ottoman Empire) • Rajput Zamindars (Maratha) • Poligars (Maratha) • Barawardi (Maratha) About Elite Units of the West The Elite Units of the West introduces 14 completely unique units from all the major Western factions. Featuring all new infantry and cavalry units, equipped with the best weapons and having undergone the most rigorous of training, the Elite Units of the West bring even more options on the battlefield to all tacticians seeking to defeat their enemies. • Hungarian Grenadiers (Austria) • Horse Guards (Britain) • Swiss Guards (France) • Blue Guards (United Provinces) • Gardes du Corps (United Provinces) • Guard Grenadiers (Poland-Lithuania) • 2nd Hussars (Prussia) • Bosniaks (Prussia) • Frei-Korps (Prussia) • Gardes à cheval (Russia) • Siemenovski Foot Guards (Russia) • Walloon Guards (Spain) • Legion of the United States (United States) • US Marines (United States) About Elite Units of America The Elite Units of America adds 15 new elite units to the American, British and French factions of Total War: EMPIRE. In the last half of the 18th century, the political upheaval from thirteen of British Colonies in North America ultimately led to the 1776 Declaration of Independence and changed History forever. The 15 units have all played a major part in the American Revolution. Though their background owes a lot to European military traditions, their identity is tied to the destiny of the United States and gave these men courage and audacity like no other soldier on the battlefield. • 1st Delaware (United States) • 1st Maryland (United States) • 2nd Continental Light Dragoons (United States) • 2nd New York (United States) • 33rd Foot (Britain) • Brunswick Dragoons (Britain) • Hessian Grenadiers (Britain) • King’s Royal Regiment of New York (Britain) • Lee’s Legion (United States) • Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp (United States) • Pulaski’s Legion (United States) • Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment (France) • Royal Welch Fusiliers (Britain) • Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers (Britain) • Tarleton’s Light Dragoons (Britain) About Special Forces Units & Bonus Content The Special Forces Units introduces six of the most influential military forces of the 18th Century. True to the period, these exclusive elite units become available on the campaign map via a certain faction or once a specific geographical region is under control. This pack also includes three more exclusive Elite Units. • HMS Victory • Rogers' Rangers • Ottoman Organ Gun • Ghoorkas • Corso Terrestre Guerillas • Bulkeley's Regiment • Death's Head Hussars • The USS Constitution • The Dahomey Amazons

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: A Complete Strategy Experience**

Dive into **Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete**, a comprehensive strategy game. This package includes the original game and **all its expansions**, offering a full journey of discovery. You'll get the multiplayer expansion, **Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World**, and all the new civilizations, scenarios, and features from **Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests!** This combination provides a rich and varied gameplay experience with **many ways to win**, according to developer Firaxis Games.

This edition bundles the original game, the multiplayer expansion, and the Conquests expansion. While online multiplayer for **Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World** ended on May 31st, 2014, **LAN play is still available**, as confirmed by 2K Games.

**Master Feudal Japan's Art of War in Total War: SHOGUN 2**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 immerses you in the **mid-16th Century**, a tumultuous era in Japanese history known as the **darkest age of Japan**. During this period, the unified empire splintered, leading to constant warfare among ten powerful clans vying for dominance. Your objective is to navigate a world of **conspiracies and conflict**, defeat your rivals, and ultimately **unite the country to become the new shogun**.

As a **Daimyo**, or clan leader, your path to victory requires a strategic blend of **military might, economic foresight, and astute diplomacy**. The ultimate aim is to **re-unite Japan** and establish yourself as the **undisputed ruler of a peaceful nation**.

The game features **enhanced 3D battles**, continuing the series' tradition of real-time land and sea combat. The **tactical campaign map** serves as the strategic core, where you will meticulously develop your domain and manage your growing empire. A sophisticated new AI, drawing inspiration from Sun Tzu's 'Art of War', governs Japanese warfare, enabling **deep, yet accessible strategic gameplay**. Creative Assembly developers highlighted that the AI's strategy is directly based on Sun Tzu's principles, promising a truly challenging and rewarding experience. You will command formidable samurai armies and powerful fleets to **conquer Feudal Japan**. Build your kingdom through economic, political, and military strength, and **employ the 'Art of War'** with cunning tactics, spies, and assassins. Adapt to evolving battlefield and domain conditions, and engage in **online battles**, including a two-player campaign and large, specialized 8-player campaigns.

Total War: SHOGUN 2 introduces new elements such as **RPG skills and experience** for Generals and Agents, **multi-stage sieges** that offer more complex assaults than simple castle attacks, and the inclusion of powerful **hero units**. You will also experience a visually upgraded and highly interactive **rotating 3D campaign map**.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Your Path to Becoming Shogun**

Enter the chaotic 16th century in feudal Japan, a land torn apart by war. Ten powerful warlords fight for control, breaking the nation's peace. As a Daimyo, your main aim is to **unite Japan** and become Shogun, the supreme leader. To do this, you need a smart mix of **military strategy**, good **economic planning**, and clever **diplomacy**.

The main gameplay in Total War: SHOGUN 2 improves on the series' well-loved style. Fight exciting **real-time 3D battles** on land and sea, where every choice matters. The strategic campaign map is your kingdom's control center, letting you plan your moves carefully. A smart new AI, inspired by Sun Tzu's ancient teachings, offers a tough but fair challenge to experienced players.

To win, you must use several key tactics. **Defeat** your enemies by leading your samurai armies and fleets in exciting battles. **Expand** your territory by managing your provinces on the turn-based map, collecting resources, training your troops, and growing your power through your economy, politics, and military. **Outsmart** your rivals using Sun Tzu's classic tactics, like using fire, sieges, spies, and assassinations to adapt to the changing world of war and politics. Lastly, **challenge** others in two-player campaigns or join large online battles with up to eight players in special scenarios.

SHOGUN 2 adds important new features. Watch your **characters develop** as generals and agents gain experience and new abilities. Experience **more challenging sieges** as taking enemy castles becomes a difficult, multi-step process. Use **special troops**, including powerful Hero units that can greatly improve morale and deal heavy damage. Explore a more **interactive map**, with a new rotating 3D campaign view that gives you a better strategic look.

Battlefield™ 3 thrusts you into intense combat where you control the action and fight your way. This game features 29 large multiplayer maps, a huge selection of vehicles, weapons, and gear, all designed to amp up the excitement. Every fight brings you closer to earning rewards and climbing the ranks.

**Key Gameplay Elements:**

*   **Class Specialization:** Choose from four distinct player classes—Assault, Engineer, Support, and Recon—each with unique abilities. Success hinges on effective teamwork.
*   **Vehicle Freedom:** Command a wide array of vehicles, including tanks, buggies, helicopters, and jets. You can even perform direct attacks on enemies with the F/A-18E Super Hornet.
*   **Destructible Environments:** Battle across 29 varied multiplayer maps with highly destructible environments. The open spaces are ideal for dynamic vehicle combat.
*   **Progression and Rewards:** Earn Ranks, Ribbons, and Medals as you play, improving your combat effectiveness. For example, mastering helicopter piloting can unlock IR flares to defend against missiles or enhance stealth.

**Battlefield 3 Premium Edition:**

This complete package includes the base game and all five expansion packs. It offers:

*   20 new maps
*   20 new weapons
*   10 new vehicles
*   4 new game modes

**Premium Edition Extras:**

*   **Multiplayer Head Start:** Get immediate access to 15 powerful weapons, plus essential gadgets and vehicle upgrades.
*   **Enhanced Features:** Reset your stats, get priority server access, and personalize your Platoon with new emblems. Enjoy special events like Double XP weekends and exclusive contests.
*   **Exclusive Gear:** Acquire unique items like new soldier and weapon camos, the ACB-90 knife, and special dog tags.

Prepare for Dwarf Fortress, a game offering the deepest, most intricate simulation of a world ever created. This isn't just generated geometry; it's a fully simulated world where civilizations rise and fall, complete with unique personalities, creatures, and cultures. Expect infinite hours of gameplay, now enhanced with beautiful pixel graphics!

Learn the basics with in-game tutorials. Dwarf Fortress is a lifetime "living" project, continuously created and updated since 2003 with no end in sight. Generate your unique world and manage a bustling colony of dwarves as they mine towards their eventual demise. This new, endless hobby is just for you! The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam. Build a fortress and strive to help your dwarves survive threats like starvation, dragons, and madness.

In this complex construction, management, and roguelike simulation, each generated world presents a unique challenge. These challenges stem from dwarves with their own simulated personalities or the presence of aquifers. Observe how your civilization declines and learn for next time, knowing that something else will inevitably go wrong. The combat model is incredibly detailed, featuring skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, various poison effects, and much more.

The depth of the generation is difficult to fully convey. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many randomly created for each world, populate the game. You'll also find generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear in their proper geological environments. Remember the game's mantra: "Losing is fun!"

Nothing substantial has changed under the hood; it's still the classic Dwarf Fortress, but with graphics and music included by default. As the developers, Tarn "Toady One" and Zach "Threetoe" Adams, stated, "A few bells and whistles won’t change that." You might be familiar with the tile set mod packs from Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman. Their combined efforts have led to an all-new tileset featuring brand new pixel art by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. The Dwarf Fortress Steam edition boasts a 15-track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, including tracks in the Dwarvish language.

It's never been easier to start playing! The new player experience has been improved with tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountains. Your dwarves will need a steady supply of food and beer, but they'll also require your guidance to survive attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the undead.

Key gameplay elements include:
*   Crafting treasures and furniture from various materials.
*   Establishing a barony and supporting increasingly demanding nobility.
*   Reading your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy.
*   Building floodgates to divert water for farming or prevent magma mishaps.
*   Constructing structures and observing your dwarves discover and build their culture, including taverns, libraries, temples, and developing skills in pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more.

Dwarf Fortress served as the original inspiration for games like RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It was also one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. Updated for over 16 years by the Adams brothers, their goal is to simulate all of existence. Bay 12 Games estimates they are currently only about 44% done with this monumental task.

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: Your All-in-One Strategy Experience**

Dive into the complete world of Sid Meier's Civilization III with this ultimate package. Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete brings together the beloved base game, known for its addictive exploration and empire-building, with its enhanced multiplayer expansion, Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World.

This comprehensive edition also includes all the exciting new content from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests. You'll discover:

*   **New Civilizations:** Lead a variety of unique cultures to victory.
*   **Engaging Scenarios:** Experience diverse historical and fictional challenges.
*   **Innovative Features:** Explore fresh gameplay mechanics and strategic options.

Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete offers expanded ways to play, more strategic depth, and diverse paths to achieve victory, all conveniently packaged together.

*Please note: Online multiplayer functionality was suspended on May 31st, 2014. Local Area Network (LAN) mode remains supported.*

Factorio is a captivating game centered on the intricate art of building and managing vast industrial complexes. Players embark on a journey of resource extraction, technological advancement, infrastructure development, production automation, and defense against hostile alien forces. Initially, you'll be manually harvesting trees, mining ores, and crafting essential components like mechanical arms and transport belts. However, your operations will rapidly evolve into an industrial behemoth, complete with expansive solar farms, sophisticated oil refining and cracking processes, and the deployment of construction and logistic robots to meet your ever-growing resource demands.

This intense exploitation of the planet's natural wealth inevitably draws the ire of the indigenous inhabitants, necessitating a robust defense strategy for your burgeoning machine empire. The game also offers a robust cooperative multiplayer experience, allowing players to join forces, construct colossal factories, and efficiently delegate tasks among friends. Furthermore, Factorio's comprehensive modding support empowers creators worldwide to introduce a wealth of innovative features, ranging from minor enhancements and helpful utilities to complete game overhauls.

While the primary gameplay unfolds in the freeplay scenario, a variety of engaging challenges are presented through distinct Scenarios. Should these not capture your interest, the intuitive in-game Map Editor provides the tools to craft your own unique environments, meticulously placing entities, enemies, and terrain, and even incorporating custom scripts for novel gameplay experiences.

Regarding pricing, the developers have stated, "We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future."

Here's what players and notable figures have to say about Factorio:

"No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly." - Reddit

"I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately." - Notch, Mojang

"Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens." - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
Description:
Rise of Nations Rise of Nations is a real-time strategy game that spans all history. Start with a single city in the Ancient Age; gather resources; build an infrastructure; research technologies; construct Wonders of the World such as the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower; and expand your military might across the world, conquering hostile nations with bombers, battleships, and tanks—all over your lunch hour! In Rise of Nations there are: 18 Nations—each with special abilities and unique military units. Over a hundred military units operating on the ground, sea, and air— from Hoplites to Frigates to Helicopters. Over two dozen buildings with upgrades and technologies that will take your nation from a small City to an Information Age society. 14 Wonders of the World—the Terra Cotta Army, the Taj Mahal, the Eiffel Tower. Each gives your nation special bonuses. More than a dozen map types, ranging from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas to the Nile Delta. Conquer the World campaign—a linked series of dozens of scenarios. The Extended Edition includes: Rise of Nations Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots New in the Extended Edition: Improved Visuals Improved water Improved textures Full-screen anti-aliasing Full Steamworks Integration Multiplayer with ranked matches (ELO) Achievements Trading Cards Cloud saves

Name: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI
Description:
Civilization VI offers new ways to engage with your world: cities now physically expand across the map, active research in technology and culture unlocks new potential, and competing leaders will pursue their own agendas based on their historical traits as you race for one of five ways to achieve victory in the game. ‎‏‏‎‎‏‏‎ See the marvels of your empire spread across the map like never before. Build powerful specialty districts to specialize and boost city output. Customize each city to suit your needs or take advantage of the local terrain. Boost your civilization’s progress through history to unlock powerful bonuses before anyone else! To advance more quickly, use your units to actively explore, develop your environment, and discover new cultures. As the game progresses, so do your diplomatic relationships. From primitive first interactions where conflict is a fact of life, to late game alliances and negotiations.

In **Mini Motorways**, you'll **design and build road networks** to manage traffic flow in a growing city. Developed by Dinosaur Polo Club, the creators of Mini Metro, this simulation game challenges you to place roads, one segment at a time, to help your city thrive. As your city expands, **adapting your road designs is key** to keeping traffic moving efficiently.

Effectively managing upgrades, like implementing **highways** and building **roundabouts**, is essential to meet the demands of your growing road system. The game asks: "**How long can you keep the cities of the world moving?**"

Mini Motorways offers a **unique gameplay experience** with cities that grow organically. The maps are visually appealing, inspired by real-world geography. Players have many upgrade options to manage complex road systems.

The game focuses on player comfort. You can customize your experience with different color palettes, and there are special modes for colorblind players and a night mode. The soundtrack, by Disasterpeace, changes with the city's growth, adding to the immersion.

As you play, you can unlock new maps and achievements. You can also create and share animated GIFs of your city layouts. For a competitive challenge, Mini Motorways features **Daily and Weekly Challenges**, letting you test your skills against players worldwide.

RimWorld is a **compelling science fiction colony simulation game** where an **intelligent AI storyteller** drives the narrative. Drawing inspiration from classics like Dwarf Fortress, Firefly, and Dune, the game places you in charge of three shipwreck survivors on a **distant, uncharted world**. Your primary objective is to **manage every facet of your colonists' lives**, encompassing their moods, health, relationships, and even their battles with addiction.

The game offers a **wide variety of diverse environments** for establishing your colony, including:

*   Lush forests
*   Arid deserts
*   Dense jungles
*   Frozen tundras

As your colony expands, you'll observe your colonists developing **complex and dynamic relationships**. They form bonds with family, lovers, and spouses. While these connections can be deeply rewarding, they are also **prone to volatility**.

Survival in RimWorld presents a **constant and engaging challenge**. You must **defend your settlement** against numerous threats, such as:

*   Cunning pirates
*   Hostile indigenous tribes
*   Aggressive wildlife
*   Colossal insects
*   Ancient mechanical guardians

To overcome these dangers and **thrive**, you will need to **craft essential structures, weapons, and apparel**. This requires a broad spectrum of materials, from basic metal and wood to advanced futuristic components.

Beyond defense and construction, RimWorld emphasizes **strategic resource management and expansion**. You can:

*   **Tame and train a variety of creatures**, from pets that boost morale to farm animals and formidable attack beasts.
*   Engage in **trade**, interacting with passing ships and caravans.
*   **Form your own caravans** for quests, trade, attacking rival factions, or even **relocating your entire colony**.

The world of RimWorld is **dynamic and highly reactive**. You'll contend with harsh weather, including blizzards and devastating fires, necessitating **constant vigilance and adaptation**. The game also presents **difficult moral dilemmas**, such as deciding the fate of refugees or prisoners – whether to recruit them, sell them, or worse.

Each playthrough of RimWorld generates a **unique and procedurally generated world**, ensuring a **fresh and unpredictable experience**. The game is also **highly customizable**, with hundreds of mods available on Steam Workshop that can **drastically alter gameplay**. For newcomers, an intelligent AI tutor is available to guide you.

At its core, RimWorld is a **powerful story generator**. It is meticulously designed to **co-create narratives filled with tragedy, triumph, and unexpected twists**. The AI Storyteller intelligently controls "random" events that shape your colony's destiny. Each event, from thunderstorms to pirate raids, is a card dealt by the AI, **weaving a unique tale of survival**. Several AI Storytellers offer distinct experiences:

*   **Randy Random:** Known for unpredictable and chaotic events.
*   **Cassandra Classic:** Builds tension with escalating challenges.
*   **Phoebe Chillax:** Offers a more relaxed pace with occasional excitement.

Your colonists are **crash-landed survivors** from a destroyed orbital passenger liner. This diverse background means your initial group could include individuals from various walks of life. You can acquire new colonists through:

*   **Capturing them in combat and recruiting them.**
*   Purchasing them from slave traders.
*   Accepting refugees.

This ensures your colony is always a **motley crew**. Each colonist's background significantly impacts their abilities and behavior. For example, a nobleman excels at social tasks but may refuse manual labor, while a farm oaf has extensive agricultural knowledge but struggles with research. A brilliant scientist might be unparalleled in research but inept at social tasks, and a genetically engineered assassin, while limited in other skills, is deadly in combat.

Colonists' relationships are **dynamic and can evolve dramatically**. They form opinions of each other, leading to romance, marriage, infidelity, or conflict. Imagine your two most dedicated colonists happily married, only for one to fall for the charismatic surgeon who saved her life.

The game generates an entire planet, offering a variety of landing zones:

*   Frigid northern tundra
*   Scorching desert
*   Temperate forest
*   Humid equatorial jungle

Each biome presents unique challenges and opportunities, with distinct flora, fauna, diseases, weather patterns, and mineral resources. Surviving in a disease-ridden jungle is vastly different from enduring a parched desert or a frozen tundra with a limited growing season.

Your colony is not confined to a single location. You can assemble **caravans of colonists, animals, and prisoners** to explore the planet. These expeditions can involve:

*   Rescuing kidnapped allies.
*   Attending peace negotiations.
*   Trading with other factions.
*   Attacking enemy settlements.
*   Completing various quests.

You even have the option to **pack up your entire colony and migrate** to a new, more suitable location, utilizing rocket-powered transport pods for faster travel. Animal husbandry is another key element. Taming and training animals can provide significant benefits:

*   **Lovable pets** can lift the spirits of stressed colonists.
*   **Farm animals** provide resources like milk and wool.
*   **Trained attack beasts** can be unleashed upon enemies.

The game features a wide array of animals, from common pets like cats and dogs to formidable creatures like grizzly bears and cougars, as well as exotic alien-like lifeforms.

Colonists in RimWorld constantly assess their surroundings and internal states, directly influencing their emotions. They react to hunger, fatigue, witnessing death, unburied corpses, injuries, darkness, cramped living conditions, and sleeping arrangements. Prolonged stress can lead to emotional breakdowns or aggressive outbursts. The game meticulously tracks wounds, infections, and chronic conditions on each body part, impacting a colonist's capabilities. An eye injury, for example, can impair shooting accuracy or surgical skill, while wounded legs will slow down movement. A wide range of body parts can be affected by injury, disease, or absence, with logical in-game consequences. Other species also have unique body layouts; a deer can still move with three legs, and a rhino becomes less dangerous without its horn. Body parts can be repaired or enhanced with prosthetics, from basic to advanced. A peg leg might allow a colonist to walk again, albeit slowly. Investing in an expensive bionic leg can transform them into a superhuman runner. The game even allows for the extraction, sale, purchase, and transplantation of internal organs. RimWorld is also highly accessible for modding, boasting an active and creative modding community. (All non-English translations are fan-made.)

## Startopia: Rebuild a Galactic Civilization

The galaxy is in ruins. Once vibrant space stations and planets now stand as empty relics of a past apocalypse. But a new era of hope is dawning. You are called to lead the rebuilding effort, restoring the network of space stations to meet the standards of various alien races. By attracting these diverse species, you'll harness their unique expertise and drive forward new technological advancements. This journey promises a humorous and cunning struggle, filled with daring adventures.

### A Living, Breathing Alien Society

Startopia features a fully realized alien society. Experience the complexities of interspecies relationships, from fierce rivalries and budding friendships to the realities of crime and punishment. Leisure and entertainment are vital, as is a robust and functioning economy.

### Innovative Gameplay Mechanics

Explore the unique 'Torus' play area, offering a perspective never before seen in a game. Each space station is divided into 16 habitable subsections spread across three decks. The bio-deck allows for editable landscapes and manageable ecosystems, giving you complete control over terraforming.

### Multiplayer and Varied Challenges

Connect with up to three other stationmasters in multiplayer mode. Startopia offers a range of gameplay experiences, from a simple sandbox mode for relaxed exploration to detailed station micromanagement for those who crave intricate control.

Name: Cities: Skylines
Description:
Cities: Skylines is a modern take on the classic city simulation. The game introduces new game play elements to realize the thrill and hardships of creating and maintaining a real city whilst expanding on some well-established tropes of the city building experience. You’re only limited by your imagination, so take control and reach for the sky! Multi-tiered and challenging simulation Constructing your city from the ground up is easy to learn, but hard to master. Playing as the mayor of your city you’ll be faced with balancing essential requirements such as education, water electricity, police, fire fighting, healthcare and much more along with your citys real economy system. Citizens within your city react fluidly, with gravitas and with an air of authenticity to a multitude of game play scenarios. Extensive local traffic simulation Colossal Order's extensive experience developing the Cities in Motion series is fully utilized in a fully fleshed out and well-crafted local traffic simulation. Districts and Policies Be more than just an administrator from city hall. Designating parts of your city as a district results in the application of policies which results in you rising to the status of Mayor for your own city. Utilize the Day and Night Cycle The city changes during the hours of the day and affects citizen schedules. Traffic is visibly slower at night and some zoned areas do not work with full efficiency. Cities: Skylines will put you in control of managing the different aspects of the day and night cycles. Extensive modding support Build or improve on existing maps and structures. You can then import your creations into the game, share them as well as download the creations of other city builders on the Steam workshop.

**Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition** is a real-time strategy game that has been **remastered** to celebrate its 20th anniversary. This version features a **significant visual and audio overhaul**, including 4K Ultra HD graphics and a **completely re-recorded soundtrack**.

The Definitive Edition comes with the **"The Last Khans" expansion**, which introduces three new campaigns and four new civilizations. Players can experience **over 200 hours of content**, spanning 1,000 years of history across all original campaigns and popular expansions. This content has been **enhanced** for a better experience.

Key features and updates include:

*   **Regular updates:** The game is consistently updated with new content, events, game modes, and improvements.
*   **Co-Op Mode:** Players can team up with friends.
*   **35 Civilizations:** A wide variety of civilizations are available for online play, offering high replayability.
*   **Additional DLCs:** Content like "Lords of the West" is available for purchase.
*   **New Game Modes:** Recent additions include **Battle Royale** and **Quick Play** for casual matches.
*   **Scenario Editor Support:** Ongoing support for the Scenario Editor.
*   **User Interface Improvements:** Significant enhancements to the game's interface.

Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition offers an engaging experience, inviting players to **conquer** in this classic strategy title.

Name: Dead Cells
Description:
Roguelite? Metroidvania? Roguevania! You grew up with the roguelikes, witnessed the rise of the roguelites and even the birth of the roguelite-lites? We'd now like to present for your consideration our RogueVania , the illegitimate child of a modern Roguelite ( Rogue Legacy, Binding of Isaac, Enter the Gungeon, Spelunky, etc.) and an old-school MetroidVania ( Castlevania: SotN and its ilk). Features: RogueVania : The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline pumping threat of permadeath. 2D Souls-lite Action : Tough but fair combat, more than fifty weapons and spells with unique gameplay, and of course, the emergency panic roll to get you out of trouble. Nonlinear progression : Sewers, Ossuary or Ramparts? Once unlocked, special permanent abilities allow you to access new paths to reach your objective. Opt for the path that suits your current build, your play style or just your mood. Exploration : Secret rooms, hidden passages, charming landscapes. Take a moment to stroll the towers and breath in that fresh sea mist infused air... Interconnected levels and progressive unlocking of access to the island provides you with a real incentive to explore your surroundings. Add in a degree of evolution for your character and permanent weapon upgrades and you can see where Dead Cells borrows from the long line of MetroidVanias that precede it. At the end of the day though, it’s YOUR skills as a player that matter most! Roguelites are about constantly getting better, until what was an insurmountable obstacle becomes a walk in the park. Unforgiving combat wed to the absence of any kind of safety net makes for an adrenaline pumping ride each and every run and unrivaled replayability.
