Dead Cells left Early Access on August 7th 2018 and comes with: 13 Levels - Each one with its own atmosphere , foes and secrets to discover. 4 Bosses - Made by the most sadistic of the devs , raised on the salt of the testers. 90 or so weapons and skills - Spears, swords, bows, freeze blast, etc. 4 special powers, unlocking new areas and paths (metroidvania gear lock items). 1 epic responsive, fluid and fun to play combat system. 1 Daily Run Mode Complete with leaderboards for lording it over your mates. Hours of fun (depending on your skill, anything from 10 to 30 hours or more). A few rage-quits, Ok a lot of rage quits… But you’ll git gud… Eventually.

Name: Rogue Legacy 2
Description:
Rogue Legacy is back! But now it's got a 2 on the end of it! Rogue Legacy 2 is a genealogical rogue-LITE. That means it has all the trappings of a typical rogue-like (randomized runs, changing characters, and more), but with persistent upgrades, and persistent dead heirs. In this game, your legacy defines you. Spend your parents’ inheritance and grow the family manor to give your children a better fighting chance. Each child is unique, with their own traits and abilities. Your daughter could be a Ranger. She could also be vegan. It’s a new experience every time. Rogue Legacy 2 also lets you play how you want to. Go hard and fast, and dive deeper into the depths of a randomly-generated world. Or take it slow and steady and build your character up until you’re ready for greater challenges. Every Adventure is Unique New monsters, new traps, and new layouts await you every time you enter the Kingdom. This is a world where improvisation, and not memorization is the key to success. Wildly New Classes No two classes play the same. Hide atop Ivy Canopies as the Ranger, and rain poisoned arrows down onto your foes. Take to the skies as a Dragon Lancer and fly across the skies striking foes at massive speeds. Or sing and dance through your enemies, as the joyous bard, leaving only a trail of bodies behind you. Rogue Legacy 2 supports 15 new classes, with 15 distinct styles of play. Brand New Style We’re taking a whole new artistic approach to Rogue Legacy 2. The sequel features 2.5D stylings, with 3D characters against hand-drawn backdrops. The art uses heavy shading and all animations are done using stepping techniques to keep the familiar RL look and feel. Revamped Biome Generation We went all-out with biome generation to make each area in RL2 feel completely new. Each biome adopts different “build strategies” to create completely unique yet-still-randomly-generated regions. True Metroidvania To really push the metroidvania flair, RL2 introduces heirlooms: special items that permanently give your heroes new abilities that fully reveal the world’s secrets. These are not basic lock-in-key abilities, but powers that fundamentally change how you play. And heirlooms are not simply handed to you. You must prove your worth, provided you can find them. Traits 2.0 Though fun the first time, the traits in RL1 often wore their welcome later in the game. We’ve now added gold modifiers to entice players to take on new challenges. The more debilitating the trait is (in-game), the bigger the reward. This makes choosing your heirs a meaningful decision every time. Relics and Resolve One of the most exciting new features to Rogue Legacy 2 is the ability to pick up Relics, which are unique items that change how your run is played. Gain stat modifiers, complete special challenges, and even gain brand new abilities as you traverse the kingdom. But be careful, the more Relics you obtain the more your resolve is shaken, and all Relics are lost if your hero perishes. Improved Accessibility We’ve taken accessibility to the next level with the introduction of House Rules. Toggle contact damage, tweak global damage and health, and even give yourself flight for difficult platform sections. You have complete control over how you want to play the game. We’ve also introduced new mechanics such as Off-shore Banking to give struggling players more ways to succeed. A Rich Narrative Not only is the lore to the world of Rogue Legacy greatly expanded in the sequel, but it runs deep. New lore awaits you all the multiple NG’s in. Beating the game once is only the beginning. Learn about the inevitable collapse of a once thriving kingdom, and discover the dark secrets of the ones responsible. And connect and build relationships with the characters you meet along the way. New Game+ for Days Your journey has only begun after beating the final boss in RL2. There is a ton more to explore and discover on multiple playthroughs. You must choose how the game gets harder, from unique biome hazards, to special boss fights. The experience keeps changing for near infinite replayability. More of Everything Of course we’re also adding more of everything people loved from the original Rogue Legacy. More traits, more spells, more classes, more biomes, more enemies, more equipment, more rooms, more story. More secrets ... Just more everything. Clownanthropy. Holy smokes! Punching clowns! AND THERE'S A WHOLE LOT MORE. This only scratches the surface of what Rogue Legacy 2 has to offer. Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, the Curio Shoppe, the list goes on, but reading is for nerds. Go out and discover the world of Rogue Legacy 2 for yourself! /

Rogue Legacy is a unique rogue-lite game where heroism is passed down through generations. When your character dies, their child inherits the throne. Each heir has different traits that change how you play. These traits can be anything from colorblindness to vertigo or dwarfism. The game shows that you don't need to be perfect to win, but skill is very helpful due to its tough difficulty.

Gold earned in each run is used to upgrade your manor. This gives your next heir better abilities to fight the game's evil. While the trailer shows the game's basics, here's a closer look at its main features:

*   **Randomly Generated Castles:** Each new life explores a unique castle, making every playthrough fresh and unpredictable.
*   **Rogue-lite Growth:** Dying is part of the game. It helps your family line grow stronger over time.
*   **Unique Traits:** Many different traits add special challenges and twists to each game. For example, you might play as a dyslexic character.
*   **Many Classes:** Choose from over eight classes, each with unique skills. This lets you change your playstyle.
*   **Diverse Enemies:** Fight over sixty enemy types, including many variations. This keeps you on your toes.
*   **Big Skill Tree:** A large, upgradeable skill tree lets you develop your character significantly. Loot collected helps improve the manor and gives heirs an edge.
*   **Special Shops:** Visit shops like the Blacksmith and Enchantress to get better weapons, armor, and new abilities like flight or air jumping.
*   **Secret Content:** Discover many secrets and easter eggs hidden throughout the game world.
*   **Controller Support:** Rogue Legacy works perfectly with a controller and is Big Picture ready for easy setup.

Name: ScourgeBringer
Description:
From the developers of NeuroVoider, ScourgeBringer is a fast-paced free-moving roguelite platformer. Set in a post-apocalyptic world where a mysterious entity wreaked havoc on all humanity, ScourgeBringer puts you in the shoes of the deadliest warrior of her clan: Kyhra. Help her to explore the unknown and slash her way through ancient machines guarding the seal of her past, and maybe the redemption of humanity. Dive into fast-paced rogue-platforming gameplay described by Eurogamer as 'Dead Cells meets Celeste' Slash and shoot your way smoothly with super fluid platforming controls Sharpen your skills with a frantic combat system focused on attacks only Dash forward to the otherworldly adaptive sounds of Joonas Turner (Nuclear Throne, Downwell, Broforce...) Defy hordes of unspeakable enemies and giant bosses holding the secrets of the Scourge Explore the infinite depths of an ever-changing dungeon Uncover mysteries and find mementos of previous explorers to unlock reality defining secrets ScourgeBringer is being made with the help of the community ! You can follow its development through our weekly newsletter, or join our Discord.

Embark on a perilous pilgrimage in **Dark Devotion**, a game that tests your Templar faith against the mysteries of a fallen temple. Join the Hibernian Workshop community on Discord and delve into a world where devotion means facing the deepest darkness for answers that challenge your very existence.

In **Dark Devotion**, your bravery and piety are measured by your willingness to make any sacrifice in praise of your God. The game unfolds a richly detailed, immersive narrative, presenting a somber tale of your Templar religion's irresistible calling. Each encounter pushes your fortitude and conviction as you navigate a cursed pilgrimage across four unique, intricately designed worlds. Wield dozens of weapons and uncover the Temple's secrets, all while battling dark enemies and devious bosses determined to destroy your soul.

As you explore, you'll discover an array of weapons, armors, and relics to enhance your character. Each item boasts unique attributes and statistics, further customizable with mystical runes. "It is essential that you maximize your strengths and adapt your inventory to the enemy you’re facing," the developers advise. "Choose wisely..."

**Dark Devotion** is a story of perseverance, dedication, and secrets. Every chest and item encountered reveals another piece of the narrative—be it a letter, weapon, or clue—aiding your quest. These secrets may be found in the shadows or in the dead hands of fallen characters.

Within the Temple, Faith is your primary recourse against the heathen hordes. Defeating them grants Faith, unlocking secret paths and special chests. However, use this resource sparingly, as "nothing lasts forever." Your survival hinges on employing the right item at the right time to heal wounds or dispel curses. Some items are looted, while others are hidden, requiring wise use. "The eye of your God is ever-watchful," and acts of bravery may earn blessings. Conversely, the Temple harbors despair and sickness, preying on those who lack courage. Learn its ways quickly, or suffer.

Salvation is fleeting, and each world offers multiple interconnected paths, none of which can be retraced. Completing your quest demands shrewd interpretation of the Temple's secrets. Getting lost might even bring favor, depending on what you uncover. The Temple may reveal a hidden altar for saving your story if honored appropriately, or it may not.

**Dark Devotion** features:
*   Dynamic and intense combat
*   Dozens of weapons, armor, and items for diverse fighting styles
*   An intricate system of blessings, curses, and illnesses
*   Challenging boss battles
*   A rich, complex storyline
*   Dark, brooding environments

**Abyss Odyssey: Master Procedural Combat and Enemy Possession**

**Abyss Odyssey** is a challenging side-scrolling action-adventure game that immerses players in a world of **procedurally generated levels** and a **unique enemy possession mechanic**. Developed by ACE Team, the game offers deep combat and a fresh experience with every playthrough.

Here's what makes **Abyss Odyssey** stand out:

*   **Diverse Starting Characters:** You begin with three distinct warriors: the brave Katrien, the tormented Ghost Monk, and the mystical Pincoya. Mastering their special moves is **essential for executing powerful combos** and overcoming the creatures that inhabit the abyss.
*   **Innovative Possession System:** The game's central mechanic allows you to take control of your enemies. By doing so, you gain access to their **unique skills and fighting styles**, significantly expanding your combat options. ACE Team emphasizes that every enemy is as complex as the main characters, demanding players employ **all available tactics to survive**.
*   **Endless Replayability:** Procedural generation ensures that each journey through the abyss is distinct, featuring **new level layouts, enemy placements, and item discoveries**.
*   **Deep Combat Mechanics:** Combat is heavily influenced by fighting games, with each character boasting a wide array of attacks and advanced techniques. A dedicated Training room allows players to **practice and develop new combos**, choosing from any unlocked character, including enemies, to refine their strategies.

Players can unlock and level up to three heroes, acquiring new skills and equipment to **customize their play style**. Skill points enhance each hero's unique abilities, while various weapons and accessories grant new powers. A standout feature is the ability to **play as any character encountered, including bosses**, by using an "ultra attack" to steal their souls and transform. ACE Team reports over **30 unique enemies to capture**, each offering entirely new move sets.

The game also fosters community engagement. Players can collaborate to defeat the final boss, unlocking new in-game content like additional enemies through collective achievements.

**Abyss Odyssey** features beautiful Art Nouveau-inspired graphics and a story rich in Chilean culture and folklore, set in late 19th-century Santiago. You can enjoy the game solo or team up with a friend via online or local co-op, with the flexibility to join or leave sessions freely. A bonus versus mode supports up to four players in free-for-all or team battles, utilizing any unlocked character for a roster of dozens of fighters.

**A Valley Without Wind: A Genre-Bending Adventure**

Prepare for **A Valley Without Wind**, a game that defies genre expectations. This 2D sidescroller offers a **non-linear path**, blending **action with tactical combat** and **city-building** within a **vast, procedurally-generated world**. **Free-roam exploration** is central to the experience.

Unlike many procedurally generated titles, A Valley Without Wind features a **logical progression in difficulty**, complete with helpful tips and checklists. You can choose how to prepare for the formidable Overlord, earning new spells through missions or discovering **secret missions and hidden stashes of magical crafting loot** in the wilds.

**Character customization** is key. Combine unique enchants and spells to alter your movement, jumping, and combat abilities. You can also **rescue and recruit NPCs** to your settlement, empowering them to undertake dispatch missions and help manage your growing civilization. The world dynamically adapts to your choices, offering a personalized gameplay experience.

The game features an **ever-expanding world** where you can journey alone or with friends through a landscape filled with dangerous creatures, potent magic, advanced technology, and intriguing mysteries. You have **unparalleled freedom** to explore the procedurally generated sandbox of Environ, even confronting the Overlord directly, though success is not guaranteed.

Upon saving one continent, a larger and more intricate one emerges, offering **endless progression**. The game intelligently scales with your proficiency, upgrading monsters and missions. For example, after defeating 100 bats, expect to face **"bats on fire!"**

**Deep character customization** allows you to create specialized builds by combining spells, enchants, and equipment. Embrace **permadeath with persistent progress**; while characters are lost, your inventory, enchants, and overall game progress are retained. Become a **community leader** by rescuing NPCs, constructing buildings, improving their skills and mood, and dispatching them to aid you. **Clever problem-solving** is encouraged, as challenges offer multiple solutions with distinct advantages and disadvantages. You can also enjoy **customizable difficulty** settings for platforming, combat, and city-building.

All owners of Valley 1 receive the improved sequel, **Valley 2**, for free. Valley 2 offers a more focused, non-sandbox gameplay style, and you gain access to both games for the price of one.

Aura of Worlds is a creative tactics rogue-lite platformer where players explore diverse worlds, using their ingenuity to overcome challenges. Success hinges on careful planning, sharp wits, and quick reflexes to navigate ever-changing, perilous labyrinths. Players will encounter dynamic obstacles such as flooding passages and toxic pollen, and must confront massive bosses that inhabit entire mazes.

The game offers a variety of combat and exploration approaches. Players can choose a defensive playstyle with a spear and energy shield, or opt for a more aggressive strategy with a boomerang and grapple hook. Decisions also extend to resource management: will you meticulously search levels for potions and runes, or plunge directly into the action?

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

*   **Gamepad Compatibility:** Currently, Xbox and Xbox 360 controllers are compatible. Other Xinput controllers may also function. PlayStation controllers are not natively supported at this time. Keyboard and mouse controls are also fully supported.
*   **Storyline:** The current build features minimal story exposition. A loose narrative is planned for integration as development progresses.
*   **Performance Optimization:** For players experiencing performance issues on older computers, a dedicated forum thread offers optimization tips.
*   **Reporting Bugs and Suggestions:** Players are encouraged to visit the forums to report bugs, issues, or provide suggestions. The development team actively monitors these forums daily, and helpful community members are often available to assist.
*   **Additional Notes:** Default gamepad controls differ slightly from common conventions due to the inclusion of optional 360-degree aiming via the right analog stick. However, button remapping is available to suit individual preferences. The game is designed to be challenging, with frequent deaths expected during initial playthroughs. Importantly, players are not subject to stunlocking or one-hit eliminations. Mastering the ability to multitask between different skills will significantly enhance survivability. The game presents a steeper learning curve than typical platformers, especially within the first 25 minutes.

**Multiple Solutions for Every Challenge:**

Aura of Worlds emphasizes player agency by offering various solutions to overcome obstacles. For instance, if a chest is positioned across a lava pit, players could:

*   Use the grapple hook to swing across.
*   Manipulate time to bounce off enemies and reach it.
*   Employ a boomerang to retrieve the item.
*   Utilize a grenade to detonate the pit, igniting the surrounding area.

**Key Features:**

*   **Enemies and Traps:** Over 80 unique enemies and traps await.
*   **Randomized Levels:** More than 12 randomized level themes, including mine-filled tidal corridors, rising lava, and caverns with toxic and carnivorous plants.
*   **World Types:** Four primary world types—grotto, gardens, temple, and cold crust caverns—each featuring distinct traps, enemies, bosses, and thematic layouts.
*   **Creative Abilities:** A wide array of abilities, from advanced parkour and cloaking to time manipulation.
*   **Versatile Objects:** Every object possesses multiple uses. For example, a ceiling-mounted lantern can be detached and used as a portable light source or an improvised incendiary weapon.
*   **Art and Animation:** Hand-crafted pixel art and animations.
*   **Updates:** Regular content updates are provided.
*   **Soundtrack:** A unique musical score enhances the gameplay experience.
*   **Customization:** Players can customize character skins and clothing colors.
*   **Permanent Progression:** Unlock world shortcuts, new items, and character backgrounds through persistent progression systems.

The game is functionally complete but remains under active development, with more content continuously being added. Aura of Worlds was community-approved via Greenlight in 2016.

**GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon: A Roguelike Hack-and-Slash Masterpiece**

Embark on an epic journey in **GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon**, a game that masterfully blends **intense roguelike hack-and-slash action** with a **stunning dark fantasy world**. This unique experience is brought to life through the **traditional artistry of Japanese ukiyo-e**, creating a visual spectacle that is as beautiful as it is deadly.

As the **chosen leader and guardian of the land of the living**, you are tasked with wielding the **otherworldly arsenal and powers of the Getsu clan**. Your mission is to overcome multiple 'Deaths' and descend deeper into the **treacherous depths of Hell** to eradicate the source of a cataclysmic event.

**Distinct Ukiyo-e Inspired Visuals:**
The world of GetsuFumaDen is a breathtaking canvas, drawing inspiration from the **iconic Japanese ukiyo-e art style**. Prepare to be captivated by **vibrant, dynamic 2D animations** that breathe life into this artistic realm.

**Brutal, Larger than Life Boss Battles:**
Face off against a menagerie of **massive and fearsome monsters and yokai**. From a reanimated demon lord to a colossal centipede and a terrifying five-headed hydra, these formidable foes will test your mettle. **Defend yourself against their relentless onslaught** and emerge victorious to push further into the abyss.

**Dynamic, Weapon-Based Combat:**
Master the **rhythm of intense sword fighting action**, where pacing and timing are deeply inspired by **Japanese martial arts**. Utilize the **unique special moves** of a diverse array of weapon types, including katanas, battle umbrellas, and spears, to outsmart and defeat your enemies.

**Authentic Roguelike Action:**
In GetsuFumaDen, **death is not the end**. The world of Hell is a living, breathing entity, presenting **new map layouts and challenges with each attempt**. Benefit from **permanent upgrades, customizable weapons, and variable level progression**, ensuring that every run offers fresh opportunities and demanding challenges.

**Immersive Weapon Enhancement System:**
Take **complete control over your arsenal** through a robust crafting process. **Collect, enhance, and unlock abilities** for both your main and sub weapons. Discover new enhancements for your favorite weapons with each descent, and get back into the action stronger than before.

**Soul Devour Power-Up System:**
As you delve deeper, **collect souls to power up in real time**. This unique system allows you to **dynamically and strategically select enhancements**, tailoring your abilities to the challenges you face.

**The Digital Deluxe Edition Includes:**

*   **Bonus Game - 1987 FC version 'GetsuFumaDen':** Experience the original game with an added English Menu (in-game text remains in Japanese), the original Japanese guidebook, and convenient Quick Save features.
*   **Digital Artbook:** Immerse yourself in 29 pages of **key art, stage art, character designs, and lore** from the original world of GetsuFumaDen.
*   **Mini-OST:** Enjoy **15 tracks** from the game's stunning and atmospheric soundtrack.

**Dungeon Warriors: A Roguelike Shooter with Evolving Gameplay**

"Dungeon Warriors" is a dynamic barrage shooter where your character grows as you explore its randomly generated levels. You will collect loot, uncover secrets, and battle a variety of enemies. Interacting with characters like businessmen and shopkeepers can also yield powerful items to aid your quest. The primary objective is to become stronger and survive.

We regret to announce that "Dungeon Warriors" has been delayed. This decision allows for further changes and improvements to the game. We anticipate a launch by September and sincerely appreciate your enthusiasm and support.

The game is still under development. Here are some of the features you can expect:

**Enemies in the Game:**

*   **Red Zombie:** Moves erratically and increases speed when it spots you.
*   **Green Zombie:** Moves randomly and accelerates when you are close, with varied attack strengths.
*   **Skeletons with Guns:** Periodically fire 1-3 bullets.
*   **Skeletons Holding Swords:** Randomly throw 1-3 swords.
*   **Skeleton Bomb Monster:** Can hurl 1-3 bombs.
*   **Blue Standing Pile:** Unleashes a barrage of bullets in all directions.
*   **Golden Bird:** Fires bullets that spin in response to your movement.
*   **King Kong Robot:** Specific actions and role to be revealed during gameplay.

**Key Features of the Game:**

*   **Dynamic Weather System:** Ensures a distinct environment each playthrough.
*   **Atmospheric Lighting:** Enhances visual appeal and mood.
*   **Random Weapon Drops:** Guarantees unique combat encounters.
*   **Procedurally Generated Maps:** Offers endless exploration in newly created areas.
*   **Varied Enemy Encounters:** Keeps gameplay consistently engaging.
*   **Random Power-Ups:** Provides temporary advantages to shift battle tides.
*   **Persistent Progression:** Retain earned upgrades for lasting achievement.
*   **Advanced Enemy AI:** Monsters exhibit intelligent movement and pursuit behaviors.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition Brings Motorcycle Stunts Back to PC**

PC gamers can once again experience the thrill of the **Trials franchise** with the release of **Trials Evolution: Gold Edition**. This new package revives the beloved motorcycle stunt series, which originally debuted on PC with **Trials 2 SE** back in 2008. Developer RedLynx, heeding the calls of its fans, has delivered a comprehensive collection that includes two Trials games previously unavailable on the platform.

The **Gold Edition** is a substantial offering, featuring:

*   All the content from the critically acclaimed XBLA title, **Trials Evolution**.
*   All single-player tracks and skill games from the original **Trials HD**.

This combined package provides players with a vast array of challenging courses and engaging, physics-driven motorcycle gameplay.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition** has been **enhanced and optimized for PC**. The core elements that defined the series' success are present and refined. A standout feature is the **robust in-game editor**, empowering players to:

*   Design and build their own custom tracks.
*   Share their creations with a global community.

This player-generated content can be easily distributed worldwide through the integrated **player sharing system**. For those seeking to test their skills against others, **global leaderboards** allow players to compare their performance. The game also boasts:

*   Engaging **multiplayer modes**.
*   A variety of **indoor and outdoor environments**.
*   Extensive **bike and rider customization options**.
*   Exciting **global challenges**.

Name: Lonely Mountains: Downhill
Description:
Just you and your bike - take it on a thrilling ride down an unspoiled mountain landscape. Make your way through thick forests, narrow trails and wild rivers. Race, jump, slide and try not to crash - all the way from the peak to the valley! Explore the rich mountain worlds at your own pace or face the ticking clock. Each mountain features several trails - ride along quiet mountain lakes, majestic forests and steep canyons. A custom physics system lets you carefully drop from boulder to boulder, sprint over abysses or slide through muddy grounds. It’s all up to you! Take the relaxing scenic route or go off-road to find the fastest way to the finish line! Master the tight and responsive controls to make your way to hidden resting places and secret shortcuts. No audience, no barrier tapes - experience a beautiful nature unspoiled by men. Unlock new difficulty modes and prove your speed-running talents on the leaderboards! Train your skills day and night to ultimately compete with the best riders in the world in the risky Free Ride mode! Each bike handles differently, so find the perfect one for your playstyle and make your way down the mountain to unlock dozens of paint jobs and outfits! JOIN HERE!

Descenders is an exhilarating downhill biking game that reinvents the genre. Developed by the creators of Action Henk, it offers an experience that is **easy to pick up but difficult to perfect**.

The game's main draw is its **ever-changing environments**. Each downhill run is a fresh challenge with new jumps, tricky slopes, and surprising obstacles. To perform impressive tricks and maintain control of your rider, you'll need to master the **realistic physics engine**. Descenders also includes a "Rogue-Bike Mode," where you can unlock **useful abilities** and upgrades to customize your play. Your achievements are tracked on an **online leaderboard**, allowing you to show off your skills and earn new bikes and gear. Adding to the excitement of the mountain descents is a **lively soundtrack** from the drum & bass label Liquicity.

The ultimate objective in Descenders is to reach **legendary status** by finishing the game in one continuous run.

Your path is connected to the team you join. Select from three unique factions:

*   **Team Enemy:** Known for their bold tricks and relentless drive.
*   **Team Arboreal:** Experts at navigating wild, natural landscapes.
*   **Team Kinetic:** Focused on achieving maximum speed.

Joining a team allows you to connect with other players who share your passion. Wearing your team's colors and equipment can unlock **special rewards**. The team that earns the most Reputation receives special prizes and claims a top spot on the Descenders Discord. As a developer mentioned, "We truly value our community, encouraging a feeling of connection and good-natured rivalry."

Experience the **ultimate MotoGP™ simulation** with MotoGP™14, the official video game that puts you right into the heart of the racing world. This highly anticipated game features **complete rider lineups** from both the 2013 and 2014 seasons, plus **legendary champions** from MotoGP™'s rich history. Prepare to race on every official circuit, including the exciting new **Argentina track**, and challenge rivals in various fun game modes.

MotoGP™14 brings **new gameplay features** to boost your experience. Try the online Split Battle or relive past glories in the offline Real Events 2013 mode. For a **deeper dive**, the detailed career mode offers plenty of chances to grow and compete.

A **major upgrade** powers MotoGP™14, thanks to a **brand-new graphics engine**. Developers Milestone emphasize that this makes the sport feel more **real and intense**. You'll truly feel the **adrenaline and excitement** of being a pro MotoGP™ rider with this **unmatched simulation** that captures the spirit of motorcycle racing. Milestone focused on **authenticity** to deliver the most **immersive MotoGP™ experience** yet.

Name: RIDE 3
Description:
Feel the adrenaline and experience the most complete racing ever with RIDE 3! Immerse yourself in a modern 3D environment where you will live side by side with your bike, modifying it mechanically and aesthetically thanks to the new Livery Editor, which will let your dreams run wild. Before starting, don't forget to customise your rider with the right outfit. THE BIKES More than 230 bike models available from the very first day, with more than 70 new models never seen before in a RIDE game. 30 different brands, both historic and contemporary, of which 9 are completely new. 7 different categories to satisfy every taste and riding style. THE TRACKS RIDE 3 will be a journey around the globe thanks to its 30 different tracks created from zero and faithfully reproduced via photogrammetry and drone scanning. Hurtle down breathtaking roads all around the world, including GP tracks, Road and Supermoto tracks, enjoy the panoramas of street and country tracks and compete in street and acceleration races. LIVERY EDITOR Choose your favourite bike and make it unique, just like your style. Create your livery from scratch, choose a background colour and an endless amount of 2D shapes, designs and effects. Work on various levels to create infinite compositions and find the aesthetic which works for you. Riding a bike is great. Riding a bike which you've created yourself is fantastic. Seeing other riders and players from all over the world racing in your livery is simply the best! CAREER The new career will be a Single Player experience which has never been seen before. Forget the old linear progression: the new Volumes-based system will allow you to collect, read and participate in races and competitions through more than 50 magazines. Each one will catapult you into a unique game experience, made up of competitions and anecdotes about the motorcycling world, which will improve your experience in RIDE 3. What are you waiting for? Start your adventure with RIDE 3.

**RIDE: A Realistic Motorcycle Racing Simulation**

Experience the **thrill of realistic motorcycle racing** with **RIDE**. This game provides an **exciting adventure** on various tracks worldwide. The developers aimed to create a game that **truly simulates motorcycle racing**.

At the core of **RIDE** is the **World Tour**. Here, you'll participate in Motorcycle Festivals across three race types: fast **GP Tracks**, scenic **Country Tracks**, and challenging **City Tracks**. Choose from over 100 authentic motorcycles from top brands. A **new physics system** ensures each bike handles uniquely. You can also **upgrade and customize your bikes** to improve performance and looks. The primary goal is to **achieve top global rankings**.

Beyond the World Tour, **RIDE** offers other modes such as Quick Race, Time Trial, Split Screen, and online races for up to 12 players. Personalize your rider with numerous outfits and customize your bikes with various parts. The game features 15 distinct race tracks. An innovative "Evolving Track System" alters the track during races, demanding **quick reactions and strategic adjustments**.

**RIDE 2: Your Ultimate Motorcycle Digital Garage**

RIDE 2 offers an unparalleled motorcycle experience, letting you discover, customize, and test the world's fastest and most iconic bikes. Compete with renowned brands and showcase their full potential in this unique video game.

**Explore a Vast Collection of Bikes and Tracks**

The game features **over 170 bikes** from various categories, including Nakeds and Supersports. Feel the thrill of racing on **over 30 diverse tracks**, including legendary circuits like the Nürburgring Nordschleife. You'll also find new categories such as Sport Bike 2 Strokes, Supermotos, and Naked Café Racers.

**Customize Your Ride and Rider**

Personalize your bikes with **over 1200 customizable parts** and **600+ liveries**. Modify five key areas: Engine, Brakes and Suspension, Wheels, Transmission, and Aesthetics. Tailor your rider's profile, clothing (Street/Race/Supermoto), and riding style with an advanced pose editor.

**Experience Diverse Game Modes**

RIDE 2 offers **12 distinct game modes** for a long-lasting and fun experience. Master challenging tracks, compete in special slaloms, and outmaneuver opponents. The game also includes new social features and friends integration for an enhanced experience.

**Urban Trial Freestyle: Master the City Streets on Your Bike**

**Urban Trial Freestyle** turns the urban landscape into your personal extreme sports arena. This game lets you execute **impressive stunts** such as backflips, 360s, wallrides, and ollies on a customized trials bike, offering unparalleled freedom.

You have the ability to adjust your bike for peak performance in either **Time Attack** or **Stunt mode**. Strategic decisions are vital, as you must carefully balance **speed and style** to develop your own distinctive riding approach.

Test your skills against the best in **Ghost Mode**, where you race against recorded performances of skilled riders. The game presents **numerous distinct and complex levels** crafted for lasting engagement, motivating you to achieve **flawless performances** and aim to **surpass top global competitors**.

One developer highlighted the game's objective: to deliver an "authentic experience" through "sophisticated physics and fluid animations."

**Key Features:**

*   **Engaging Environments:** Discover 5 unique and captivating settings.
*   **Varied Gameplay:** Conquer Stunt, Time Attack, and special Challenges.
*   **Customization:** Personalize both your bike and your rider.
*   **Authentic Simulation:** Enjoy advanced physics and seamless animations.
*   **Global Competition:** Vie for top rankings on over 140 online leaderboards and utilize Ghost mode.

**Ducati World Championship: Master Motorcycle Racing**

Experience the excitement of professional motorcycle racing in **Ducati World Championship**. This simulation game places you directly into the action with **legendary Ducati bikes**. You can select from over 70 **accurate Ducati models**, each meticulously recreated to mirror its real-world counterpart. The game allows you to delve into Ducati's extensive racing heritage.

**Ducati World Championship** provides a **comprehensive simulation** of professional motorcycle racing. Begin your journey as an amateur and advance through semi-professional and professional levels. Your ultimate objective is to secure victory in the **Superbike and Grand World Championship**.

Challenge your abilities on more than 34 **demanding tracks**, each offering a distinct racing atmosphere. Engage in competition with friends via **split-screen multiplayer** or participate in 60 tournaments spread across five distinct game modes. Experience the raw power of Ducati superbikes, capable of exceeding **210 MPH**, as seen in models like the Ducati Desmosedici.

The game boasts a wide array of motorcycles, including:

*   **Classic models**
*   **High-performance Sports and Road bikes**
*   **Cutting-edge Grand Prix machines**

Dynamic racing is further enhanced by **changing weather and track conditions**, all rendered with realistic lighting effects.

Refine your riding abilities with "Loris' Riding Lessons" to master **advanced racing techniques**. Advance through the challenging Career Mode, facing increasingly skilled opponents. With three distinct gameplay modes—arcade, normal, and simulation—**Ducati World Championship** guarantees **extended periods of thrilling racing**.

**Urban Trial Tricky™ Deluxe Edition** is a **motorbike stunt game** that lets you **master the urban landscape**. It features a **complete set of tricks**, **stylish moves**, and **challenging levels** for an engaging experience. 🏍️

This game blends tricks, platforming, and racing for **fun gameplay**. You can **master and combine killer tricks** into endless combos for smooth performance. With **over 30 levels**, side challenges, and **three single-player modes**, there's plenty to explore. **Personalize your rider and bike** with extensive customization options, including new rider skins, special tricks, and matching motorbike paint jobs. Aim to **top the competitive leaderboards** and enjoy replayability with the freedom to ride in both directions.

Defy gravity with **crazy tricks** and become a trickster! Jump on your bike to perform incredible tricks and combos. Ride with freedom, spin through the air, and switch directions easily. Get lost in the fun, fast-paced gameplay, vibrant visuals, and smooth controls. As one reviewer noted, the game offers a "**truly exhilarating ride**" with its dynamic trick system. Learn new freestyle, breakdance, and FMX moves to develop your personal style. Unlock wild costumes and customize your motorbike. Conquer challenges and master outstanding maneuvers to dominate the leaderboards. The game encourages players to "**push the boundaries of what's possible on two wheels**."

Name: BioShock™
Description:
BioShock is a shooter unlike any you've ever played, loaded with weapons and tactics never seen. You'll have a complete arsenal at your disposal from simple revolvers to grenade launchers and chemical throwers, but you'll also be forced to genetically modify your DNA to create an even more deadly weapon: you. Injectable plasmids give you super human powers: blast electrical currents into water to electrocute multiple enemies, or freeze them solid and obliterate them with the swing of a wrench. No encounter ever plays out the same, and no two gamers will play the game the same way. Biologically modify your body: send fire storming from your fingertips and unleash a swarm of killer hornets hatched from the veins in your arms. Hack devices and systems, upgrade your weapons and craft new ammo variants. Turn everything into a weapon: the environment, your body, fire and water, and even your worst enemies. Explore an incredible and unique art deco world hidden deep under the ocean. BioShock: Breaking the Mold A free download that takes an inside look at the art of BioShock. Download it now (75MB .PDF)

**BioShock Infinite: A Daring Rescue in the Sky-City of Columbia**

In **BioShock Infinite**, you play as Booker DeWitt, a former U.S. Cavalry veteran haunted by debt. Your only hope for redemption is a dangerous mission: rescue Elizabeth, a young woman held captive since childhood in the magnificent, yet sinister, flying city of Columbia. As Booker and Elizabeth are forced to depend on each other, a strong bond forms during their desperate escape. Together, they must master powerful weapons and extraordinary abilities, fighting enemies across the clouds. They'll battle on zeppelins, speed along high-speed Sky-Lines, and navigate Columbia's streets. Their journey is a fight for survival against the airborne metropolis's threats and a quest to uncover its deeply buried, dark secrets.

**Key Features of BioShock Infinite:**

*   **The City in the Sky:** Journey from the ocean depths of Rapture to the breathtaking heights of Columbia. This technological marvel, a vibrant and visually stunning city in the clouds, conceals a disturbing truth.
*   **An Unlikely Mission:** Set in 1912, the story follows Booker DeWitt, a hired gun tasked with rescuing a mysterious young woman from Columbia. Failure is not an option; his life depends on success.
*   **Whip, Zip, and Kill:** Transform Columbia's Sky-Lines into your personal weaponized roller coasters. Zip through the city at breakneck speeds, delivering swift and brutal close-quarters combat.
*   **Tear Through Time:** Manipulate reality by opening "Tears" in time and space. These rifts allow you to alter the battlefield, summoning weapons, turrets, and other crucial resources from thin air to gain the upper hand.
*   **Vigorous Powers:** Unleash devastating supernatural abilities known as Vigors. Hurl explosive fireballs, command bolts of lightning, and summon swarms of crows to decimate your opposition.
*   **Custom Combat Experience:** With a potent arsenal of weapons in one hand and powerful Vigors in the other, augmented by the ability to manipulate time and space, you can forge your own path through the floating city. Rescue Elizabeth and fight for your freedom.
*   **1999 Mode:** After completing BioShock Infinite, players can unlock "1999 Mode." This challenging mode offers a glimpse into the intricate design and balance that appealed to hardcore gamers of the past, providing a distinct and demanding gameplay experience.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

## Dishonored: A Supernatural Assassin's Revenge

Dishonored is a deeply immersive first-person action game that places you in the role of a supernatural assassin fueled by a burning desire for revenge. The game's exceptionally flexible combat system empowers you to creatively eliminate your targets by seamlessly blending supernatural abilities, a diverse arsenal of weapons, and an array of unusual gadgets. You can choose to pursue your enemies under the cloak of darkness, moving like a phantom, or to launch a direct, ruthless assault with weapons drawn. Crucially, the outcome of each mission is directly shaped by the critical choices you make throughout your journey.

### The City of Dunwall: A World of Shadows and Intrigue

The narrative of Dishonored unfolds in Dunwall, a sprawling industrial whaling city where peculiar steampunk-inspired technology and unsettling otherworldly forces exist in a precarious balance within the shadows. You begin as the once-trusted bodyguard of the beloved Empress. However, you are unjustly framed for her murder, transforming you into an infamous assassin, recognized solely by the disturbing mask that has become your chilling calling card. This is a period of profound uncertainty; the city is not only besieged by a devastating plague but also governed by a corrupt regime wielding advanced industrial technologies. Amidst this turmoil, dark forces conspire to bestow upon you extraordinary abilities, far surpassing those of any ordinary man, but this power comes at a significant cost. The truth behind your betrayal remains as obscure as the murky waters surrounding the city, and the life you once knew is irrevocably lost.

### Key Features: Unlocking Your Assassin's Potential

#### Improvise and Innovate Your Playstyle

Approach each assassination with a unique style tailored to your preferences. You can leverage the advantages of shadow and sound to navigate levels silently, remaining unseen by your adversaries, or opt for a head-on confrontation, engaging enemies as they react to your aggressive presence. The game's remarkably flexible combat system encourages you to creatively combine your innate abilities, potent supernatural powers, and ingenious gadgets as you progress through the levels and dispatch your objectives. The freedom to improvise and innovate is paramount in defining your personal play style.

#### Action with Meaningful Consequences

The world of Dishonored dynamically reacts to your actions and the way you choose to play. You can move through the environment like a ghost, actively resisting the city's corruption, or you can show no mercy, leaving a devastating path of destruction in your wake. Your decision regarding the approach for each mission directly influences the subsequent outcomes, ensuring that your choices have tangible and lasting effects.

#### Master Supernatural Abilities

The game offers a suite of potent supernatural abilities that dramatically expand your tactical options. You can utilize teleportation for stealthy infiltrations, possess any living creature to manipulate your surroundings, or even stop time itself to orchestrate unearthly and precise executions. Combining these extraordinary supernatural abilities with your arsenal of weapons unlocks even more inventive ways to overcome obstacles and efficiently eliminate your targets. Furthermore, the game's comprehensive upgrade system allows for the mastery of deadly new abilities and the development of devious gadgets, further enhancing your assassin's toolkit.

#### A City Unlike Any Other

Dishonored invites you to explore an original world meticulously envisioned by Viktor Antonov, the art director behind the acclaimed Half-Life 2. Arkane Studios and Bethesda Softworks present a captivating steampunk city where the forces of industry and the supernatural collide, forging an atmosphere thick with intrigue and mystery. This richly detailed world is yours to discover and explore at your own pace.

**Opus Magnum** by **Zachtronics**, the acclaimed creators of **SpaceChem** and **Infinifactory**, plunges players into a rich alchemical world. This new puzzle game centers on mastering the **transmutation engine**, a powerful tool essential for crafting vital items like medicines, gems, and weapons.

Alchemical engineering is crucial for civilization's survival, a point emphasized by **Anataeus Vaya**, a leading alchemist now heading alchemy for the ancient and wealthy **House Van Tassen**. However, the family's prosperity hides underlying dangers, reminding us that alchemy isn't a universal solution.

**Opus Magnum** offers a deep and engaging experience through several key features:

*   **Machine Design:** Construct intricate alchemical machinery using programmable arms, tracks, and unique devices such as **Van Berlo's wheel** and the **Glyph of Animismus**.
*   **Puzzle Solving:** Tackle challenging puzzles and discover efficient solutions. Share your creations as animated GIFs.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Design and share your own puzzles, or explore those curated from the **Journal of Alchemical Engineering** by Zachtronics.
*   **Engaging Story:** Unravel a narrative filled with intrigue and secrets within the city's old families. Alchemists, capable of creating almost anything, are highly valued but also pose significant risks. As one expert noted, "**Alchemists are highly coveted—and exceptionally perilous.**"
*   **Relaxing Diversion:** For moments requiring a break from intense concentration, **Sigmar's Garden** offers a winnable solitaire game.

Torchlight II offers an expanded and enhanced Action RPG experience, delivering a thrilling adventure with **randomized levels, enemies, and loot** for endless replayability. While keeping the original's charm, this installment significantly expands the game world and introduces key features like **online and LAN multiplayer**. The fate of the world is once again in your hands.

Explore diverse **character classes**, each offering unique play styles. You can choose between male or female heroes, with **customizable appearances** to make your avatar truly your own.

Enjoy robust **multiplayer options** for free cooperative play via LAN or the internet. A sophisticated matchmaking system connects you with players worldwide.

Journey through Vilderan's **open world**, from its vast overworld to numerous towns. Experience dynamic environments with **rain, snow, and day/night cycles**. **Level randomization** ensures fresh layouts, unique paths, varied loot, and challenging monsters every time.

Further customize your experience with extensive **mod support** via the Steam Workshop. Access over a thousand community-created modifications, or use the powerful **GUTS editor** to create and share your own content.

The challenge continues with **New Game Plus**, allowing you to replay with your existing character for a **significantly greater challenge**. You'll keep your skills, gold, and gear for more rewarding playthroughs.

Fan-favorite features like **pets and fishing** return, enhanced with more options and improved visuals. Your pet will still help by selling loot, letting you focus on the action.

## Return to Rapture: BioShock 2 Explores the Depths

**BioShock 2** invites players back to the atmospheric underwater city of Rapture, approximately ten years after the events of the first game. This time, you embody a **Big Daddy**, a powerful protector, tasked with navigating Rapture's decaying splendor. Your primary objective is to confront a new, menacing threat that is abducting young girls. You must **uncover the secrets behind this resurgence of past evils** and fight for your survival in this once-magnificent, now-ruined world.

The single-player campaign offers an **enhanced combat system**, allowing for innovative strategies through the dual-wielding of weapons and Plasmids. This enables exciting and dynamic combat combinations. The narrative continues the acclaimed storytelling of the first game, advancing one of gaming's most captivating and terrifying storylines. You will truly **feel the raw power of Rapture's most feared resident** as you battle a host of new enemies.

Beyond the main story, **BioShock 2** presents several engaging modes and content:

*   **Protector Trials:** These offer intense combat challenges designed to test your mastery of weapons and Plasmids.
    *   Defend your Little Sister as she gathers ADAM from fallen foes, facing increasing opposition.
    *   Each trial provides unique weapon and Plasmid load-outs.
    *   An additional bonus load-out is unlocked upon successful completion.

Adding another dimension to the BioShock universe, the multiplayer mode acts as a rich prequel. It explores the origins of Rapture and its inhabitants during the city's catastrophic fall. You play as a Plasmid test subject for Sinclair Solutions, a major provider of Plasmids and Tonics. To succeed, you will need to **master the full BioShock arsenal**. This genetically enhanced multiplayer allows you to earn experience points to unlock new Weapons, Plasmids, and Tonics, creating hundreds of unique character builds suited to your playstyle. You will **witness Rapture's civil war firsthand**, fighting as its citizens in the conflict that tore the city apart. Furthermore, you can **explore Rapture before its collapse**, engaging in combat within iconic locations like the Kashmir Restaurant and Mercury Suites, meticulously recreated for the multiplayer arenas. This robust multiplayer experience is developed by Digital Extremes.

**BioShock 2** also features substantial downloadable content:

*   **Sinclair Solutions Test Pack:**
    *   Allows you to reach rank 50.
    *   Offers new weapon upgrades.
    *   Includes 20 additional Trials.
    *   Adds two new playable characters.
    *   Provides five new Masks.
*   **Rapture Metro Map Pack:** Adds six new maps within the Rapture Metro system.
*   **"Golf" Melee Mode:** A unique melee mode that transforms blunt objects into golf clubs for a distinct combat experience.
*   **Playable Multiplayer Characters:** You can play as the distinct multiplayer characters Zigo & Blanche.

Please note that all downloadable content requires the full game to play.

**Thief II: The Metal Age** returns players to the role of Garrett, the master thief, in a **thrilling stealth-action adventure**. This sequel plunges you into a world facing **new technologies, strong religious groups, and widespread corruption**. Your success hinges on your **cleverness and careful actions**.

The game offers **15 detailed, open-ended levels**. These large areas allow for **collecting valuable items and sneaking past watchful guards**. Critics praised the **much better enemy AI**, making the game more challenging and requiring players to constantly change their strategies. Garrett has access to **new tools and advanced thief equipment** to help him. The **engaging story** unfolds over these 15 missions, with complex subplots adding depth. The game's lasting impact is recognized by its inclusion on **Gamespy's Greatest Games of All Time** and its award for **Outstanding Achievement in Character or Story Development** at the 2000 Academy of Interactive Arts and Sciences Awards.

Embark on a unique Victorian space adventure with *Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition*. This definitive version lets you command a steam locomotive as a burgeoning empire explores the cosmos. The comprehensive package includes all post-launch updates, featuring new officers, enemies, engines, stories, and even mascots. Experience a reimagined region, the new "Full Steam" mode for extended voyages, and horn functionality, alongside numerous quality-of-life improvements.

Your journey begins by defining your captain's past, choosing from a streetwise urchin to a devout priest or fiery revolutionary, and uncovering their deepest motivations and secrets. As your character evolves, you'll select another defining history aspect, such as being the Black Sheep or having a Lost Love. The unforgiving skies mean most captains perish, but their legacy endures through crucial inheritances passed to their successors.

Explore the rich, dark, and wondrous Fallen London Universe, a setting familiar to *Sunless Sea* players, though no prior experience is necessary for this new story. The High Wilderness presents a breathtaking yet terrifying vision of space where normal rules are suspended. Encounter howling winds through celestial ruins, fogs in stellar jungles, and industrial smog. The Judgements, vast intelligences governing existence, are mysteriously fading. Your captain must navigate this impossible world through a combination of trade, exploration, combat, and survival.

Your locomotive is your sole defense. Maintain and upgrade it with exotic weapons and equipment, such as a Pneumatic Mining Array or the Brassraven. Craft powerful weapons from defeated foes and acquire new locomotives, like the Pellinore-class Trader or Medea-class Destroyer. Battle a variety of threats, including rival locomotives, pirates, imperial warships, monstrous entities like the Undeparted, and swarms of Chorister-bees. Play factions against each other and learn enemy combat styles. Utilize Full Steam mode for strategic escapes or pursuits. Manage crew morale and your captain's nightmares, balancing fuel and supplies with your drive for exploration, knowledge, or riches. The darkness profoundly transforms those who venture into it. Populate your vessel with upgradeable officers, each with unique quests, from a repentant devil to an incognito princess, a brigade of rats, or even your own Aunt.

The Victorian Empire, now free from gravity, has expanded into space, even creating a new sun. The Empress, controlling time from her Throne of Hours, rules an ambitious but merciless empire. Your captain must carve out an existence, making choices that shift power. Will you align with the empire, support rebels, or forge your own independent path? Your fate hinges on your actions: retire in triumph or be lost to the darkness.

*Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition* delivers over 800,000 words of interconnected stories, drawing inspiration from literary giants like C.S. Lewis, Jules Verne, H.P. Lovecraft, and H.G. Wells. Experience a beautifully drawn 2D world across four distinct regions: the celestial wilderness, an industrial empire, a pagan midnight expanse, and the domain of the dead. Engage in real-time battles against celestial foes and pirates. Equip your engine with bizarre gear and weaponry, and fight against starvation, mutiny, terror, and nightmares. Build a lineage of captains, passing on inheritances, or reload your last save. Uncover your captain's past and develop their unique story. Earn fortunes through story-driven trading or smuggling. Gather unique pets like the Inadvisably Big Dog. Enjoy seamless gameplay with remappable controls and controller support. This immersive narrative was created by Failbetter Games, an independent British studio, who stated, "We wanted to create a world that felt both familiar and utterly alien."

**Dishonored 2: A Masterpiece of Choice and Consequence**

Step back into the shadows as a supernatural assassin in Dishonored 2. This highly anticipated sequel to Arkane Studio's acclaimed first-person action game, Dishonored, has earned widespread praise. PC Gamer called it "brilliant," while IGN described it as "amazing" and "a superb sequel." Eurogamer declared it a "masterpiece," and Game Informer hailed it as "a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class." Dishonored 2 invites you to forge your own path in a world where magic and industry clash.

Will you embody Empress Emily Kaldwin or her loyal protector, Corvo Attano? The choice is yours. You can navigate the game unseen, unleash brutal combat, or master a blend of both. Discover how to combine your chosen character's unique powers, weapons, and gadgets to outwit and eliminate your foes. Your decisions shape the narrative, leading to intriguing outcomes across meticulously crafted missions.

**A World in Turmoil**

Fifteen years have passed since the tyrannical Lord Regent was overthrown and the devastating Rat Plague became a memory. Now, an otherworldly usurper has stolen Empress Emily Kaldwin's throne, plunging the Isles into uncertainty. As either Emily or Corvo, you must journey from the familiar streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, a once-vibrant coastal city that holds the key to reclaiming the throne. Empowered by the Mark of the Outsider and new supernatural abilities, you will hunt down your enemies and reclaim what is rightfully yours.

**Key Features:**

*   **The Assassins:** Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are fully voiced characters, offering distinct perspectives and emotional depth. Utilize their unique powers, gadgets, and weapons creatively. Whether you fight openly or move like a ghost, your approach to eliminating or sparing enemies is entirely up to you.

*   **Supernatural Powers:** Advanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade trees allow for deep customization of your abilities. Become a living shadow to stalk your targets, link enemies to share their fate, or mesmerize foes to control their minds. The game offers near-infinite combinations of combat styles, powers, and weapons to achieve your objectives.

*   **Imaginative World:** From the grimy, rat-infested alleys of Dunwall to the exotic, decaying shores of Karnaca, immerse yourself in stunning environments crafted by Arkane's art and narrative teams. The world itself is a character, brimming with lore, unique architecture, and memorable individuals. Signature mission locations, like the dust-choked Dust District and a madman's mansion with shifting walls and clockwork soldiers, offer unforgettable experiences.

*   **The Void Engine:** Dishonored 2 is brought to life by the new Void Engine, a significant advancement in rendering technology. Built on id Tech and heavily customized by Arkane Studios, it supports world-class art direction and leverages modern hardware. This engine enables substantial improvements in AI for stealth and combat, lighting, graphical fidelity, densely populated urban environments, and narrative presentation.

**Leisure Suit Larry Tackles Modern Dating in *Wet Dreams Don't Dry***

Get ready for **Leisure Suit Larry** to dive into the **complex world of modern dating** in *Leisure Suit Larry: Wet Dreams Don't Dry*. This classic point-and-click adventure game drops our **iconic '80s character** into a new era, where his **outdated views on romance** are challenged by today's realities. Despite **major societal and technological changes**, Larry is determined to **find love** and navigate the intricacies of **contemporary dating**.

Here's what Larry will encounter:

*   **"Timber," a dating app:** This is a core part of Larry's journey, reflecting our highly connected world. Players will help Larry use this digital platform to impress women, meet their standards, and **boost his Timber score**.
*   **Faith:** Larry's ultimate objective is to win the heart of Faith, who works for the CEO of **Prune**, a leading tech company.
*   **Extensive Game World:** The game features **over 30 detailed locations** and **more than 30 unique characters**. Each character and location presents its own puzzles and challenges.
*   **"Instacrap":** Larry will also interact with this **humorous social media parody**, which offers a witty take on online culture.

This game combines **classic gameplay with modern themes**, breathing **new life** into the beloved *Leisure Suit Larry* series.

Name: Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator
Description:
Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator is a game where you play as a Dad and your goal is to meet and romance other hot Dads. You and your daughter have just moved into the sleepy seaside town of Maple Bay only to discover that everyone in your neighborhood is a single, dateable Dad! Will you go out with Teacher Dad? Goth Dad? Bad Dad? Or any of the other cool Dads in this game? With minigames, sidequests, and a variety of paths and endings, Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator is this year's most anticipated Dad-based game. Features 7 dateable Dads Dad character creator - Create your Dadsona! Multiple endings per-Dad Voiced by the Game Grumps and friends Written and created by Leighton Gray and Vernon Shaw Game Directed by Tyler J. Hutchison Artwork and pinups by Shanen Pae, J.N. Wiedle, Anna Pan, Tyson Hesse, Ellen Alsop, Evan Palmer, Ego Rodriguez, and many more! Original score by Jesse Cale Dad-themed mini and micro games throughout each date path So many Dad puns. Like, to the point where it made us all uncomfortable Secretssssssss.

Name: Genital Jousting
Description:
Genital Jousting is an online and local multiplayer party game about flaccid penises and wiggly anuses for up to eight players at once. Players control a detached penis complete with testicles and an anus. Multiple game modes provide a stimulating orgy of objectives: penetrate and be penetrated as fast as possible or compete in absurd, silly and sexually suggestive games and challenges. New Story Mode Play as John, a dick who wants to find a date for his high school reunion. He'll need some help along the way. He's wobbly, he's soft. But he wants to be hard. So very hard. He wants to show everyone his astounding rigidity. And with your help, that's exactly what he'll do. Features If this is something that makes you uncomfortable or sounds unappealing, please do not purchase or play Genital Jousting, or even continue reading. Online and Local Multiplayer for Eight: Genital Jousting is more fun with friends and can satisfy up to eight players at once! Find a few willing partners, cuddle up on the couch, and share controllers or go online to joust with anonymous players from all over the world. Traditional and Party Modes: Dabble in the throbbingly fast-paced Traditional Mode or jostle your way through some stiff competition in Party Mode including challenges like Double Delight, Obstacle Intercourse, and Weiner Round Up. Customize Your Member: Genitals come in all shapes and sizes so pick your favorite color and decorate it with the most appealing outfit to customize a penis you can really get behind!

**Lust for Darkness: A Descent into Eldritch Horror and Forbidden Pleasures**

Prepare for **Lust for Darkness**, a sequel that dives deep into **erotic and occult themes**. The game starts when Jonathan Moon receives a mysterious letter from his wife, who disappeared a year ago. Following the letter's clues, he travels to a remote mansion. There, he discovers an **eldritch, occult ceremony** that opens a gateway to another dimension: the perverse realm of Lusst’ghaa.

The game masterfully blends exploration between two distinct realities. You'll navigate the eerie halls of a **Victorian mansion**, filled with secrets, and journey into **Lusst’ghaa**, a bizarre dimension inhabited by **otherworldly beings**. Lusst’ghaa's inhabitants once lived like us but chose a path of **complete degeneration**. Through extreme experiments, they transformed their bodies for endless carnal ecstasy. Today, Lusst’ghaa is a surreal world, overgrown with strange plants and filled with **monsters caught in perpetual pleasure**.

Key features include **dual reality exploration**, moving between the Victorian mansion and Lusst’ghaa. The world design is heavily inspired by **Lovecraft, Giger, and Zdzisław Beksiński**, offering a unique and disturbing aesthetic. You'll use **portal mechanics** to switch between realities and **uncover hidden items** to reveal side stories and the game's backstory. Be prepared for **survival horror elements** as you **escape the grotesque creatures** of Lusst’ghaa, all while enjoying an **original soundtrack** by **Draco Nared**.

Name: The Tower of Five Hearts
Description:
Story There are five continents of roughly-equal size, side-by-side, and all of them meet to an approximate point in the middle. At this meeting of borders, there is a tower: The Tower of Five Hearts. One Royal Family is in charge of upholding the peace for every continent, by marrying off their child to a prospective girl from one of the continents. It’s more of a contest-five girls trying to be Maids, in the hope that their master (the Prince) will fall in love with them... However this time, it’s a Princess . Features A cute and adorable yuri visual novel featuring kemonomimi (animal ears)! Play the role of a princess to find the girl meant for you! Over 10 Hscenes to explore! Multi-platform Support! (Windows, Mac, and Linux) Maids! --- Any future content for the game will be free dlc.

**Deep Space Waifu: FLAT JUSTICE** offers a unique, one-handed shmup adventure centered around **police women** and the mission to deliver **FLAT JUSTICE**. As part of the **F.A.T. (Fabulous Law Application Taskforce)**, your role is to save those in need from a corrupt alien police force. Join King Bear on an epic quest to restore dignity and, crucially, **find the perfect waifu**, all while giving the alien police a good thrashing.

This game is built for **easy, casual play**, even supporting **one-hand control**, making it accessible to all players. Beyond the fast-paced action, **Deep Space Waifu: FLAT JUSTICE** features **a real story** that unfolds as you play. Explore the **new gallery mode** to appreciate your achievements and the game's distinctive style, including the highly anticipated **OPPAIS**. Get ready for a wealth of features designed to keep you hooked:

*   **60 pieces of clothing** to destroy!
*   **40 milestones** for the perfect score!
*   **15 new corrupted cop enemies** to face.
*   **15 collectible cards**.
*   **12 women with unique poses** to discover.
*   **12 challenging stages** to master.
*   **10 unique boss fights** to conquer.
*   **6 power-ups** to boost your skills.
*   **5 new music tracks** to liven up the action.
*   **3 motorcycles** for cool rides.
*   **1 sneaky bear** for unexpected moments.

Enjoy your day, OFFICER!

## Unraveling the Chilling Mystery of Kara no Shojo: A Detective's Descent into Darkness

**Kara no Shojo** plunges you into a disturbing murder mystery, casting you as a private investigator tasked with solving a series of gruesome crimes. Your choices are **paramount**, directly shaping the narrative and its ultimate conclusion. As you delve deeper, unsettling diary entries will challenge your perception of reality and reveal hidden secrets.

The year is **March 1956**, and Tokyo is a city still healing from the ravages of war. In Inokashira Park, private investigator Tokisaka Reiji receives a cryptic request: "Look for something. Me. My true self." Simultaneously, a wave of brutal murders grips the city. Young women are vanishing, only to be found dismembered with their wombs violently removed. Detective Uozumi Kyoko, confronting this grim reality, seeks help from her old friend, Reiji.

Reiji's investigation leads him to Ouba Girls Academy, where his younger sister is enrolled. The mysterious disappearance of two students prompts the vice principal to enlist Reiji's aid. Posing as a substitute teacher to gather information discreetly, he encounters his initial client, Kuchiki Toko, who greets him with a distinctly boyish, "Heya - so we meet again, Mr. Detective."

As the body count rises, the search for missing students transforms into a far more complex and perilous situation. The alarming discrepancy between missing persons and unidentified bodies raises critical questions:

*   **Who will be the next victim?**
*   **How do these new cases connect to similar murders six years prior?**

Innocent Grey presents an original, psychologically charged murder mystery. **Your deductive reasoning is key** to unraveling the truth. Effectively utilizing clues meticulously documented in your notebook is paramount to piecing together this pulse-pounding mystery. The game features:

*   A **rich cast of over thirty meticulously designed characters**, each with unique visuals and distinct personalities, contributing to a complex tapestry of human drama.
*   Characters embodying diverse ideas and holding their own deeply ingrained thoughts and beliefs, weaving a narrative filled with intricate relationships, dramatic conflicts, and perplexing riddles.

You may find yourself stifling a scream or narrowly missing the perpetrator, but one thing is certain: this remarkable work of interactive storytelling should not be overlooked. Beneath the layers of tragedy, perhaps a single girl's smile awaits discovery. Key features include:

*   A **player-driven narrative**
*   An **extensive character roster**
*   An **intricate plot**
*   **Investigative gameplay**
*   **Psychological thriller elements** promising unexpected twists and turns.

**King of Phoenix**: A Comedic Adult Harem Dating Sim Set in Sunny Phoenix, Arizona.

Embark on a hilarious and sexy adventure as Dan Miller, a British journalist whose unexpected layover in Phoenix, Arizona, turns into an unforgettable experience. This comedic adult harem dating sim invites you to explore the vibrant city and discover what treasures await Dan. Will he find money, friendship, passion, or perhaps even waifus?

Immerse yourself in the sexiest layover known to man as you spend a few decadent days at a luxurious resort. Witness Dan's "Phoenix" rise through the ashes in a story filled with laughter and romance. The game features a hilarious and sexy storyline, brought to life by anime characters. Prepare for four possible endings, ensuring replayability and diverse outcomes.

You'll encounter plenty of "entertaining" CGs and have the opportunity to charm lovely waifus. To complete the experience, enjoy a sexy and very funky OST that perfectly complements the game's atmosphere.

**The Spirit Master of Retarnia - Conqueror of the Labyrinth: A Classic 3D Dungeon RPG**

Dive into an **epic adventure** with "The Spirit Master of Retarnia - Conqueror of the Labyrinth," a classic 3D dungeon RPG. This game masterfully combines **charming anime aesthetics** with **deep gameplay mechanics**, inviting you to explore vast dungeons, engage in **thrilling monster battles**, and collect an **abundance of loot**, including **powerful Artifacts**, to enhance your heroines.

The story unfolds in the Kingdom of Retarnia, a land that has known **five centuries of tranquility**. This peace is shattered by the sudden appearance of portals to the Demon World, unleashing a horde of **malevolent creatures intent on conquest**. To combat this threat, you'll follow the journey of Leonard, a descendant of the legendary "Spirit Master of Retarnia." Five hundred years ago, this hero, alongside five powerful spirits—Norn (White), Vesta (Red), Rusalka (Blue), Melissa (Green), and Iris (Black)—**successfully repelled a similar demonic invasion** and sealed the portals. Now, at the behest of Queen Sylvia, Leonard must venture into the Demon World to **protect his homeland**.

"The Spirit Master of Retarnia" offers a **rich RPG experience**. Navigate through numerous dungeons, encountering and battling a **variety of monsters**. Success in these encounters yields a **wealth of gear**, from common items to **rare Artifacts**, crucial for empowering your heroines. Be warned, however, as **defeat in battle carries consequences** for your party members. **Strategic preparation is key**; stocking up on essential potions and goods will be vital for survival. The game emphasizes **character progression and customization**, allowing you to level up and tailor your team to your preferred playstyle. Ultimately, the fate of Retarnia rests on your ability to **face down fearsome monsters** and **restore peace to the kingdom**.

Welcome to Camp Bearfoot, a **remote wilderness** where your group has been unexpectedly stranded. For seven days, you and three other campers will face the **unpredictable elements of nature**. Without any supplies and no immediate prospect of rescue, your group's ability to survive the week in the wild will be tested.

This interactive story offers a unique experience with several key features:

*   **Character Selection:** Choose to play as either a male or female protagonist.
*   **Engaging Storyline:** Experience a narrative that blends **lighthearted moments** with **increasing tension** as the days pass.
*   **Character Dynamics:** Explore a **same-sex relationship subplot** between two of the female campers, with the potential for romance.

As one player observed, "The story skillfully weaves together humor and drama, making you care about what happens to the characters." Get ready for a week filled with unexpected challenges, where **survival is the main goal** and relationships may develop under pressure.

Grand Theft Auto V on PC delivers an unparalleled open-world adventure in Los Santos and Blaine County, boasting significant enhancements for PC gamers. This version allows players to immerse themselves in the game's stunning environments at resolutions up to 4K and beyond, all while enjoying fluid gameplay at a silky-smooth 60 frames per second.

### Tailored PC Experience

The PC edition of Grand Theft Auto V is packed with extensive customization options, allowing players to fine-tune their experience. "Players can fine-tune over 25 settings for texture quality, shaders, tessellation, and anti-aliasing," according to Rockstar Games. Furthermore, mouse and keyboard controls are fully supported and can be highly customized to suit individual playstyles.

### Dynamic World Control and Display Flexibility

Players have the power to shape the bustling streets of Los Santos with a population density slider, which controls both car and pedestrian traffic. The game also offers impressive display flexibility, supporting dual and triple monitor setups, 3D compatibility, and seamless plug-and-play controller functionality.

### Grand Theft Auto Online Included

Grand Theft Auto V for PC comes complete with Grand Theft Auto Online, supporting up to 30 players and two spectators. All existing gameplay upgrades and content, including the highly popular Heists and Adversary modes, are seamlessly integrated.

### Immersive First Person Mode

A groundbreaking addition to the PC version is the First Person Mode, offering an entirely new perspective on the richly detailed world of Los Santos and Blaine County. This mode allows players to experience the game's environments and action with a heightened sense of immersion.

### The Powerful Rockstar Editor

The Rockstar Editor is a robust suite of tools designed for capturing, editing, and sharing your most memorable gameplay moments.

#### Director Mode: Unleash Your Creativity

Director Mode empowers players to craft their own cinematic scenes. You can utilize story characters, pedestrians, and even animals to bring your visions to life. Advanced camera controls, editing effects such as slow motion, and a variety of camera filters are at your disposal. "Players can add their own music from GTAV radio stations or dynamically adjust the game's score," providing ultimate creative freedom.

#### Effortless Sharing

Once your masterpiece is complete, you can upload your videos directly from the Rockstar Editor to YouTube and the Rockstar Games Social Club, making it easy to share your creations with the world.

### Fresh Audio Experiences

The PC version introduces new radio stations to enhance the in-game audio landscape. The Lab FM, hosted by The Alchemist and Oh No, features original music inspired by the game's soundtrack, with contributions from artists like Earl Sweatshirt and Freddie Gibbs.
