For those who prefer their own tunes, Self Radio allows players to enjoy their custom soundtracks while cruising through Los Santos.

*Special access content requires a Rockstar Games Social Club account. Visit for details.*

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Portal 2 builds upon the acclaimed gameplay, narrative, and music of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and a dedicated fanbase. This sequel introduces a vibrant cast of new characters, innovative puzzle mechanics, and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. Players will venture into uncharted sections of the Aperture Science Labs and reconnect with GLaDOS, the memorable, albeit sometimes dangerous, AI from the original game.

The game also features a distinct two-player cooperative mode. This mode boasts its own unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new playable characters, fundamentally altering how players approach portal-based puzzles. Success in this mode hinges on not only working together but also thinking collaboratively.

As one reviewer noted, "Portal 2 truly expands on the genius of the original, offering both a compelling solo journey and a brilliantly designed cooperative experience." The game's advanced physics engine enables the creation of novel challenges, resulting in a larger, yet accessible, gameplay experience. The original soundtrack also returns, enhancing the immersive atmosphere. The original Portal was widely recognized, with over 30 publications naming it Game of the Year in 2007. Furthermore, Portal 2 will include editing tools, empowering players to create and share their own challenges.

**Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas** immerses players in the chaotic environment of Los Santos, a city struggling with gang violence, widespread drug problems, and deep-seated corruption. This vast urban setting, where the wealthy try to ignore the harsh realities of the streets, forms the stage for a grand story.

The narrative focuses on Carl "CJ" Johnson. He returns to his old neighborhood after being away for five years. A personal tragedy pulls him back: his mother is murdered, and his family begins to fall apart. When CJ arrives, he discovers his childhood friends are close to losing everything. His return becomes even more dangerous when corrupt police officers wrongly blame him for a murder.

This false accusation sends CJ on a dangerous journey across the entire state of San Andreas. He has two main goals: to **bring his broken family back together and keep them safe**, and to **regain control of the city's unstable streets**. The game requires players to make important choices as they guide CJ through this dangerous world. These decisions will determine CJ's future and the outcome for San Andreas.

As one critic noted, the game "captures the gritty atmosphere of a city on the edge." Another source highlighted the narrative's depth, stating, "CJ's quest for justice and family is a compelling hook." The developers aimed to create a world that felt both expansive and deeply personal.

Name: Undertale
Description:
Welcome to UNDERTALE. In this RPG, you control a human who falls underground into the world of monsters. Now you must find your way out... or stay trapped forever. ((Healthy Dog's Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.)) features: Killing is unnecessary: negotiate out of danger using the unique battle system. Time your attacks for extra damage, then dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters. Original art and soundtrack brimming with personality. Soulful, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor. Created mostly by one person. Become friends with all of the bosses! At least 5 dogs. You can date a skeleton. Hmmm... now there are 6 dogs...? Maybe you won't want to date the skeleton. I thought I found a 7th dog, but it was actually just the 3rd dog. If you play this game, can you count the dogs for me...? I'm not good at it.

Name: Team Fortress 2
Description:
The most fun you can have online - PC Gamer Is now FREE! There’s no catch! Play as much as you want, as long as you like! The most highly-rated free game of all time! One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills. New to TF? Don’t sweat it! No matter what your style and experience, we’ve got a character for you. Detailed training and offline practice modes will help you hone your skills before jumping into one of TF2’s many game modes, including Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, King of the Hill and more. Make a character your own! There are hundreds of weapons, hats and more to collect, craft, buy and trade. Tweak your favorite class to suit your gameplay style and personal taste. You don’t need to pay to win—virtually all of the items in the Mann Co. Store can also be found in-game.

Embark on **"The Longest Journey,"** a **critically acclaimed graphical adventure game** that plunges players into an **epic narrative**. You will assume the role of **April Ryan**, a young woman burdened with the **monumental task of traversing parallel universes**. This grand quest is a **true odyssey of discovery**, characterized by **extensive exploration**, **intricate puzzles**, **unforgettable characters**, and **formidable adversaries**.

This **immersive experience** is designed to **challenge your intellect and bravery**. As you progress, you will **learn, evolve, and live out an adventure that stands apart**. The game's **ambitious scope** is evident in its design, featuring **over 150 unique locations** meticulously crafted across **two richly detailed worlds**. Players will engage with a **diverse cast of more than 70 speaking characters**, immersing themselves in **over 40 hours of compelling gameplay**. The journey is further enriched by **over 20 minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered cinematics** and a **breathtaking, cinematic musical score**, as noted by game critics.

## Slay the Princess: A Twisted Fairy Tale Where the World Hangs in the Balance

In the **darkly enchanting** game *Slay the Princess*, you are tasked with a **grim and vital mission**: slay the Princess to save the world. This is no ordinary quest. The Princess is a **master manipulator**, employing **charm and deceit** to lure you into failure. Should you fall for her **cunning tricks**, you will face death, **repeatedly**. This emphasizes the **critical importance** of maintaining focus on your objective. The game's core premise is **stark and clear**: the fate of the world rests entirely on your ability to **resist her influence** and **complete your task**.

*Slay the Princess* distinguishes itself through several **remarkable features**. The **stellar voice acting** by Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight breathes **vibrant life** into the narrative. Abby Howard's **artistic, hand-penciled graphics** craft a **visually striking world**, with each background and character meticulously rendered. Unlike many narrative games, *Slay the Princess* boasts a **dynamic branching story** where your decisions have **real consequences**. Importantly, there are **no time loops**; time progresses forward, ensuring that **each playthrough offers a fresh and unique experience**. The game skillfully blends **choice-driven psychological horror** with **light RPG elements**. Its developers proudly state that it "**redefines the visual novel genre**" through its **intense narrative** and the **ever-present threat of world-ending disaster**, delivering a truly **compelling and immersive adventure**.

## Portal: A Unique Puzzle Game

**Portal™**, by Valve, is a revolutionary single-player game that changes the puzzle genre. Set in the mysterious **Aperture Science Laboratories**, it offers a **unique puzzle experience**. This game will challenge how you think and provide many hours of fun.

The main part of Portal is its **new way to solve spatial puzzles**. Like the Gravity Gun in Half-Life® 2 changed how you used objects, Portal makes you think differently about your surroundings. Your main tool is the **Portal Gun**. It can create two connected portals. Placing these portals carefully is important to solve **complex puzzles** and move through difficult areas. This new system lets you move yourself and objects in **unexpected ways**, making for a **fresh and exciting game**.

**Bayonetta is Now Available on PC: Experience Stylish Witchcraft and Intense Combat**

The highly anticipated PC release of PlatinumGames' acclaimed action title, **Bayonetta**, is finally here! SEGA has officially launched the game, bringing its signature **stylish combat** and **fast-paced battles** to a whole new audience. Directed by the legendary **Hideki Kamiya** (known for *Resident Evil* and *Devil May Cry*), the game puts you in the shoes of **Bayonetta**, the last of an ancient witch lineage. Her mission: to maintain the delicate balance between light, dark, and chaos. After a **500-year slumber**, her awakening sets in motion events that will **dramatically alter the world**. With her memories gone, Bayonetta must battle **angels** and **massive enemies** to protect the future and uncover the truth behind her return.

This PC version of Bayonetta offers a **refined experience** with features specifically designed for the platform. The **combat system is exceptionally fluid and responsive**, allowing players to unleash **complex combos** and **devastating special attacks** with a wide array of weapons. Bayonetta's **supernatural powers**, including the **time-slowing "Witch Time"** and her **brutal torture attacks**, are crucial for her combat prowess. The game integrates seamlessly with Steam, offering features like **Achievements, Cloud Saves, Trading Cards, Leaderboards, and Big Picture Mode**. Furthermore, the PC port boasts **significant graphical customization options**, supporting resolutions up to **4K**, advanced anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, and adjustable texture and shadow settings. You can also choose between **English and Japanese audio and text**. For the ultimate gameplay experience, a **controller is highly recommended**.

Name: Disco Elysium - The Final Cut
Description:
Disco Elysium - The Final Cut is the definitive edition of the groundbreaking role playing game. You’re a detective with a unique skill system at your disposal and a whole city block to carve your path across. Interrogate unforgettable characters, crack murders, or take bribes. Become a hero or an absolute disaster of a human being. Full voice acting. All of the city's beautiful people are brought to life with full English voiceover. Play characters against each other, try to help them, or fall hopelessly in love as each word is spoken to you with the appropriate accent and emotion. New political vision quests. Face the reality of your worldview as your political compass leads you down new paths. Discover more citizens, a whole extra area, and monumental sights as you leave an even bigger mark on the world by chasing your dreams. Unprecedented freedom of choice​. Intimidate, sweet-talk, resort to violence, write poetry, sing karaoke, dance like a beast, or solve the meaning of life. Disco Elysium - The Final Cut is the most faithful representation of desktop role playing ever attempted in video games. Countless tools for role playing. ​ Mix and match from 24 wildly different skills. Develop a personal style with over 80 clothing items. Wield 14 tools from guns to flashlights to a boombox, or pour yourself a cocktail of 6 different psychoactive substances. Develop your character even further with 60 wild ​thoughts ​to think – with the detective's Thought Cabinet. A revolutionary dialogue system with unforgettable characters. ​The world is alive with real people, not extras. Ask probing questions, make insightful observations, or express your wildest desires as you play cop or something completely different. Disco Elysium's revolutionary dialogue system lets you do almost anything. Carve your unique path across the city​. Explore, manipulate, collect tare, or become a millionaire in an open world unlike anything you've seen before. The city of Revachol is yours for the taking, one small piece at a time. From the streets to the beaches – and beyond. Hard boiled, hard core. ​Death, sex, taxes, and disco – nothing is off the table. Revachol is a real place with real challenges. Solve a massive murder investigation, or relax and kick back with sprawling side-cases. The detective decides, the citizens abide.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

Mass Effect 2 (2010)

Two years after Commander Shepard's heroic defense against the Reaper invasion, a new, **terrifying threat** has emerged. Entire human colonies are disappearing, abducted by an unknown enemy. To face this danger, Shepard must **reluctantly ally with Cerberus**, a shadowy group committed to human survival at any cost. This **critical mission** requires assembling the galaxy's **finest team** and commanding the most **powerful ship** ever built. Despite doubts, Shepard is determined to succeed.

The game builds on its predecessor by emphasizing player choice. **Dialogue decisions significantly shape the narrative**, enhanced by a dynamic camera for a cinematic feel. Shepard can now **interrupt conversations**, influencing events to aid or endanger the mission. **Character customization is also expanded**, allowing players to meticulously design their Commander Shepard, from appearance to class and attitude.

Missions feature an **improved battle system** with precise targeting of enemy weak points and dismemberment. The objective is to lead your team to victory against the enigmatic Collectors, but **failure and death are real possibilities**. This choice defines your journey in BioWare's acclaimed title, Mass Effect 2.

As IGN noted, "The success or failure of this mission hinges on the crew you assemble and their loyalty." This highlights the **crucial importance of building a trustworthy team**. Mass Effect 2 boasts **stunning graphics** and a refined dialogue system for deep immersion. Enhancements to the **intense, third-person shooter combat** offer a more engaging experience, while extensive character customization lets you **forge your unique Commander Shepard**.

**Online Disclaimer:** Accessing online features requires an EA ACCOUNT, registration with a serial code, an internet connection, and acceptance of the End User License Agreement. EA's online terms are available at WWW.EA.COM. Users must be 13+ to register for an EA account. EA may provide updates at no extra charge, and online features may be retired with 30 days' notice posted on WWW.EA.COM.

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe: A Deep Dive into an Award-Winning RPG**

Experience one of the most acclaimed role-playing games of all time with The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe. This enhanced version invites you into a richly detailed and vibrant world, offering unparalleled freedom in gameplay. Whether you choose to follow the main quest at your own pace or forge your own path through its expansive landscapes, Oblivion delivers an immersive adventure. The Game of the Year edition notably includes the Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansions, significantly broadening the already vast world with new quests and content. Critics lauded Oblivion as the Best Game of 2006, a testament to its groundbreaking design.

**Unleash Your Imagination and Master New Combat**

Oblivion allows you to create and embody any character imaginable, from a valiant warrior to a cunning assassin or a wise sorcerer. The game revolutionizes first-person combat and magic with an all-new system that intensifies every encounter. Furthermore, Oblivion's groundbreaking Radiant AI system imbues its non-player characters with realistic 24/7 schedules and the autonomy to make their own decisions based on their environment. These characters eat, sleep, and pursue their own objectives independently, creating a truly dynamic world.

**Explore Uncharted Territories and Face Formidable Foes**

The Shivering Isles expansion transports players to a surreal realm crafted in the image of the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This new land is dramatically divided between Mania and Dementia, presenting an experience unlike anything previously encountered in Oblivion. Prepare to confront a host of challenging new enemies, including hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, and amphibious Grummites, among many others that inhabit this unique dimension.

**Rebuild a Disbanded Order and Discover Lost Treasures**

In the Knights of the Nine expansion, players are tasked with restoring the glory of a long-disbanded faction. Embark on an epic questline that spans the far reaches of Cyrodiil, uncovering new dungeons, characters, and mysteries. This English-only Deluxe version also bundles several downloadable content packs, enhancing your gameplay experience. These include the Fighter's Stronghold Expansion, offering a lavish castle for noble warriors; the Spell Tome Treasures, providing a variety of new spells; the Vile Lair, an underwater sanctuary for evil characters; Mehrune's Razor, a powerful weapon found in a challenging dungeon; The Thieves Den, a pirate ship hideout for stealth-based characters; the Wizard's Tower, a magical spire for sorcerers; the Orrery, a Mages Guild quest to unlock celestial secrets; and the Horse Armor Pack, adding cosmetic protection for your steed.

**Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition: A Deep Dive into Classic RPG Roots**

Embark on an epic journey back to the core of what makes role-playing games so compelling with *Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition*. This critically acclaimed title invites you to assemble your party, engage in thoughtful discussions with companions, and dive into a world brimming with opportunities for exploration and interaction. As a fledgling Source Hunter, your primary mission is to cleanse the land of those who wield forbidden magic. What begins as a seemingly straightforward murder investigation quickly spirals into a grand conspiracy that threatens the very fabric of existence.

The *Enhanced Edition* represents a significant overhaul, boasting thousands of improvements. Players will experience a fully revamped world with complete voiceovers, introducing new game modes, robust controller support, and seamless split-screen co-op. The narrative has been expanded with hours of new and revised story content, culminating in a brand-new ending. Furthermore, the game introduces fresh weapon styles, skills, puzzles, and enemies, all while enhancing loot systems and game balancing for an even more refined experience.

**Diverse Game Modes for Every Player**

*Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition* caters to a wide spectrum of players with its innovative game modes. For those who prioritize narrative, **Explorer Mode** offers a story-focused RPG experience. **Classic Mode** provides the quintessential *Divinity* gameplay, finely tuned for optimal enjoyment. **Tactician Mode** is designed for the hardcore strategist, featuring meticulously reworked encounters, devious traps, and more intelligent enemy AI. Finally, **Honour Mode** challenges the most dedicated tactical geniuses with permadeath and a single save file.

**Unparalleled Freedom and Environmental Interaction**

True to its pen-and-paper RPG inspirations, *Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition* grants players an astonishing degree of freedom. Explore a multitude of diverse environments, confront a vast array of fantastical creatures, and unearth countless valuable items. The game's engine allows for unprecedented environmental manipulation. Combine skills and spells to overcome your adversaries in ingenious ways. For instance, you can warm ice to create water, boil that water to generate a steam cloud, and then electrify the steam cloud to create a static field that stuns your enemies.

**Cooperative Play and Deep Storytelling**

Experience the rich world of *Divinity* with a friend through online co-op multiplayer or enjoy the convenience of dynamic split-screen play. Together, you will unravel a deep and epic narrative set in the nascent days of the *Divinity* universe. Engage in crucial discussions with your party members, shaping the course of the story through your collective decisions. The classless character creation system empowers you to design your hero precisely as you envision. Coupled with endless item interaction and combination possibilities, the game offers unparalleled freedom for exploration and experimentation.

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition: An Unforgettable RPG Experience**

Step into **one of the greatest RPGs ever created** with The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition. This definitive version offers an unparalleled journey into a **richly detailed and vibrant game-world**. Experience a powerful blend of **freeform gameplay and stunning graphics**, allowing you to progress through the main quest at your own pace or forge your own path by exploring the expansive world and discovering unique challenges.

This Game of the Year Edition includes two major expansions: Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles. These add **significant new quests and content**, further enriching the already massive world of Oblivion. Discover why critics hailed Oblivion as the **Best Game of 2006**.

**Key Features That Define Oblivion:**

*   **Live Another Life in Another World:** Design and embody any character you can envision, from a **valiant warrior** to a **cunning assassin** or a **wise sorcerer**.
*   **Intense First-Person Combat and Magic:** A revolutionary combat and magic system elevates first-person role-playing, delivering an **unprecedented level of intensity** where every strike and spell feels impactful.
*   **Groundbreaking Radiant AI:** Oblivion's characters are brought to life with **Radiant AI**, featuring full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make independent decisions based on their environment. Witness NPCs who **eat, sleep, and pursue their own objectives** autonomously.

**Explore New Realms and Face Formidable Foes:**

*   **Shivering Isles Expansion:** Venture into a surreal new world crafted in the image of the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This realm is dramatically divided between **Mania and Dementia**, offering an experience unlike anything you've encountered before in Oblivion.
*   **Challenging New Enemies:** Confront the diverse and **terrifying inhabitants of the Shivering Isles**. Prepare to battle hideous insects, formidable Flesh Atronachs, shambling skeletal creatures, amphibious Grummites, and many more dangerous foes.
*   **Knights of the Nine Expansion:** The legendary Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Embark on an **epic quest line** that spans the far reaches of Cyrodiil, as you strive to **restore their former glory** and reclaim their legacy.

Prepare for an **epic confrontation** in Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition), a game where the fate of the galaxy hangs precariously in the balance. As Commander Shepard, your mission is to assemble your most **trusted allies** and recruit the galaxy's **finest warriors** to stand against the relentless invasion of the Reapers. This is not a mission for the faint of heart; it demands **immense sacrifices** and will push you to make **difficult choices** against **new and formidable enemies**. Arm yourself for an **unforgettable intergalactic adventure** that will test your resolve.

Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition) offers a wealth of features designed to enhance your gameplay experience. **Shift the tide of battle** in your favor with a **streamlined inventory system** that allows for the **instant equipping of powerful new weapons**. Furthermore, an **improved health regeneration system** significantly reduces the need to search for restorative items, allowing you to stay in the fight longer. **Every decision you make carries weight**. Beyond managing **divisive crew members**, you will also be thrust into the complex arena of **intergalactic diplomacy**. Time is of the essence, so don't hesitate to utilize **new prompt-based actions** that enable you to interrupt conversations, potentially altering the destiny of your crew and the entire galaxy. **Forge alliances with strategic care**. While you will fight alongside your most **loyal companions**, the opportunity to recruit **new talent** will also arise. Choose your new partners **wisely**, as the **survival of the galaxy rests squarely on your shoulders**.

This comprehensive edition of Mass Effect 2 (2010) includes **all previously released downloadable content (DLC)**, ensuring a complete and immersive experience. According to the game's developers, the **expansions included** are: Kasumi — Stolen Memory, Overlord, Lair of the Shadow Broker, and Arrival. Additionally, the **Cerberus Network content** features the Normandy Crash Site expansion, Zaeed — The Price of Revenge expansion, and the Firewalker Pack. The **Cerberus Weapon and Armor pack** contains the **Cerberus Assault Armor** and the **M-22 Eviscerator shotgun**. Further content is available through various **packs and bundles**. The **Aegis Pack** features the **M-29 Incisor sniper rifle** and the **Kestrel armor**. The **Equalizer Pack** includes the **Capacitor Helmet**, **Archon Visor**, and **Inferno Armor**. The **Firepower Pack** offers the **M-5 Phalanx heavy pistol**, **M-96 Mattock heavy rifle**, and **Geth Plasma Shotgun**. **Alternate Appearance Pack 1** provides new outfits for **Garrus, Thane, and Jack**, while **Alternate Appearance Pack 2** grants new outfits for **Tali, Grunt, and Miranda**. The **Collectors’ Weapon and Armor pack** contains **Collector Armor** and the **Collector Assault Rifle**. The **Terminus Weapon and Armor pack** includes **Terminus Assault Armor** and the **M-490 Blackstorm heavy weapon**. The **Mass Effect 2 promo bundle** features the **Umbra Visor**, **Sentry Interface**, and **Recon Hood**. Finally, the **Blood Dragon Armor** is also included.

Name: Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition
Description:
The Divine is dead. The Void approaches. And the powers lying dormant within you are soon to awaken. The battle for Divinity has begun. Choose wisely and trust sparingly; darkness lurks within every heart. Who will you be? A flesh-eating Elf, an Imperial Lizard or an Undead, risen from the grave? Discover how the world reacts differently to who - or what - you are. It’s time for a new Divinity! Gather your party and develop relationships with your companions. Blast your opponents in deep, tactical, turn-based combat. Use the environment as a weapon, use height to your advantage, and manipulate the elements themselves to seal your victory. Ascend as the god that Rivellon so desperately needs. Explore the vast and layered world of Rivellon alone or in a party of up to 4 players in drop-in/drop-out cooperative play. Go anywhere, unleash your imagination, and explore endless ways to interact with the world. Beyond Rivellon, there’s more to explore in the brand-new PvP and Game Master modes. Choose your race and origin. Choose from 6 unique origin characters with their own backgrounds and quests, or create your own as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or Undead. All choices have consequences. Unlimited freedom to explore and experiment . Go anywhere, talk to anyone, and interact with everything! Kill any NPC without sacrificing your progress, and speak to every animal. Even ghosts might be hiding a secret or two… The next generation of turn-based combat. Blast your opponents with elemental combinations. Use height to your advantage. Master over 200 skills in 12 skill schools. But beware - the game’s AI 2.0 is our most devious invention to date. Up to 4 player online and split-screen multiplayer. Play with your friends online or in local split-screen with full controller support. Game Master Mode: Take your adventures to the next level and craft your own stories with the Game Master Mode. Download fan-made campaigns and mods from Steam Workshop. 4K Support: an Ultimate 4K experience pushing RPGs into a new era!

**Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition: Your Definitive Thedas Adventure Awaits**

Step into the world of *Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition* and become a Grey Warden fighting to save a world on the edge of ruin. As one of the **last of this legendary order**, your mission is to face an **ancient evil returning** while your kingdom is torn apart by internal strife. You are the **hero chosen to heal the land** and defeat the archdemon, a creature of immense power. This award-winning game, with **over 50 major awards**, including more than 30 'Best of 2009' honors, lets you **explore a detailed world**, face **difficult moral choices**, and battle **terrifying monsters**.

The *Ultimate Edition* includes the **Awakening Expansion Pack**, which **continues the Grey Warden story**. In this expansion, you become the **commander of the Grey Wardens**, facing **new enemies**, gaining **new skills**, and exploring the **new region of Amaranthine**. This complete package also includes **all nine downloadable content packs**: *The Stone Prisoner*, *Warden's Keep*, *Return to Ostagar*, *Feastday Gifts*, *The Darkspawn Chronicles*, *Feastday Pranks*, *Leliana's Song*, *The Golems of Amgarrak*, and *Witch Hunt*. These add **useful new items**, **unforgettable allies**, and **deepen your experience** in the vast *Dragon Age* world.

## Crusader Kings III: Forge Your Medieval Dynasty Through Grand Strategy and Roleplaying

**Crusader Kings III** is a grand strategy game where you **choose your noble house and guide your dynasty through generations of medieval ambition**. Developed by Paradox Development Studio, it offers an immersive experience that masterfully blends **deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying with intricate grand strategy**. As one game designer, Henrik Fåhraeus, stated, "We wanted to create a game where players could truly live out their own medieval sagas."

While warfare is a potent tool for establishing your reign, true mastery of the Middle Ages demands far more. Success hinges on **expert diplomatic skill, a profound understanding of your realm's intricacies, and a healthy dose of cunning**. Crusader Kings III challenges you to navigate a complex web of relationships, political maneuvering, and personal ambition.

Begin your saga in either **867 or 1066**, taking command of your chosen house. **Expand your dynasty by claiming lands, titles, and vassals**, meticulously building a realm worthy of your royal bloodline. Your death is merely a transition; your lineage continues with new playable heirs, whose destinies you will shape, whether through careful planning or unexpected circumstances.

Explore a sprawling, simulated world teeming with a diverse cast of characters. From humble peasants and valiant knights to scheming courtiers, clandestine spies, witty jesters, and those engaged in secret love affairs, **every individual plays a role in your grand narrative**. Engage with this extensive array of historical figures through romance, betrayal, execution, or subtle influence.

Embark on an epic journey across a **vast medieval map** that stretches from the snow-swept Nordic lands to the vibrant Horn of Africa, and from the western British Isles to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. **Claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires**, each presenting its own challenges and opportunities.

Every character in Crusader Kings III is larger than life, possessing **unique traits and lifestyle choices** that profoundly influence their actions and schemes. Rule with an iron fist, inspiring fear and dread, or cultivate a reputation for magnanimous deeds to earn the devotion of your subjects.

Genetics play a vital role, with traits like genius or crippling stupidity being passed down through generations. **Carefully groom your heir**, selecting appropriate guardians or undertaking their education yourself. If an heir proves inadequate, you have the option to arrange a strategic marriage or, if necessary, remove them through other means.

**Personalize your ruler and noble house**, from their appearance to their core attributes, crafting a monarch who embodies both inherited virtues and personal vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm, granting titles to those you deem worthy, or boldly usurp your liege to claim their crown for yourself.

Be perpetually wary of rivals, whether they are restless serfs or vengeful concubines. The shadows are alive with intrigue, and danger lurks around every corner. **Recruit agents and other unsavory elements to undermine, blackmail, or even murder** those who stand in your path. Alternatively, embrace the romantic ideal and seduce your way to power and influence.

Prepare for conflict as you assemble **formidable men-at-arms units and powerful knights**. Master battlefield tactics and manage your armies effectively. Raid and plunder nearby lands, or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your most significant conflicts.

Embrace piety to invite the support of religious powers, or forge your own unique faith as you navigate the eternal struggle between everlasting fame and eternal damnation. **Drive novel innovations within your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions** to bolster the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm.

The paths to power are as varied as the characters themselves. Experience **thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions**, meticulously tailored to every conceivable situation and character. Ultimately, there are countless ways to secure your place in the annals of history.

**HEX: Shards of Fate: A Digital Card Game That Merges TCG Strategy with RPG Progression**

HEX: Shards of Fate is a unique digital card game that blends the strategic depth of trading card games (TCGs) with the character progression found in role-playing games (RPGs). Players step into the world of Entrath, where they can tackle challenging dungeons and engage in player-versus-player battles. This combination offers a fresh experience for fans of both tactical card play and RPG elements.

The core of the game involves building strong decks using over 1,000 unique cards. Success in battles is further enhanced by acquiring powerful equipment and using socketing gems to customize cards. Players can also select from various champions, each possessing special abilities, to bolster their armies and refine their strategies. The game's lively animations and visual effects contribute to an engaging match experience.

One player highlighted the game's distinctive approach, stating, "HEX really stands out by merging the thrill of TCGs with the depth of RPGs." This fusion creates a compelling experience for a wide range of players.

**Key Features of HEX: Shards of Fate:**

*   **Innovative TCG/RPG Hybrid:** HEX is a groundbreaking digital trading card game that smoothly integrates role-playing mechanics for a new kind of gameplay.
*   **Deep Champion Customization:** Players can choose and customize their champion from eight races and three classes, each offering different strategic benefits.
*   **Compelling Single-Player Campaign:** Embark on an epic adventure through challenging dungeons in the engaging single-player campaign.
*   **Intense Multiplayer Battles:** Test your strategic skills in competitive 1 vs. 1 matches against other players.
*   **Vibrant Player Economy:** Engage in a dynamic player-driven economy where you can trade cards with others.
*   **Exciting Tournament Play:** Compete for prizes in daily tournaments, which can include up to 128 participants. These tournaments offer a rewarding challenge for skilled players.

**Duelyst: A Strategic Card Game with Deep Tactics**

Duelyst is a **strategic collectible card game** that combines deep tactics with fast-paced combat. The game focuses on smart choices and careful unit placement on a moving board. Games are quick, usually lasting **five to ten minutes**, perfect for players wanting competitive fun without a big time sink. A key part of Duelyst's draw is its rewarding progress. New units arrive **every month**, keeping the game fresh and encouraging new ways to play.

With **over 800 cards** across six Factions, players have many ways to build decks and plan strategies. You can improve your decks in online ranked games or join fun draft tournaments. Duelyst's "Infinite Depth" means **unit position is vital**. With **over 500 unique units**, every match is a new tactical puzzle. Duelyst also features a cool **"Classic Pixel Art Aesthetic"**. Generals and Cards have detailed art, and spells have bright 16-bit effects. The game also has **"Immersive Lore"** about a 30,000-year history in the world of Mythron. This story, plus its competitive play, makes Duelyst a truly special game.

Name: Faeria
Description:
With its unique living board, Faeria will challenge you with truly strategic card battles. Craft your deck, shape the battlefield, and fight for victory! A strategy game like no other. Build exciting decks and shape the battlefield as you fight epic battles. Raise mountains, build forests, fill lakes, or harness the sands of the deserts. You choose your own path to victory. Earn your collection through our simple and affordable DLC-based business model. Experience a card game without expensive micro-transactions. Whether through solo campaigns, draft mode, or PVP, all cards are earned through simply playing the game! Enjoy 100+ hours of solo content, co-operative missions, and puzzles! Explore a vast array of challenges that reward you in return. Journey through the Oversky and defeat devious World Bosses - or even play enemy AI in draft mode! Enter Pandora, Faeria's unique draft mode where your deck-building skills are put to the ultimate test. Choose to play against the AI or put your deck to the ultimate test in PVP. Earn rewards based on how well you do. It’s the perfect way to increase your collection, or just have fun! Become a part of our thriving, supportive, and helpful community by joining our official Discord channel, subreddit, forums - or join The Hub! Years in the making, you’ll be hard-pressed to find a more welcoming group of players. Compete in regular officially-recognized tournaments with great prizes - or watch them live and win in-game loot! Our esports system rewards players for excellent performance and allows everyone else to watch, enjoy, and gain free loot!

**KARDS: The WWII Card Game - A Strategic Blend of CCG and Battlefield Tactics**

KARDS, the World War II card game, merges traditional collectible card game (CCG) gameplay with innovative mechanics inspired by classic strategy games and real battlefield tactics. Engage in grand-scale warfare across land, air, and sea as you challenge other players. KARDS is completely free to play, with all features accessible from the outset. You can acquire all cards through regular gameplay, daily missions, and an extensive achievement system.

**Why Play KARDS?**

KARDS offers a compelling experience by blending familiar trading card gameplay, making it easy to learn, with innovative mechanics that provide strategic depth and tactical diversity.

*   **Innovative Frontline Mechanics:** This feature allows you to better protect your support assets while taking the battle directly to your enemy.
*   **Diverse Strategies:** Employ Blitzkrieg tactics to overwhelm opponents, achieve air superiority, or establish a strong defense to outproduce and outgun them.
*   **Resource Management:** Effectively manage your resources (Kredits) to deploy new units, operate existing ones, and issue orders to support your battle plans.

**Strategy and Deck Building**

Your deck is built around one of the five major powers of WW2, allowing you to compete head-to-head with other players. Each deck can include one ally nation for added support and an edge against the opposition. Players craft their decks based on a combination of units and supporting orders, depending on their chosen winning strategy.

*   **Infantry:** Overrun opponents with lighter, often less costly units.
*   **Tanks:** Blitz your opponent with heavily armored units.
*   **Artillery:** Blast opponents from the safety of your support line.
*   **Aircraft:** Achieve air superiority and wreak havoc from the sky.

Advance through the ranks from Private to Field Marshal via gameplay, earning your place in the officer's club and monthly rewards.

**Authentic Atmosphere**

All cards are beautifully illustrated in a unique WW2 style. Weapons and units are meticulously researched, behaving as expected based on official documentation, specifications, and operational history.

**Regular Updates and Events**

With a vibrant player community and active developers, KARDS consistently receives exciting new gameplay features and improvements. The first expansion, released on December 10th, introduced two new ally nations and 150 cards. Since then, several more expansions and updates with new cards, game mechanics, and visuals have been released. The World Championship, hosted by 1939 Games in Iceland, took place in December 2019 and 2021, bringing the four finalists to compete for the title.

**About 1939 Games**

1939 Games is a creative indie studio based in Iceland. Founded by ex-CCP veterans known for creating EVE Online, 1939 Games aims to make a significant impact on the market with KARDS, their unique and groundbreaking WWII CCG.

GWENT: The Witcher Card Game invites players into the rich Witcher universe with a free-to-play collectible card game (CCG) experience. This title merges elements of CCGs and trading card games (TCGs), challenging players with fast-paced online PvP duels that demand bluffing, real-time decision-making, and careful deck construction.

The game's core mechanics revolve around strategic card play across two rows: melee and ranged. The objective is to outscore your opponent by accumulating more points within a round. Victory is achieved by winning two out of three rounds. While the rules are straightforward, mastering GWENT requires significant strategic foresight.

Key features that enhance the GWENT experience include:

*   **Iconic Characters and Abilities:** Players can collect and deploy beloved characters such as Geralt and Yennefer, augmenting their decks with powerful spells and unique abilities to influence battles.
*   **Strategic Depth:** GWENT emphasizes skill through its unique round-based gameplay, offering a wealth of strategic possibilities and rewarding clever tactics and deception.
*   **Diverse Game Modes:** The game offers various ways to play, from quick online matches with friends and competitive PvP challenges to engaging adventure modes like the Arena.
*   **Fair Progression System:** A rewarding progression system allows players to build a strong card collection solely through gameplay, ensuring a fair and accessible experience without hidden costs.
*   **Stunning Presentation:** GWENT boasts beautiful, hand-drawn artwork and captivating visual effects that bring its cards, battles, and environments to life, creating a visually immersive experience.
*   **Immediate Engagement:** Players begin with 10 cards, enabling immediate strategic choices regarding playing powerful units early or conserving them for later in the match.

Experience the strategic depth and engaging world of GWENT: The Witcher Card Game for free.

Name: Card Hunter
Description:
Welcome, bold adventurer! Card Hunter is an online collectible card game which blends together card play, deck building, tactical combat and fantasy role-playing in a way you've never seen before. Grab your cards, miniatures, dice and snacks, then journey to a new world of adventure on the tabletop of your Game Master, Gary. Build your party and set forth on a grand adventure in the massive single-player campaign. Each adventure will challenge your deck-building skills and tactical prowess as you battle horrifying Black Oozes, savage War Monkeys and more. Amass a collection of fantastical swords, shields and other adventuring gear. In Card Hunter's unique deck building system, equipping your party with these items builds your deck for you. Enter the fray on a grid based battlefield. Prepare for turn-based strategy where you must play your cards right to defeat your foes and be rewarded with experience and loot. When you’re ready, challenge other players in casual games, ranked matches or regularly scheduled leagues. Can you rise to the top of this month’s season? Can you and your undead minions triumph in the Graveyard Gambol league? Multiplayer Card Hunter is a never-ending challenge. Don't want to face the monsters alone? Adventure co-operatively with one or two friends and share the dangers of Cardhuntria as well as the rewards. When you're done with the huge core campaign, try out the adventures of Omin, Binwin and Jim from Acquisitions Incorporated with an exclusive story written by Penny Arcade's Jerry Holkins. Then get ready for when robots and insane computers invade in the all new Expedition to the Sky Citadel set. Or, if you prefer your monsters from the murky mists of time, brave the challenge of prehistoric monsters and intelligent weapons in the fiendish Attack of the Artifacts .

**Etherlords II: A New Chapter in the Ether Saga**

Embark on an epic adventure in Etherlords II, returning to the captivating world of Ether. This installment plunges you into a realm brimming with extraordinary beauty and perilous challenges. Guide your hero through an unforgettable quest to unravel a profound mystery.

Etherlords II masterfully blends role-playing elements with strategic, turn-based combat, drawing inspiration from the rich traditions of fantasy trading card games. Experience thrilling co-op battles online, including the unique "Round Table" mode – a round-robin elimination tournament featuring a randomized card set.

**Key Features of Etherlords II:**

*   **Expansive Campaigns:** Explore five distinct campaigns set within a magnificent fantasy world.
*   **Unlimited Tactical Depth:** Hundreds of spells and creatures offer nearly endless tactical combinations.
*   **New Threats and Powers:** Discover new monsters and magic accessible to all four races.
*   **Hero Progression:** Enhance your hero's skills with new spells, creatures, and abilities throughout each campaign.
*   **Non-Linear Missions:** Navigate missions with multiple paths, allowing for diverse approaches to completion.
*   **Comprehensive Tutorial:** A thorough tutorial system guides you through both basic and advanced dueling tactics.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Engage in four distinct multiplayer modes.
*   **Master Server:** A dedicated master server tracks and maintains your statistics and ratings.

**Etherlords** is a celebrated strategy game where four distinct races of wizards, each mastering a unique school of magic, engage in a fierce struggle for global supremacy. Developed by Nival, this iconic title achieved bestseller status worldwide and garnered exceptional reviews from critics.

Etherlords masterfully blends **turn-based strategy** with the engaging mechanics of a **fantasy trading card game**. Its groundbreaking gameplay innovations laid the foundation for many contemporary titles within this genre.

**Key Features of Etherlords:**

*   **Four distinct races** of magical beings, each boasting unique lands, architecture, spells, and strategic approaches.
*   **Two battle campaigns** for each pair of allied races, offering diverse challenges.
*   An expansive collection of **over 300 spells**, encompassing sorcery, battle magic, summoning, and rituals.
*   More than **10 interconnected game levels**, all woven together by a compelling storyline.
*   A roster of **64 heroes** from all races, whose parameters, special abilities, and chosen skills evolve with each level gained.
*   Each hero possesses an **individual battle style**, customizable through their unique spell sets.
*   A strategic fusion of a **magical battle system** inspired by tabletop games and the **strategic management of resources**.
*   Experience **full 3D turn-based battles** that offer an almost limitless array of tactical decision-making opportunities.

Get ready for a **new Magic: The Gathering experience** with Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013! This new game takes you to different worlds, where you'll face **tougher challenges**, **stronger enemies**, and **clever puzzles**.

A big new feature is the **Planechase multiplayer mode**. You can play with up to three friends or computer opponents. After you get better, you'll face the **main boss: the dragon Planeswalker, Nicol Bolas**.

Magic 2013 has ten **decks you can change**. You'll find new things to unlock, and for skilled players, you can **decide which lands to use** when casting spells.

The game looks and sounds better, with the latest cards. You can play the Planechase mode, fighting across many worlds and dealing with changing game areas. Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 has ten different decks with cards from recent sets, including a first look at the **Magic 2013 Core Set**. Each deck also has 30 extra cards to unlock. You'll find special puzzle challenges where opponents use set decks to show off their tactics. You can change your decks and choose which lands to tap for more strategy. With a better tutorial, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 has something for **everyone**, from new players to experts.

Name: Magic: The Gathering - Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012
Description:
All-new and redesigned, Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 takes last year’s massive hit game to even greater heights with better graphics, more options, and new challenges! Face off against the AI, or gather your allies for the new multiplayer format: Archenemy, where you team up to take down a boss opponent. And if one of your fellow Planeswalkers drops out, no problem–the AI will drop in for uninterrupted action! Featuring ten unique decks, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 also lets you customize those decks. As you progress in the game, you can enhance your deck by swapping in new, unlockable cards! Gather your allies. A challenge awaits.

Name: Slay the Spire
Description:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire! Features Dynamic Deck Building : Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top. An Ever-changing Spire : Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses! Powerful Relics to Discover : Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold... Slay the Spire left Early Access and comes with: Four characters that each have their own unique set of cards. 350+ fully implemented cards. 200+ different items to be found. 50+ unique combat encounters. 50+ mysterious events that can help or harm you. Daily Climbs allow you to compare yourself with every other player in the world. Custom mode that allows mixing and matching various crazy run modifiers.

Name: Monster Slayers
Description:
Developed by Nerdook (Reverse Crawl, Vertical Drop Heroes), Monster Slayers is a complete reimagining of the free web-based hit of the same name, which has been played over 4 million times on gaming portal, Kongregate. A rogue-like deck-building RPG adventure, Monster Slayers uses an innovative card-based battle system and lets you customize a deck to suit your play style. Create a new hero to join the Monster Slayers Guild and choose your path through the perilous Northern Valley as you follow your quest to defeat the legendary Harbinger and become a true Monster Slayer. Features Battle undead goblins, lion outlaws, mighty dragons and other monstrous foes using a unique card-based combat system Strategically shape your deck as you acquire new cards from merchants, treasure chests, and allies Collect fame from each run to unlock new abilities that can be used by future heroes Every playthrough is different: levels, enemy encounters and loot are randomly generated Choose from six different classes: Rogue, Ranger, Knight, Barbarian, Cleric, Wizard Recruit companions to join you on your quest and make use of their special abilities Equip your hero with stat-boosting loot to improve the chances of victory Fight for your place at the top of the Monster Slayers leaderboards Inspired by the much-loved deck-building RPG, Dream Quest, created by Peter Whalen (Hearthstone)

In Monster Train, hell has frozen over, and you are the last hope to defend the final burning pyre from heavenly forces and restore the inferno. This game offers a fresh strategic approach to roguelike deck building, featuring three vertical playfields that you must protect.

To reclaim hell, you must empower yourself by visiting powerful locations. Carefully choose your path, as different locations provide distinct advantages. You can upgrade your champion to enhance their abilities, recruit powerful units to add new allies, and upgrade cards to improve your deck's effectiveness. You can also gain passive bonuses for persistent advantages and duplicate cards to secure your favorites for future use.

**Strategize to Fit Your Playstyle**

With five distinct clans, each offering unique and surprising gameplay, you can tailor your strategy. Select a primary and supporting clan to access cards from both. During your journey, you can refine your cards by combining upgrades, unlocking new paths to victory. Special map nodes even allow you to duplicate your most potent cards before facing the final boss.

**No Two Playthroughs Are Alike**

You'll never build the same deck twice! The game boasts over 220 cards, 10 different starter decks, and 5 monster clans, each with vastly different gameplay. Each clan has 10 unlockable levels, introducing new cards and multiple upgrades for your clan-specific champion. Mod support is available via Steam Workshop, and you can upgrade any card twice. More than 21 unique random events and 25 covenant (difficulty) levels ensure endless replayability.

**Multiplayer Modes**

*   **HELL RUSH:** Eight players engage in a fast-paced, real-time contest. All players start with identical resources and opponents, ensuring a fair playing field. The clock is ticking, testing who can make the best decisions under pressure. Only the swiftest can remain undefeated.
*   **DAILY CHALLENGE:** Tackle a new, heavily modified run each day with unique gameplay mutators. Compete globally and against friends, climbing leaderboards with a skill-based scoring system.
*   **CUSTOM CHALLENGE:** Design and share your own unique challenges with friends. Each custom challenge features its own leaderboard, allowing you to send your friends straight to hell.

**Content Updates**

*   **FRIENDS & FOES UPDATE:** Exiled champions return to battle heaven's forces. This major update introduces new champions, bosses, cards, and artifacts, significantly expanding strategic options and replayability. It also adds player-requested features like a personal run records page, an enemy wave counter, and previews of upcoming bosses.
*   **WILD MUTATIONS UPDATE:** This update adds 35 new mutators, new difficulty settings for experienced players, and simpler ways to challenge friends and the community.
*   **HERZAL'S WORKSHOP UPDATE:** Mod support is now available! As one developer noted, "Mod support is a huge addition that opens up a world of possibilities for our players."

Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles offers a fresh take on deck-building roguelikes by replacing cards with dice and introducing a unique dual "damage" system: **Purification** and **Corruption**. Your primary objective is to assemble a potent dice pool to **cleanse Astrea of its corruption** and safeguard the Star System.

The game's central innovation is its novel "damage" system. **Purification** can be used offensively against foes or defensively to restore your health. Conversely, **Corruption** can inflict harm upon you or, intriguingly, heal enemies. You can opt to pacify adversaries with Purification or strategically **Corrupt yourself to unlock powerful, game-altering abilities**. As the game itself states, "Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales." Astrea also features a dynamic Health Bar where skills are directly linked to your current health, allowing you to leverage Corruption to enable them. However, excessive Corruption carries the risk of consuming your character.

Instead of traditional cards, you will construct and manage a dice pool tailored to your preferred playstyle. With over **350 dice** available, categorized as safe, balanced, and risky, the game promotes a **high-risk, high-reward approach**. You can personalize your experience by editing die faces, introducing new actions, and increasing the probability of achieving powerful outcomes.

Select from **six distinct Brave Oracles**, each possessing unique dice sets, inherent abilities, and playstyles. Whether you favor strategic spellcasters or aggressive berserkers, an oracle awaits you. Enhance your Oracle with the assistance of **20 upgradeable Support Sentinels**, which provide beneficial dice rolls. The game also incorporates over **170 modifying Blessings**, offering unique passive effects that can profoundly alter your strategies. These range from less potent Star Blessings to powerful Black Hole Blessings, which often come with considerable drawbacks.

Astrea presents over **20 random events** that can significantly impact a run. You can influence enemies and shape your destiny, as adversaries attack with their own dice, presenting opportunities to affect their actions. For a precisely calibrated challenge, Astrea offers **16 distinct difficulty levels**.

The game's narrative unfolds in a world where ancient ruins allude to once-flourishing civilizations guided by a mystical star. Devoted disciples, the Six-Sided Oracles, were blessed by this celestial body, imbuing relics with divine gifts. This golden age concluded with the Crimson Dawn Cataclysm, an inferno that devastated the star system and corrupted souls. The original disciples vanished, their creations scattered. The game poses the question, "Could there still exist those who were capable of wielding their power?" Eons later, descendants of the Six-Sided Oracles embark on a quest to complete their predecessors' struggle and protect their star system.

**Gordian Quest** invites you to a world shrouded in a sinister curse, where darkness reigns, monsters roam, and chaos thrives. As a deckbuilding RPG inspired by classics like Ultima and D&D, it blends nostalgic charm with modern roguelite elements and strategic turn-based combat. Your mission is to lead a party of heroes, fostering their growth, unlocking new skills, and confronting the ultimate evil plaguing the land of Wrendia.

The game offers diverse modes to suit your playstyle. Embark on a grand narrative in **Campaign Mode**, spanning four acts from Westmire to the Sky Imperium. For a dynamic roguelite challenge, **Realm Mode** presents shifting worlds and unique rewards across five distinct realms, or test your limits in an endless mode. **Adventure Mode** provides procedurally generated end-game content with challenging solo quests, while **Skirmish Mode** allows for thrilling 1v1 battles against friends.

**Gordian Quest** features a roster of ten unique heroes, each with distinct classes, skills, and playstyles, including the Swordhand, Cleric, Ranger, Scoundrel, Spellbinder, Druid, Bard, Warlock, Golemancer, and Monk. You can assemble a party of three and equip them with hundreds of skills, nearly 800 passive and active abilities, and a vast array of weapons, armor, and enchanted trinkets. High replayability is guaranteed through procedurally generated maps, randomized hero skills, and various difficulty levels, from hardcore permadeath to casual modes. An Artifacts system provides carryover rewards and progression, ensuring your efforts are always beneficial. Ultimately, the fate of your adventure rests on your critical decisions and the unpredictable nature of dice rolls.

**Griftlands** is a **deck-building rogue-like** set in a **gritty sci-fi world** where your choices **significantly shape the narrative**. Every decision, from the jobs you accept and allies you gather to the cards you acquire, carries weight. This demanding game offers little forgiveness for errors, but each playthrough presents **fresh challenges and strategic opportunities**, creating a compelling journey.

The game features **three distinct playable characters**, each with their own story. Sal pursues riches and vengeance, while Rook undertakes a covert spy mission. Smith, who initially appears idle, can rise to heroism. Each character begins in a different region, confronting **varied factions and exploring diverse locales**.

Core gameplay revolves around **challenging boss encounters**. Players face these formidable foes using **personalized combat decks**. Assembling a strong team is crucial, involving recruiting mercenaries, acquiring loyal companions, or securing aid from allies. **Skillful management of your card collection is paramount**, as each character possesses unique negotiation and combat decks. Powerful item cards can be obtained from vanquished foes or as quest rewards.

The game strongly highlights **repercussions**. Eliminating enemies may result in **reprisals from their associates**. Conversely, showing leniency might allow a danger to persist. Navigating Havaria, a world featuring **perilous, hand-drawn landscapes**, is central to the experience. **Strategic political engagement is also vital**. Each character aligns with a faction, and these groups hold differing views on your actions. **Careful management of inter-group relations is essential** for advancement and to prevent treachery. You can opt for direct confrontation or astute negotiation, both demanding **adept card play and tactical thinking**. The game prompts you to **harmonize two separate decks**, leveraging their respective strengths and weaknesses. Griftlands rewards players who **dedicate time to understanding its mechanics**. Each attempt at its interwoven stories introduces new adversaries, objectives, and occurrences. Ultimately, your decisions, combined with a degree of fortune, will determine your fate.

Name: Floppy Knights
Description:
Hello there, humans. It is me, Carlton! Phoebe’s most trusted friend and super cool robot arm. I am here to tell you just a little bit more about Phoebe and her latest invention: Floppy Knights! Who is Phoebe, you ask? She is a talented inventor with a mission: save up enough cash to finally move out of her parents’ place. There are plenty of odd jobs all over town but only one Phoebe - and that is where the Floppy Knights come in! There are a bunch of Floppy Knights you can pick from to determine your own style. It will be up to you to mix and match snazzy card combos to make a winning strategy. Turn-based tactics meet card-game strategy. A fresh take on two familiar genres! Lead your Knights to victory across the battlefield using decks you have crafted with care. Enter a vibrant world filled with retro tech and magic. Jump into a fantastical land with hand-drawn visuals by Marlowe Dobbe (Dicey Dungeons), featuring lush vegetation, treacherous volcanoes, icy caves, and foggy forests. Find your Floppy fighting style! Every unit has a unique playstyle and ability to generate special cards during battle, creating endless possibilities. Each deck of Floppy Knights represents a different faction and strategy: Plants Deck - Upgrade your abilities, heal allies, and gain terrain advantages. Monsters Deck - Add armor and trade HP for buffs. Hooligans Deck - Three words: sneaky, poisonous, fast. Plan the perfect draw. Whether you’re a tactics veteran or playing for the first time - snappy battles and numerous card combinations will keep you on your toes to find the perfect strategy. Take advantage of cards that add and flip complementary cards so you can execute seamless combos. Jam out to some toe-tapping tunes. Listen to the energetic and refreshingly retro soundtrack by Grahm Nesbitt (Garden Story) that will have you dancing across the battlefield!

**One Step From Eden: A Unique Roguelike Adventure**

*One Step From Eden* is a **unique roguelike adventure** that masterfully blends strategic deck-building with **fast-paced, real-time action**. Set in a bleak, post-war world, the game centers on the sanctuary of Eden, humanity's last hope. Players navigate this **challenging environment**, making **critical choices** that determine whether they become a force for good or destruction. Whether embarking on a solo journey or teaming up with a friend in co-op, players will cast **powerful spells** during intense bullet-hell combat, confront **formidable enemies**, and acquire items that **dynamically alter their gameplay**. The ultimate objective is to reach Eden, but the path is **fraught with peril**, and success is **far from guaranteed**.

This game masterfully merges genres, demanding both **careful strategic planning** and **immediate, real-time combat reflexes**. As one player aptly described it, "The core of the game is building a strong deck and then surviving intense bullet-hell situations on your way to Eden." The developers at **Neverbloom Games** have packed *One Step From Eden* with **extensive customization options**.

Here's a breakdown of the game's depth:

*   **Nine distinct characters**, each with unique abilities.
*   Over **200 spells** to discover and utilize.
*   More than **100 items** that can significantly reshape your deck and strategy.

The roguelike nature of *One Step From Eden* ensures **high replayability**. Levels are randomly generated, and the variety of approaches to each run means that every playthrough offers a **fresh and exciting experience**. For those seeking a competitive edge, the game includes:

*   Local co-op.
*   Player-versus-player modes.

Furthermore, **Neverbloom Games** has fostered a **vibrant community** by adding support for Steam Workshop and mods, allowing the game to continuously evolve and expand. This commitment to ongoing development, as highlighted by **Neverbloom Games**' active community engagement, ensures *One Step From Eden* remains a **dynamic and engaging experience** for players.

In **Ratropolis**, you'll lead a rat settlement through a blend of roguelite, deck-building, and tower defense gameplay. Your main goal is to **protect your growing city** from constant waves of enemies. The ultimate aim is to build the greatest "Ratropolis" and become a legend.

The game has **deep strategy**, with over 500 cards in categories like economy, building, military, and skills. You start with a small deck of 8 cards. As the developers say, "**A strong deck is vital**" for protecting your rats. You can add, remove, and improve cards to create a deck that fits your play style.

Defending your city is tough, but special advisers can help. They offer expert advice on finance, defense, or leadership, giving you key support and unlocking new tactics when needed. If your city falls, your current game ends. But you'll unlock new cards and abilities, making each new attempt a **new and changing challenge**. The developers encourage you to "**Lead Ratropolis to victory and save your Ratizens!**"

**Key Features:**

*   **Unique Gameplay:** Enjoy a real-time deck-building card game that mixes roguelite and tower defense.
*   **Fast-Paced Action:** Experience quick gameplay that demands fast choices.
*   **High Replay Value:** Easy to learn, but offers deep mastery for lasting fun.
*   **Varied Events:** Over 100 unique random events make each game different.
*   **Large Card Pool:** Unlock over 500 cards to boost your strategy.
*   **Different Endings:** Shape your story with 6 possible outcomes.
*   **Unique Leaders:** Control 6 distinct leaders, each with a different way to play.
*   **Cute Style:** Enjoy the charming look of adorable rats.

**The Knight Witch: A Spellbinding Metroidvania Adventure**

*The Knight Witch* offers a unique Metroidvania experience, blending **powerful spellcasting** with **thrilling combat**. Players will explore the world of Dungeonidas, facing **formidable enemies** and strategically choosing between **potent magic** or their **weapons and wits**. The Knight Witches are renowned for their **exceptional flight**, **combat prowess**, and **reality-bending magic**.

The game's core design centers on a duality, merging **shooting mechanics** with a **diverse array of spell cards**. This allows players to forge their own distinct playstyle through various upgrades. You can enhance Knight skills for a faster, shmup-like feel, or boost your magic and delve into a **deckbuilding system** featuring over **30 unique spell cards** for another path to mastery.

Your journey through Dungeonidas is not solitary; your actions **directly impact its inhabitants**. The Knight Witches draw strength from the **trust they cultivate with the people**. Earning this favor presents **moral quandaries**. The game challenges players to consider whether they will **compromise their integrity for popularity** or **remain steadfast in their principles**. This crucial choice rests entirely with the player.

Developed with **accessibility** in mind, *The Knight Witch* includes features such as:

*   An 'auto-aim' system
*   'Cheats' to modify gameplay
*   Clear story navigation

These options empower players to **customize their experience** to suit their preferences.

This title comes from a development team with a notable pedigree, having contributed to acclaimed games like *RiME*, *Moonlighter*, and *Plants VS Zombies*. As one developer stated, "We aimed to create a Metroidvania that felt both familiar and innovative, with a strong emphasis on **player agency and accessibility**."

Experience the unparalleled freedom of **Grand Theft Auto V on PC**, immersing yourself in the sprawling, vibrant metropolis of Los Santos and the rugged landscapes of Blaine County. This definitive PC version delivers breathtaking visual fidelity, supporting resolutions up to **4K and beyond**, all while maintaining a silky-smooth **60 frames per second** gameplay experience. Beyond its stunning presentation, the PC edition offers an **extensive array of customization options**, empowering you to meticulously fine-tune every aspect of your adventure to your exact preferences.

At the heart of Grand Theft Auto V's compelling narrative are three vastly different protagonists: a **young street hustler**, a **retired bank robber**, and a **terrifying psychopath**. Their lives converge as they become deeply entangled with the perilous criminal underworld, the shadowy machinations of the U.S. government, and the glitz and glamour of the entertainment industry. To navigate this treacherous environment where trust is a rare commodity, they must meticulously plan and execute a series of **audacious heists**.

The PC version elevates your gameplay with a suite of exclusive features designed for maximum immersion and control. **Graphics and Performance** are pushed to new heights with resolutions up to 4K and beyond, coupled with a fluid 60 frames per second frame rate. You can further personalize your visual experience with **over 25 configurable settings**, allowing adjustments to texture quality, shaders, tessellation, and anti-aliasing. For **Controls**, enjoy extensive mouse and keyboard customization, alongside seamless plug-and-play controller support. **World Immersion** is enhanced through a population density slider to adjust traffic and pedestrian flow, dual and triple monitor support, and 3D compatibility.

Grand Theft Auto V for PC also seamlessly integrates **Grand Theft Auto Online**, a dynamic multiplayer world supporting up to 30 players and two spectators. This robust online component encompasses all existing gameplay updates and content released by Rockstar Games, including the highly acclaimed **Heists and Adversary modes**, ensuring endless opportunities for cooperative and competitive play.

A groundbreaking addition to the PC experience is the introduction of **First Person Mode**, offering an entirely new and deeply immersive perspective on the meticulously detailed world of Los Santos and Blaine County. This mode fundamentally changes how you interact with the environment and its inhabitants.

Furthermore, the PC release proudly presents the **Rockstar Editor**, a powerful and intuitive toolset that allows you to capture, edit, and share your most memorable gameplay moments. Key features of the Rockstar Editor include **Director Mode**, enabling you to stage custom scenes using story characters, pedestrians, and animals; **Advanced Editing** capabilities with camera manipulation, speed adjustments (fast/slow motion), and a variety of camera filters; **Soundtrack Integration**, allowing you to incorporate music from GTAV's radio stations or dynamically control the game's score; and **Easy Sharing** options to upload your completed videos directly to YouTube and the Rockstar Games Social Club.

The game's audio landscape is further enriched by a brand-new radio station, **The Lab FM**, expertly hosted by The Alchemist and Oh No. This station features exclusive new music inspired by the game's soundtrack, with contributions from acclaimed artists such as Earl Sweatshirt, Freddie Gibbs, and Little Dragon. Additionally, players can personalize their in-game audio experience through **Self Radio**, a dedicated station for custom soundtracks.

Please note that access to certain special content requires a Rockstar Games Social Club account. Visit for more detailed information.

**The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim** is an **epic fantasy adventure** that redefines the open-world genre. Developed by Bethesda Game Studios, the creators of the award-winning 2006 and 2008 titles, Skyrim invites you to **explore a vast, living world** filled with endless possibilities.

**Experience unparalleled freedom** as you **live another life in another world**. Create any character you can imagine and pursue any path you desire. The legendary choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls are brought to life like never before.

Powered by a **brand-new graphics and gameplay engine**, Skyrim presents a **stunningly realized virtual world**. Traverse rolling landscapes, from **rugged mountains and lush fields** to **bustling cities and ancient dungeons**.

**Define your destiny** through your actions. With **hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities** at your disposal, the new character system allows you to play exactly how you want.

Prepare to **battle ancient dragons** in ways you've never imagined. As the **Dragonborn**, you will **uncover their secrets and master their incredible power**.

**Embark on an Unforgettable Journey in The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe**

Dive into the critically acclaimed world of **The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe**, a definitive role-playing experience that offers unparalleled freedom and immersion. This edition presents one of the greatest RPGs ever created, featuring a **richly detailed and vibrant game world** brought to life with stunning graphics and expansive, freeform gameplay. You have the ultimate choice: pursue the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast open world to forge your own unique path. As one critic aptly noted, Oblivion offers "a world that feels truly alive."

This comprehensive Game of the Year edition includes two major expansions, **Knights of the Nine** and **Shivering Isles**, adding a wealth of new quests and extensive content that further enriches the already massive world. Discover why Oblivion was lauded as the **Best Game of 2006**.

**Key Features That Define Oblivion:**

*   **Forge Your Own Destiny:** Create and play **any character imaginable**, from a noble warrior to a cunning assassin or wise sorcerer.
*   **Intense First-Person Combat:** Experience an **all-new system** for first-person melee and magic, delivering visceral combat that makes you feel every blow and spell.
