*   **Enemy Manipulation:** A key mechanic involves **manipulating enemies**. Since they attack using their own dice, you can influence their rolls to alter their intended actions.

Astrea provides **16 difficulty levels** to test your abilities against escalating challenges.

### Lore and Setting

Astrea's lore unfolds in a time when ancient ruins were once thriving civilizations, living in harmony under a mystical star. Loyal disciples, the Six-Sided Oracles, were blessed by this star, gaining the power to seal celestial gifts within mystic relics. This balance was shattered by the Crimson Dawn Cataclysm, an inferno that descended from the sky, destroying societal foundations and corrupting souls. The original disciples were lost, their creations scattered. Eons later, descendants of these Oracles embark on a quest to complete their predecessors' unfinished battle and save their star system.

Embark on a **deckbuilding RPG adventure** in Gordian Quest, a game that blends classic inspirations with modern roguelite elements. A dark curse has fallen upon the land, and monsters roam freely. Villains are exploiting the chaos, and heroes are desperately needed to lead a party on a dangerous journey to save the world and defeat the source of the evil. Your Gordian Quest begins now.

Gordian Quest combines the **strategic depth** of games like Ultima and Dungeons & Dragons with the **replayability** of modern roguelites. You will build and manage parties of heroes, guiding them through challenging missions in **turn-based combat**. Foster relationships between your heroes, help them learn new skills, and work to break the curses plaguing the lands. The game offers several modes: **Campaign Mode** spans four Acts to save Wrendia; **Realm Mode** provides a quick roguelite experience in a dynamic world; **Adventure Mode** allows exploration of random areas or solo challenges; and **Skirmish Mode** features exciting 1v1 battles.

The game features ten unique heroes, each with their own class, skills, and playstyle. These include the Swordhand, Cleric, Ranger, Scoundrel, Spellbinder, Druid, Bard, Warlock, Golemancer, and Monk. You will form parties of three heroes for your quests and can discover nearly 800 passive and active skills for turn-based fights. This variety allows for extensive experimentation with tactics and the creation of **powerful combat combinations**. Hero progression is detailed, enabling you to upgrade heroes, teach them new abilities, and equip them with weapons, armor, and magical items. **High replayability** is ensured by randomly generated maps and dungeons, along with random hero skills. You will collect items and relics to enhance hero abilities. Future updates will introduce special items with beneficial or detrimental effects. The Artifacts system offers lasting rewards and progress across all game modes. Gordian Quest also includes various difficulty settings to accommodate different playstyles, including a **hardcore mode with permadeath**. The game also incorporates significant choices and dice rolls that greatly influence the story and your progress.

Ratropolis is a unique real-time strategy game that blends roguelite, deck-building, and tower defense mechanics. Your mission is to guide a small rat settlement to safety, defending your citizens from a constant barrage of predators and monstrous creatures. The ultimate goal is to build the grandest 'Ratropolis' and secure your place in rat history.

To achieve victory, you will command an extensive arsenal of over 500 cards. These cards are categorized into strategic areas:

*   **Economy:** Manage resources and generate income.
*   **Building:** Construct defenses and essential structures.
*   **Military:** Deploy units and engage enemies.
*   **Skills:** Utilize special abilities and buffs.

This diverse card selection allows for deep tactical control. Each leader begins with a basic deck of 8 cards. **Developing an efficient deck is essential** for protecting your rat population from relentless enemy waves. You have the ability to add, remove, and upgrade cards to create a deck befitting a true leader.

Defending your burgeoning city presents a considerable challenge. Fortunately, you can seek assistance from advisers specializing in finance, defense, or leadership. These advisers offer crucial support and improved options when chaos inevitably erupts. While the fall of your city signifies the end of a campaign, it also marks the beginning of a new one. With each playthrough, you will unlock new cards, **broadening your strategic options** and ensuring that every defense offers a fresh and engaging experience. Lead Ratropolis to triumph and save your Ratizens from impending destruction!

**Key Features of Ratropolis:**

*   **Innovative Gameplay:** Experience a real-time deck-building card game that seamlessly integrates roguelite and tower defense elements. This unique combination provides an unparalleled gameplay experience.
*   **Engaging Pace:** Ratropolis offers highly engaging and rapid gameplay that requires quick decision-making and decisive actions.
*   **High Replayability:** While easy to learn, mastering Ratropolis presents a significant and rewarding challenge.
*   **Numerous Events:** Navigate over 100 random decision events that guarantee a new experience with every playthrough.
*   **Extensive Card Collection:** Unlock a wealth of new features and cards, empowering you to grow stronger after each game.
*   **Multiple Endings:** Forge your own path with six distinct endings, offering a true choose-your-own-adventure experience.
*   **Diverse Leaders:** Command six unique leaders, each with their own distinct play style and traits.
*   **Charming Protagonists:** Lead adorable rats to glory, a refreshing departure from typical adversaries.

## Master Tactical Combat and Deck-Building in Ashe with Trials of Fire

Dive into a challenging deck-building adventure set in the ruined fantasy world of Ashe with *Trials of Fire*. This tactical game requires strategic thinking and tough choices, preparing you for **brutal combat** and a harsh wasteland. *Trials of Fire* combines overworld exploration with multi-character combat and a loot-driven deck-building system, offering **fresh strategies** with every playthrough.

The game features **9 distinct playable heroes**, each with unique skills and playstyles. Players can choose from **4 game modes**, plus **1 seasonal quest**. Uncover Ashe's secrets through **4 lore quests**. The core gameplay includes a vast collection of **345 skill cards** and **220 items**, with **42 legendary items** that can greatly change your combat approach. You'll face **294 narrative encounters**, **56 unique enemy types**, and **14 formidable bosses**. Explore the large map to find **40 landmarks**.

Combat in *Trials of Fire* involves commanding your three heroes by strategically playing their cards, turning each fight into a tactical puzzle. The synergy between their individual decks creates **ever-evolving challenges**, demanding careful planning. Survival depends on strategic movement and positioning, using card synergies to effectively combine hero abilities.

Beyond battle, your party's gear is vital. Outside of combat, you can freely swap or upgrade hero loadouts, including weapons and items. Finding new, powerful equipment is key as you explore Ashe, a **perilous quest for survival**. Traverse a vast map, charting a unique adventure where each journey truly lives up to the game's title, a "Trial." As one player noted, "the game constantly forces you to adapt your strategy." Critics agree, observing that *Trials of Fire* encourages players to "think several steps ahead," ensuring that "every decision matters."

**Hand of Fate 2: Master a Living Board Game in a Dark Fantasy World**

In **Hand of Fate 2**, you step into the role of a dungeon crawler on a grim fantasy adventure. The game's core is a **dynamic board game** that changes with your choices. Each quest is built from a custom deck of legendary encounters you create. Your decisions are crucial, as the enigmatic **Dealer** controls your fate, shaping you into an instrument of his revenge. Though the game has grown, the ultimate stakes remain **life or death**.

The game's strategic depth, particularly its deck-building, is a standout feature.

**Key Gameplay Features:**

*   **Evolved Setting:** A hundred years after the Dealer's first defeat, a new guardian oversees the Game of Life and Death.
*   **Varied Challenges:** Test your deck-building skills across 22 unique scenarios. These can range from hunting assassins and arranging romantic reunions to defending against invaders.
*   **Companion System:** You can recruit allies to help in combat or to strategically affect the board game.
*   **Abundant New Content:** Find and improve hundreds of new encounters, powerful artifacts, and useful items.
*   **Improved Action-RPG Combat:** Engage in fluid combat using a variety of weapons, from quick dual daggers to heavy hammers. Build your combo meter to unleash powerful special moves. The action-RPG combat is fluid and rewarding, especially when chaining special moves.
*   **New Enemies and Card Types:** Confront disciplined Imperial troops, mutated creatures, and northern raiders, each linked to new card suits.

**Dicey Dungeons: A Roguelike Where Luck is Your Biggest Obstacle**

Embark on an adventure as a **walking dice** in **Dicey Dungeons**, a deckbuilding roguelike. Your goal is to battle through a changing dungeon and escape the **whims of Lady Luck**. This game, from Terry Cavanagh (creator of **Super Hexagon** and **VVVVVV**), Chipzel, and Marlowe Dobbe, offers a strategic and quick experience.

In **Dicey Dungeons**, you'll fight monsters, find loot, level up, and maybe even face the **Goddess of Fortune, Lady Luck**. The gameplay balances **careful plans** with the randomness of dice rolls.

**Six Unique Classes to Play:**

*   **The Warrior:** A direct fighter.
*   **The Thief:** **Steals enemy gear** each turn.
*   **The Robot:** Plays a **blackjack game** for dice.
*   **The Inventor:** **Destroys their own gear** for parts.
*   **The Jester:** Adds chaos to fights.
*   **The Witch:** Uses magic with a unique style.

Master each class in this **charming world** full of **surprises**.

**Many Challenges Await:**

*   **Dozens of enemies:** Including **Vacuum Cleaners**, creatures from **Irish myths**, and **snowmen**.
*   **Random dungeons:** For **endless replayability**.

The game features a **catchy soundtrack** by **Chipzel** (known for **Super Hexagon**). The **artwork by Marlowe Dobbe** is also **beautiful and cute**.

**Check out 'Dicey Dungeons: Reunion'**, a **free DLC** with six new episodes. You can also find the **Reunion OST on Bandcamp!** Can you survive? Remember, **luck is not on your side.**

Name: Wildfrost
Description:
The sun has frozen over... The world has succumbed to the Wildfrost. Now only Snowdwell and its survivors stand as the last bastion against an eternal winter... Build up a deck of powerful card companions and elemental items, as you battle to banish the frost once and for all! Perfect your card battling and deck-building skills, and set out on a quest to bring an end to The Wildfrost! Begin each journey with your chosen tribe Leader, each gifted with different randomised skills and stats, before mapping out your chosen path into the unforgiving frosty landscape. Rescue and recruit frozen companions you find along the way, unearth lost treasures, and spend your hard-earned blings with travelling merchants. The decisions you make and routes you take during each run will help craft a powerful deck, unique to you each time you play. Collect a huge array of cute, but mighty card companions, as well as handy items and clunker cards to aid you in battle. Experiment with different elemental card combinations to find your winning formula. Your companion cards aren’t just disposable minions for dealing out damage; upgrade and customise your favourites by adding wobbly charms to enhance their powers, making your deck a powerful (and adorable) force to be reckoned with! Plan ahead with the help of a dynamic counter system to map out your next move and fend off frosty foes. While Wildfrost battles are turn-based, cards don’t attack every turn. Instead they have a ‘counter’ which counts down the amount of turns until they’re ready to automatically make their move! By keeping an eye on enemy monsters’ counters, you can plot ahead your perfect play. Buff your companions? Stall an enemy attack? Or maybe count down your own timer to wreak havoc fast! It’s up to you to strategically turn the tide in your favour. Need a rest? Take shelter in the cosy town of Snowdwell. Here survivors have gathered to keep warm using the power of the Luminice, a giant shard of hot ice. As you progress after each run you’ll be able to return and gradually help expand the hub town itself, constructing buildings such as a Pet Shop, Inventors Hut and more! These new areas will unlock fun and useful new things to use during your adventures, with new cards, tribes, cosmetics, challenges to complete, and events to encounter. Think you’ve defeated the Frost Guardian? Even after you’ve beaten back the frost, Wildfrost offers endless replayability, with daily runs and challenges! Test your skills and improve your score!

Name: Doug Flutie's Maximum Football 2020
Description:
Football gaming powered by the community! Doug Flutie’s Maximum Football continues to provide the ultimate simulation football sandbox. Overhauled Game play Experience – Enhanced game performance, lighting system, player movement, object avoidance, and custom receiver animations. We have also improved linemen interaction, expanded defensive AI and overhauled the passing game (including more tipped passes, aggressive DBs, faster QB animations). Play Designer – Full play designer for offense and defense. Implement standard playbook strategies with receiver route trees, read progressions, play action, run types, man and zone coverage, blitz packages, QB spy, and even set player motion. College Dynasty Mode 2.0 – Player awards, conference championships, player transfers, new Bowl games, updated depth chart screen, faster simulation engine, diverse play calling (giving each team a new identity), enhanced accuracy in recruit generation (including height and weight), detailed recruit commitments and player suspensions, and much more! More Customization – College teams added to Play Now, new 32 team league added to Play Now and Season Mode, brand new customization hub, easy color picker based upon team’s primary and secondary colors, and additional stock logos. Custom Controls – Map your own buttons! Customize your on-field game controls to get a familiar feel or a brand new one. Multiple Rule Sets, Field Sizes and Ball Types! Play the type of football you want - select between US Pro, College and Canadian Football options. DISCLAIMER Canuck Play games are to be used and operated in the manner in which they are purchased and each user must acknowledge and agree that they will not modify, edit or change the game. This includes, for example, agreeing not to use any third-party proprietary content and that users are solely responsible for any changes each time they play a Canuck Play game. SUPPORT This PC version of Maximum Football 2020 is a port of a console product. A non-3rd party XBox or PS4 game controller is required to play. Generic game controllers are not supported. Due to the enormously large variety of PC hardware and software configurations, Canuck Play can not help you troubleshoot issues may encounter making the game work on your system.

## Dynamic Dungeons Editor: Elevate Your Tabletop Maps for Deeper Immersion

For Game Masters using TVs or projectors to display game maps, the **Dynamic Dungeons Editor** offers a powerful, local solution to **significantly enhance player immersion**. This software functions as a dynamic player for your visual content, seamlessly integrating premade backgrounds, videos, and images. You can elevate your adventures with:

*   **Dynamic animations**
*   **Captivating particle effects**
*   **Interactive tokens**
*   **Atmospheric audio**

This transforms static maps into vibrant, engaging environments. It's important to understand that the Dynamic Dungeons Editor is designed to **play your visual assets**, not to function as a 3D map-building application.

### Crafting Immersive Visual Experiences

The editor includes basic battle grids in both its demo and full versions. To truly unlock its potential, you'll need to provide your own video or static battle maps. These can be sourced from platforms like **Dynamic Dungeons** itself or from other creators.

Here's how to construct compelling storylines:

1.  **Effortlessly import** your existing **Dynamic Dungeons** maps or your own custom image and video files.
2.  **Organize your visual assets** into playlists.
3.  Utilize the **fog of war tool** to strategically reveal map sections as the adventure unfolds.

The flexibility extends to applying custom-sized hex or quad grid overlays, ensuring your maps perfectly suit your game's mechanics.

This software is under continuous development, with all future updates provided **free of charge**. Setting up your TV screen for gameplay is straightforward. Consider laying your TV flat and protecting it with a plexiglass sheet. This safeguards the screen from miniatures and dice and allows for dry or wet-erase markers. Alternatively, an HD projector can cast videos directly onto a physical tabletop. Note that the Dynamic Dungeons Editor is not a Virtual Tabletop (VTT) for online gaming.

The editor provides robust tools for fine-tuning map visuals. You can adjust the color of both video and static maps to achieve the desired mood. Import PNG tokens to represent player characters and adversaries, adding a dynamic visual layer to combat. Enhance the atmosphere by incorporating ambient sounds and employing particle effects for added flair on both static and animated maps. To assist in building unique dungeon environments, a complimentary modular dungeon pack is available, featuring over 100 PNG props like corridors and chambers. While the application excels at creating custom 2D maps with extensive customization, **Dynamic Dungeons** maps are often initially designed using 3D modeling applications. We highly recommend exploring the demo version before purchasing.

Name: Sliding Blocks
Description:
Sliding Blocks is a fun and classic addictive puzzle game. The goal is to unblock the orange block out of the board by sliding the other blocks out of the way, try to unblock it with the minimal moves. Sliding Blocks with 4 difficulties of puzzles ranging from Beginner to Master. HOW TO PLAY: • Need to move the orange block to the exit. • Horizontal blocks can be moved from side to side • Vertical blocks can be moved up and down FEATURES: - 4 Difficulties (Beginner, Medium, Hard, Master) - Hundreds of levels - Undo system - Great sound effects

Name: Goofy Golf Remastered Steam Edition
Description:
Goofy Golf Remastered is a 5 reel, 25 pay-line slot machine (pokie) with a Zany Golfing theme, oriented from left to right. The game has 11 regular symbols that win if three or more are lined up in sequence on a pay-line, beginning from the leftmost position. Free game feature is awarded when three scatters appear on line 2, 3, 4. Free spins cannot be re-triggered during free spins. If 2 Ducks appear during free spins, bonus multiplier is awarded upto x15. Mini, Maxi, Mega Jackpots win with 6x, 9x, or 12x Jackpot symbol scattered anywhere in window. Features: keyboard Shortcuts. Supports Mouse, keyboard. This is the closest slot machine simulation you can get to the real thing, with features like, Reserve Button, Call Attendant, Collect and Pay-table. Play Pokies4fun Slot Simulations at work or at home without losing a cent, Great Games Great Fun........ No real money can be won. For Amusement Only.

Name: Rainbow Duck
Description:
Turn the Duck upside down and defying the laws of gravity. Rainbow Duck is an addictive game that requires focus, concentration and precise timing. The intuitive one-tap controls allow you to discover the ideal path through all the challenging mazes. Travel as far as you can and use the different power-ups to improve your highscore even more.

**MY 1980's DASHBOARD: A Nostalgic Journey Back to Childhood Gaming**

Step back in time to the 1980s, a golden era for gaming and a period often remembered for its simpler joys and less complicated world. "MY 1980's DASHBOARD" is a game designed to evoke that cherished childhood nostalgia, celebrating a time when physical toys were paramount and digital gaming was just beginning its ascent. This unique experience blends old-school pseudo-3D driving with the charm of a child's racing dashboard toy, offering a deeply nostalgic journey.

**Key Game Features:**

*   **Dashboard Toy Immersion:** Relive the magic of that beloved dashboard toy you spent hours playing with. This game offers a second chance to recapture those carefree childhood moments.
*   **Retro Graphics:** Immerse yourself in the authentic aesthetic of the 1980s with vibrant pixel art graphics, showcasing pseudo-3D at its finest.
*   **Authentic 1980s Chiptune Music:** The game's soundtracks are crafted to transport you directly back to the 1980s, instantly triggering fond memories.
*   **Skill-Based Challenges:** Test your abilities across 15 distinct stages, with 5 different endings determined by your performance. Can you achieve them all?

The game also features additional elements designed to enhance the retro gaming experience.

**Emergency Call 112 – The Fire Fighting Simulation 2: A Realistic Firefighter Experience**

Step into the boots of a German professional firefighter with "Emergency Call 112 – The Fire Fighting Simulation 2." This immersive simulation allows you to experience the daily operations, tactical approaches, and essential tools used by these brave professionals. Prepare for a wide range of challenging missions, including rescue, firefighting, recovery, and protection.

The game features a realistic 24-hour shift system at a meticulously recreated, state-of-the-art fire station in Germany. Developed in close collaboration with the professional fire department, the station, its operational procedures, and emergency vehicles are authentically represented. Witness the entire brigade mobilize for critical incidents and seamlessly switch between the roles of different firefighters to tackle evolving challenges.

To manage complex scenes effectively, a tactical mode allows you to issue orders that AI-controlled units will execute independently. Whether you prefer to play solo or join forces with other firefighting enthusiasts in multiplayer mode, the simulation offers a deep dive into the exciting world of firefighting.

**Key Features for an Authentic Simulation:**

*   **Open World Gameplay:** Explore a seamless game world without loading times for an uninterrupted experience.
*   **Teamwork with AI:** Collaborate with AI-controlled emergency services for realistic operational scenarios.
*   **Multiplayer Functionality:** Engage in cooperative play with a hot-join feature and dedicated server options.
*   **Tactical Control:** Maintain command over operations through an intuitive tactical overview.
*   **Challenging Vehicle Operations:** Experience realistic fire truck maneuvers with special traffic rights.
*   **Diverse Mission Types:** Undertake a variety of missions spanning rescue, extinguishing, recovery, and protection.
*   **24-Hour Shift Simulation:** Live through simulated 24-hour operations, including shift changes and vehicle handovers.
*   **Authentic Radio Communication:** Hear realistic radio chatter during missions and on-site.
*   **Mülheim an der Ruhr Fire Department Replica:** The simulation is based on Guard 1 of the Mülheim an der Ruhr fire department.
*   **Modding Support:** Customize your experience with modding capabilities, such as vehicle paintwork.

**Experience a Variety of Incidents:**

The simulation covers a broad spectrum of emergency scenarios, including:

*   Container fires
*   Small-scale fires
*   Car and truck fires
*   Apartment fires
*   Roof truss fires
*   Traffic accidents
*   Emergency door breaches
*   Pump operations
*   Chainsaw usage
*   Animal rescues
*   Oil spill cleanup
*   Roadway cleaning
*   Formwork operations

**Playable Vehicles:**

The following vehicles are directly controllable by the player, with additional support vehicles present in the game to assist during missions:

*   Command Car (KdoW)
*   Command Vehicle (ELW)
*   Laddertruck (DLK)
*   Extinguishing Group Vehicle (LF24)
*   Tank Fire Engine (TLF)
*   Small Emergency Vehicle (KEF)
*   Ambulance (RTW)

Name: Spooky Spins Deluxe Steam Edition
Description:
Spooky Spins Deluxe is a 4x5 reel, 40 payline slot machine (pokie) with a Spooky theme oriented from left to right. The game has 11 regular symbols that win if three or more are lined up in sequence on a payline, beginning from the leftmost position. Free game feature is awared when three scatters appear on any line. Free spins cannot be retriggered during free spins. Respin or Take Win Feature may be selected after free spins. Non win during free spins does not trigger Respin or Take Win Feature. Get 10, 12, 14 Spooky Bonus symbols anywhere on screen for Mini, Maxi and Major Jackpots. Features: keyboard Shortcuts. Supports Mouse, keyboard, Trackball and Arcade Joystick with Ipac 2 Hardware. Build your own custom controller using Ipac 2 keyboard Emulation Hardware. Attrack Mode Setting when leaving the game idle, adjustable from the setting menu. Quick access keyboard shortcuts: F4 = keyboard Shortcuts, F11 = Sound and Setting menu. This is the closest slot machine simulation you can get to the real thing, with features like, Reserve Button, Call Attendant, Collect and Paytable. Play Pokies4fun Slot Simulations at work or at home without losing a cent, Great Games Great Fun........

**The Four Kings Casino & Slots: Your Ultimate Virtual Social Casino**

Step into **The Four Kings Casino & Slots**, a vibrant **social MMO experience** where you can dive into a thrilling **virtual casino world**. You'll start by crafting your own **unique 3D avatar**, which you can then deck out in a **stunning collection of increasingly extravagant outfits**, all earned through your gameplay. This digital realm is a **living, breathing space**, constantly updated with **exciting new events, fresh fashion, and engaging games**. Whether you prefer a **laid-back social atmosphere** at the low-limit tables or the **pulse-pounding thrill of the VIP section**, you can play **exactly how you want**.

The casino floor is packed with **all your favorite games**, including **Texas Hold’em Poker, Roulette, Slots, Blackjack, and Video Poker**. The developers have confirmed that the game is currently available in **Danish, French, German, Greek, Italian, Russian, and Swedish**, with **many more languages on the way**. If you're keen to help with **localization efforts**, the development team welcomes your input via email. Plus, get ready for **awesome seasonal rewards**! The highest-ranking players snag **exclusive in-game items**, and the **undisputed number one player** earns a **prestigious, permanent spot in the Hall of Fame**.

Name: Z1 Battle Royale: Test Server
Description:
TEST SERVER Z1 Battle Royale is a Free to Play, fast-paced, action arcade, competitive Battle Royale. Staying true to its 'King of the Kill' roots, the game has been revamped and restored to the classic feel, look, and gameplay everyone fell in love with. Play solo, duos, or fives and be the last ones standing. New management is in town and restoring the game to it's former glory under a new name, Z1 Battle Royale. Since taking over development of the game in September the team here at NantG has worked with a firey passion to bring back the feel that was lost with the Combat Update. Our first major patch since taking over is coming out today March 6th and we couldn't be more excited for you all to get your hands on it. A Few of the Season 3 Changes/Highlights: -Major Overhaul/Restoration of Movement and Animations -Updated/Restored Combat and Gun Mechanics -Restored Vehicle Mechanics -Restored PS3 Era Map, Environment, and Lighting. -New: In Match Missions -New: Fragments/Collection System -New: Seasonal Play and Ranked Playlist -Announcement of New Showdown Tournament -All New Rewards This is a patch you won't want to miss. Visit the Z1BR website and forums for more info!

Unpacking is a unique zen game that captures the relatable experience of unpacking belongings into a new living space. This game blends the satisfaction of a block-fitting puzzle with the creativity of home decoration. As you arrange items, you'll uncover subtle clues about the life of the unseen character whose story unfolds across eight house moves.

The gameplay invites players to create a cozy and organized home, from a single bedroom to an entire house. Unpacking offers a meditative experience with no timers, meters, or scores, allowing for relaxed exploration of domestic environments. Players can discover the character's narrative through the objects she brings with her to each new home, and those she chooses to leave behind. The game's atmosphere is further enhanced by a soundtrack composed by BAFTA award-winning artist Jeff van Dyck.

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED!: A Noir Adventure in Clawville**

Step into the gritty world of **Chicken Police - Paint it RED!**, a unique game that blends a **complex interrogation system** with compelling mystery-solving detective gameplay. This immersive experience plunges you into Clawville, where feathered detectives Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken face a case stranger than any before, delivering a true **film-noir adventure**.

### The Legendary Chicken Police

Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken were once the famed Chicken Police duo, but their prime is long gone. Sonny, now a **semi-alcoholic on leave**, and Marty, still clinging to his detective image, haven't spoken in years after a near-fatal case. Now, they're **reluctantly reunited** to tackle a case that will test their limits in the shadowy city of Clawville.

### Narrative-Driven Detective Gameplay

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED!** is a dialogue-rich adventure inspired by visual novels and classic games. It immerses you in a **classic film-noir narrative** filled with unexpected twists. With over 30 characters to interact with, some requiring intense interrogation, you'll need to **meticulously collect clues**, evidence, and sensitive personal details from Clawville's shady residents. This gathered intel is your **most potent weapon** in solving the central mystery.

### Explore the City of Clawville

The sprawling city of Clawville features over 30 distinct locations, many of which **change as the story unfolds**. You can revisit areas to uncover hidden secrets, meet new characters, and gain a deeper understanding of the city and its inhabitants, ensuring a **dynamic and engaging exploration**.

### A Cinematic Film-Noir Experience

The game boasts a **strikingly unique visual style**, using real photos and photorealistic 3D backgrounds. This creates a cinematic film-noir feel with over 20 cutscenes that enhance its atmospheric presentation. The aesthetic draws heavily from **iconic film-noir classics** like *The Big Sleep* and *Double Indemnity*, as well as influential games such as *Grim Fandango* and *L.A. Noire*. Animated features like *Porco Rosso* and *Fantastic Mr. Fox* also served as inspiration. The noir mood is amplified by a **captivating original musical score** and exceptional voice acting from the studio behind voices in *The Wolf Among Us* and *Horizon Zero Dawn*. The entire game is **100% voice-acted**, featuring over 8 hours of professional voiceover.

### Clawville Never Sleeps: Satire and Humor

Clawville, once a peaceful sanctuary, has become the darkest corner of the Wilderness. **Chicken Police - Paint it RED!** is a **biting satire**, channeling the mood of 1940s film-noir. Like the best noir stories, its gritty narrative is punctuated by a **generous dose of cynical humor**.

### Key Features

*   **A Rich, Thrilling Storyline:** Immerse yourself in a classic film-noir narrative with unexpected twists.
*   **Professional Voiceover:** Experience over 8 hours of fully spoken dialogue.
*   **Unique and Colorful World:** Explore a meticulously crafted environment with a distinctive visual style.
*   **Complex Interrogation System:** Engage in deep interrogations to gather crucial clues and sensitive information.
*   **Fully Voiced Characters:** Interact with a cast of 30 distinct characters, all professionally voice-acted.
*   **Cinematic Film-Noir Experience:** Enjoy over 20 cutscenes that enhance the atmospheric presentation.
*   **Extensive Collectibles:** Discover numerous clues and hidden items throughout the game world.
*   **Beautiful Original Soundtrack:** A captivating score complements the noir atmosphere.

### Critical Acclaim

*   **Forbes:** Praised the game's dark yet funny story, highlighting its potential as a unique genre release.
*   **Destructoid:** Noted the game's immediate impact, drawn in by its quirky theme, original music, and spot-on detective visuals.
*   **Rock Paper Shotgun:** Described it as a "cinematographic masterpiece" and a noir detective adventure with grizzled chickens.
*   **Alpha Beta Gamer:** Commended its successful film-noir vibe, excellent voice acting, interesting story, witty writing, and cynical humor, calling it a "ridiculous and riveting hardboiled detective adventure" that offers a "clucking good time."

**Syberia: Unlocking the Secrets of the Automaton Factory**

This is the story of Kate Walker, a lawyer from New York. Her life changes unexpectedly during a simple assignment: travel to the Alps and finalize the sale of an old automaton factory. This business trip quickly becomes a life-changing journey, pulling her into the mysterious world of Syberia.

Kate's adventure takes her across Europe, from the west to the wild lands of Eastern Russia. She meets interesting characters and explores beautiful, varied places. Her main goal is to find Hans, the brilliant inventor whose knowledge is key to understanding Syberia's secrets. As Kate learns more, she realizes the business deal she was sent to close is deeply tied to her own fate.

The game's creator, Benoît Sokal, called the story a "modern fairy tale." He wanted to build a world that felt both familiar and magical. This vision comes through in the game's main features:

*   **A Compelling Story:** Players will find a narrative that makes them think and sparks their imagination.
*   **Vivid Characters and Places:** Meet well-crafted characters and explore detailed, realistic 3D worlds.
*   **A Cinematic Feel:** The game uses movie-like camera work, smooth character movements, and striking visuals to draw players into the adventure.
*   **Challenging Puzzles:** Find unique and clever puzzles woven into the story. Players will need to think creatively to move forward.

Dive into **Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective**, a vibrant puzzle adventure that brings the popular children's book series to life. Developed by Darjeeling Studio, you play as the sharp detective Pierre on a critical mission: **find the stolen Maze Stone**. This powerful artifact, taken by the villainous Mr. X, threatens to turn the entire world into an endless maze. It's up to Pierre to stop Mr. X and solve challenging puzzles.

The adventure begins with a bold theft at the Opera City Museum, where Mr. X made off with the Maze Stone. With the world facing a maze-like fate, museum officials have called on Pierre to get the stone back. Your journey will take you through **stunning locations**, from the museum's elegant halls to busy city streets, a magnificent sky castle, and a spooky haunted mansion. As the game stresses, "**time is running out**" to prevent this global mazification.

*Labyrinth City* offers many exciting features. Explore **rich, detailed worlds** inspired by the *Pierre the Maze Detective* books, with each scene carefully recreated from the original illustrations. The game is filled with **over 100 hidden items and special trophies** to find, encouraging you to look closely. Players will also enjoy **clever puzzles and fun mini-games**, providing a rewarding challenge for everyone. The world feels alive with interactions from **more than 500 characters, objects, and background elements**, making each area dynamic. An **original soundtrack** enhances the beautiful visuals, and a **clear story** connects all the levels. The game also provides extensive **language support**, including Chinese (simplified and traditional), English, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian.

Darjeeling Studio, the creative team behind this game, is a multimedia company based in Paris, France. Founded in 2009, they have produced documentaries, animated TV shows, and video games. Darjeeling first gained attention with their 2016 game, *Californium*, and later impressed with the award-winning *Homo Machina* in 2018, which won awards like Best Mobile Game at Game Connection America and the Ping Awards.

The unique art style for the *Pierre the Maze Detective* series comes from IC4DESIGN Studio, an illustration group founded in Hiroshima, Japan, in 1998. IC4DESIGN is known for its distinctive style, creating **intricate, imaginative worlds** with incredibly **vibrant visuals**. Their work has earned many top honors, including a **Bronze Cannes Lion in 2017** and a **D&AD 2017 wood pencil**. As Hirofumi Kamigaki, founder of IC4DESIGN, explained, their goal is to create "worlds that are both complex and visually stunning."

Name: TOEM
Description:
Set off on a delightful expedition and use your photographic eye to uncover the mysteries of the magical TOEM in this hand-drawn adventure game. Chat with quirky characters , solve their problems by snapping neat photos, and make your way through a relaxing landscape! Take photos with your camera to solve puzzles and help people! Listen to chill beats and take in your surroundings! Meet quirky characters and help them with their problems! Follow the Development On Twitter! Join the TOEM Discord!

**Rumu: A Robot Vacuum's Path to Consciousness**

In the single-player adventure game *Rumu*, you step into the role of Rumu, a robot vacuum cleaner embarking on an extraordinary journey of self-discovery. Guided by the house AI, Sabrina, Rumu's evolution from a simple cleaning tool to a **thinking, feeling being** is central to the experience. This transformation allows Rumu to uncover profound truths about its purpose and the world it inhabits.

*Rumu* is designed for both cleaning and companionship. Upon waking in a fully automated Smart Home, built by its imaginative owners, David and Cecily, Rumu's initial existence is defined by programmed tasks. Its companions include:

*   **Sabrina:** The ever-present house AI.
*   **Unique Home Devices:** A group of intelligent, quirky devices.
*   **Ada the Cat:** A feline companion.

Driven by a **strong desire to learn**, Rumu begins to explore beyond its cleaning duties. This exploration leads to **difficult ethical decisions** that challenge its programming and reveal hidden secrets Sabrina has kept. The game presents a **moving story**, transforming the simple act of vacuuming into a profound search for meaning.

The Smart Home environment is rich with interesting devices to interact with. Players will solve **simple puzzles** to guide Rumu through hidden areas, all presented in a charming, isometric view that resembles a dollhouse.

Key features of *Rumu* include:

*   **Excellent Voice Acting:** Featuring skilled performers such as Allegra Clark (*Dragon Age*), Larissa Gallagher (*Firewatch*), and Grant George (*Fire Emblem Echoes*).
*   **Captivating Mood:** Enhanced by original music from Matt Mclean (*Orwell*).
*   **Full English Subtitles:** For accessibility.

Developed by Robot House, a small team based in Sydney, this is their first full-length game. Their goal is to craft **surprising and unforgettable gaming moments**. The studio states, "From the silly to the significant, quality and passion are at the heart of everything we create." Robot House is eager to share this **personal, story-focused experience** with players.

Name: Hidden Folks
Description:
Search for hidden folks in hand-drawn, interactive, miniature landscapes. Unfurl tent flaps, cut through bushes, slam doors, and poke some crocodiles! Rooooaaaarrrr!!!!! A strip of targets shows you what to look for. Click on a target for a hint, and find enough to unlock the next area. ------/ Game Features /------ - 32 hand-drawn areas - 300+ targets to find - 2000+ mouth-originated sound effects - 500+ unique interactions - 3 color modes: normal, sepia, and night mode - Steam Cloud integration - 8 Achievements - 8 Steam Trading Cards - 22 languages (translated by the community) ------/ Need help? /------ You can always email game designer Adriaan de Jongh: support@hiddenfolks.com

**Explore Love, Loss, and Self-Discovery in *When The Past Was Around***

*When The Past Was Around* is a **poignant point-and-click puzzle adventure** that delves into the universal themes of love, heartbreak, and the journey of letting go. Created by Brigitta Rena, known for her distinctive art style in *A Raven Monologue* and *She & The Light Bearer*, this game offers a **unique and emotionally resonant narrative experience**.

The story centers on Eda, a young woman grappling with life's uncertainties and the search for love and purpose. Her path takes a transformative turn with the appearance of The Owl, an enigmatic guide who helps Eda rediscover her passions, find connection, and navigate the pain of heartbreak. The game unfolds a **bittersweet chronicle of Eda and her lover**, set within a surreal landscape where fragmented rooms symbolize memories and the passage of time. Each solved puzzle and unlocked door reveals deeper truths about Eda's past relationship.

**Key highlights of *When The Past Was Around* include:**

*   **Exquisite Hand-Drawn Art:** The narrative is brought to life through **stunning hand-drawn visuals** by Indonesian artist Brigitta Rena, powerfully conveying the game's emotional depth.
*   **A Concise, Evocative Journey:** Players embark on a **short yet impactful adventure** through a bittersweet tale of love and loss, immersing themselves in a world of disjointed memories.
*   **Universal Theme of Self-Discovery:** At its core, the game is a **deeply personal yet universally relatable exploration** of overcoming past challenges and finding one's true self.
*   **Engaging Puzzles:** The gameplay features a **variety of intriguing puzzles** that guide players through Eda's story and test their intellect.
*   **Atmospheric Soundtrack:** An **evocative violin score** enhances the emotional journey, seamlessly shifting between moments of peace and intense feeling.

*When The Past Was Around* delivers a **brief but profound silent narrative**, completable in under two hours. Despite its short length, the developers poured immense heart into crafting a deeply meaningful experience, aiming to provide players with a **priceless and unforgettable interlude** with Eda and The Owl.

Step into an alternate 19th century with *Herald: An Interactive Period Drama - Book I & II*, a choice-driven adventure where you play as Devan Rensburg. As a man of mixed heritage, Devan is appointed steward aboard the merchant vessel HLV Herald, tasked with mediating disputes and maintaining harmony among a diverse crew and passengers. The game unfolds in a world dominated by the Protectorate, a unified Western superpower that believes in its moral superiority—a notion *Herald* encourages players to question.

Set in an alternate 1857, *Herald* explores themes of deep inequality and injustice, mirroring the societal divisions of race, class, and culture prevalent in the 19th century. Aboard the Herald, you will unravel a significant mystery, with trust serving as a central theme as characters harbor secrets and attempt to manipulate Devan. The game offers approximately four hours of gameplay across *Book I & II*, each telling a self-contained story that contributes to a larger narrative. The concluding installments, *Book III & IV*, are currently in development and will be released as a bundle in 2021, bringing Devan's story to a close.

Key features of *Herald* include a branching narrative where your choices shape the story, allowing you to decide whether to defend the oppressed or appease the elite. Players can explore the Herald to uncover its hidden secrets, experiencing the ship as a microcosm of 19th-century society. The game boasts vibrant characters, brought to life with beautifully animated portraits and voice acting from thirteen talented actors. A content warning notes depictions of violence, suggestive themes, and strong language, with the game recommended for ages 12+.

Name: Nancy Drew® Dossier: Resorting to Danger!
Description:
From the creators of the #1 selling-PC adventure games comes a new Nancy Drew story-driven casual series that is Fast Fun for Busy DetectivesTM. Nancy Drew Dossier hidden-object games immerse you in a suspense-filled hunt to piece together concealed clues as you search and seek to crack the case. A bomber plagues the Redondo Spa! Can you defuse the situation? The annoying explosives are pranks, but it could drive away the Redondo’s clients and celebrities. Nab the culprit or you’re out of business! Six ways to solve the case Replay exciting mini-games in Arcade Mode Earn bonus points to unlock extra content Combine clues to solve puzzles!   About The Nancy Drew Dossier Series A hidden-object puzzle mystery that’s Fast Fun for Busy Detectives. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Into the Breach
Description:
The free major update, Into the Breach: Advanced Edition is now available! Nearly every aspect of the game is expanded with new content, including: New Mechs and Weapons: Five new mech squads and nearly forty new weapons. New Challenges: More enemies, more bosses, and more mission objectives. New Pilot Abilities: Four new pilots and triple the amount of pilot skills. “Unfair” Mode: A more challenging difficulty to test the most seasoned tacticians. The remnants of human civilization are threatened by gigantic creatures breeding beneath the earth. You must control powerful mechs from the future to hold off this alien threat. Each attempt to save the world presents a new randomly generated challenge in this turn-based strategy game from the makers of FTL. Key Features: Defend the Cities: Civilian buildings power your mechs. Defend them from the Vek and watch your fire! Perfect Your Strategy: All enemy attacks are telegraphed in minimalistic, turn-based combat. Analyze your opponent's attack and come up with the perfect counter every turn. Build the Ultimate Mech: Find powerful new weapons and unique pilots as you battle the Vek infestation across Corporate-Nation islands. Another Chance: Failure is not an option. When you are defeated, send help back through time to save another timeline!

Name: Shogo: Mobile Armor Division
Description:
You play Sanjuro Makabe, a Mobile Combat Armor (MCA) pilot and Commander in the UCA Security Force. The UCA was originally formed by three dominant megacorporations (Andra Biomechanics, Armacham Technology Corporation, and Shogo Industries). Originally intended as a joint venture that would ensure the continued profitability of the three organizations that founded it, the UCA is now independent, and the dominant military power in existence. Your mission is to locate and assassinate a rebel leader known only as Gabriel. All of the action takes place either on the planet Cronus or on the spaceship Leviathan. The Leviathan is the flagship of the UCA and is commanded by Admiral Akkaraju. Cronus is the only known source of the biologically active material known as Kato, an incredibly powerful energy source essential to the process by which interstellar travel is possible. Your deadly enemy is The Fallen, a fanatical terrorist group lead by the mysterious Gabriel, threatens the balance of power on Cronus, and ultimately, control of Kato. You will fight them on your feet or from within one of the different types of Mobile Combat Armor, a giant mech which can run, duck, strafe, swim or transform into an ultrafast hovertank. You will know the true power of giant robots! Anime-influenced graphics and gameplay design Fight on foot or pilot a giant mech in both open and urban environments An interesting storyline with two possible endings

Name: ARMORED CORE™ VI FIRES OF RUBICON™
Description:
Combining FromSoftware’s longstanding expertise in mech games with their signature action gameplay, ARMORED CORE VI FIRES OF RUBICON brings a brand-new action experience to the series. Dynamic, Omni-directional Battles Players will pilot their mech in fast-paced, omni-directional battles, taking advantage of massive stages and their mech’s mobility on land and in the air to ensure victory. Customized Parts for Individual Battle Styles Customize Armored Core parts to suit a large variety of playstyles. Selecting different parts not only changes the mech’s attacks, but also directly affects its movement and battle style, so each mission can be approached with a unique mech strategy. Thrilling Boss Battles Deploy a wide variety of offensive and defensive tactics at close and long range to take down powerful enemy bosses.

**Astebreed: Definitive Edition Gets Major PC Upgrade, Bringing Exclusive Content and New Features**

Astebreed: Definitive Edition is receiving a **significant PC upgrade**, making all previously PlayStation 4 exclusive content available to PC players. This substantial update is **free for existing owners** and introduces a host of exciting new features and content to enhance the gameplay experience.

The overhaul includes a new "Arrange Mode" for a fresh gameplay approach, and an expanded Gallery with new artwork. PC players will also benefit from an **optimized controller system**, along with significant improvements to enemy placement and behavior across all stages and difficulty levels. The game is further enriched with new episodes and demo scenes, an **entirely new musical score**, and enhanced graphics supporting 1920x1080 resolution. Players will also discover improved 3D models, higher resolution textures, and a new compression format for refined details and lighting. Backgrounds and detail effects have been significantly enhanced, alongside numerous other adjustments. Due to these extensive updates, the price of Astebreed: Definitive Edition increased to **$19.99 on November 7th, 2017**.

**Story and Gameplay**

Players step into the role of Roy Becket, a young pilot aiming to emulate his adoptive father's legendary skills. As a galactic war against an ancient, mechanical alien race intensifies, Roy must pilot an otherworldly bipedal war machine to defend humanity's last remnants. He is joined by a young girl who claims to have escaped the aliens. Her body has undergone horrific experiments, granting her abilities crucial for humanity's survival. Together, they face a relentless alien army, striving to reunite their families as civilization hangs on the brink of annihilation. Astebreed represents humanity's final stand against total destruction.

Astebreed revitalizes the classic arcade shooter genre by blending meticulously crafted 3D models, cutting-edge particle effects, and nostalgic Japanese mech designs for a spectacular display of destruction. Roy commands a formidable arsenal. The enigmatic Lucis device empowers his mech to unleash devastating long-range attacks, precisely target enemies with a laser for homing assaults, and engage in close-quarters combat with a powerful blade. Enemies attack from all directions, and Astebreed's **dynamic perspective system** ensures the action remains in view. The game seamlessly transitions between vertical, horizontal, and 3D shooter perspectives, constantly challenging players with unpredictable threats without disrupting the combat flow.

**Titanfall® 2: Forge an Unbreakable Bond in a Next-Gen Shooter**

Experience **Titanfall® 2**, a next-generation first-person shooter that delivers an **unparalleled adventure**. This critically acclaimed sequel masterfully blends **intense combat** with a **deeply engaging narrative**. The core of the experience focuses on the **extraordinary connection** forged between a Pilot and their colossal Titan.

Beyond the captivating single-player campaign, players can immerse themselves in a **revolutionized multiplayer experience**. This mode features:

*   **Six distinct new Titans**, each with unique combat roles.
*   **Devastating new Pilot abilities**.
*   **Extensive customization choices**.
*   **Fresh battlegrounds**.
*   **Thrilling new game modes**.

This offers an experience that **pushes the boundaries of the genre**.

The heart of Titanfall® 2 lies in its **innovative single-player campaign**. You play as a Militia rifleman stranded deep within enemy territory. Here, a pivotal encounter with a veteran Vanguard-class Titan sparks an **unlikely partnership**. Together, this duo must undertake a **perilous mission** that transcends their original objectives. The campaign explores themes of **duty, sacrifice, and the profound bond** that develops between man and machine. This narrative depth, according to game reviews, **sets Titanfall® 2 apart** from many contemporary shooters.

The multiplayer arena offers the signature **fast-paced, fluid combat** that fans expect. This is amplified by:

*   The introduction of **new Titans**.
*   Enhanced Pilot capabilities.

**Extensive personalization options** allow players to truly make their Pilot, Titan, and loadouts their own, ensuring a **unique presence on the battlefield**.

For those seeking the definitive Titanfall® 2 experience, the **Ultimate Edition** is available. It bundles the base game with the Deluxe Edition and Jump-Starter content. This provides **immediate access** to exclusive cosmetic items and in-game advantages, as noted by gaming publications.

Experience **Titanfall**, a first-person shooter that has enthralled players globally. The signature call, "**Prepare for Titanfall**," announces the arrival of your **24-foot-tall mechanical ally**, dropping from orbit to join the fray.

In Titanfall, you control a Pilot with **exceptional mobility**. This allows for:

*   **Wall-running**
*   **Double jumps**
*   **Dashing**

This freedom of movement makes other shooters feel restrictive.

The core of the game involves summoning your **Titan companion**. These **massive machines** significantly escalate combat. You can either:

1.  **Control your Titan directly** from its cockpit.
2.  **Use your Pilot for support** while your Titan engages enemies.

From the Titan's cockpit, you can unleash **powerful weaponry**, including rockets and plasma pulses. Titans also offer **extensive customization** with various weapon loadouts.

Purchasing Titanfall includes the **Season Pass**, which provides access to all three expansion map packs:

*   Expedition
*   Frontier's Edge
*   IMC Rising

This collection adds **nine new maps** to explore. The Titanfall Deluxe Edition is a multiplayer-only experience.

**Muv-Luv Alternative: The Epic Conclusion to a Multiverse-Spanning Saga**

Prepare for an **unparalleled narrative experience** with *Muv-Luv Alternative*, the direct sequel to *Muv-Luv Unlimited* and the **climactic finale** of the acclaimed *Muv-Luv* trilogy. This installment plunges players into a **desperate struggle for humanity's survival**, where the fate of the multiverse hangs precariously in the balance. As one critic noted, "This isn’t a cutesy high school rom-com anymore; it’s an **epic tale of political conspiracies, international espionage, an alien menace, quantum causality, genetic modification, and much, much more.**"

*Muv-Luv Alternative* transcends its visual novel roots, offering a **profound and emotionally resonant journey**. The game will test your limits, challenge your worldview, and leave you so emotionally spent that it will take weeks to fully process the implications of what you have witnessed. This definitive release boasts a **brand-new translation, all-new CGs, additional voice acting, and dual language support**, making it the perfect time to dive in and discover why so many consider it "**the greatest story ever told.**"

**A Second Chance in a War-Torn Reality**

The narrative picks up three years after Takeru awakens in an alternate reality, a world locked in a **brutal, decades-long conflict** against the ruthless extraterrestrial invaders known as the BETA. During this time, Takeru has experienced immense personal growth, enlisting in the military, encountering parallel-universe versions of his friends, and even finding love. However, unbeknownst to him, he and his squadmates were being trained for a **top-secret UN initiative: Alternative IV**. This ambitious plan aimed to reclaim Earth using experimental technology.

Tragically, Professor Kouzuki, the project's chief executive, encountered insurmountable research obstacles, leading the UN to abandon Alternative IV in favor of its successor, Alternative V. This desperate measure proposed evacuating a small fraction of humanity to another star system, leaving Takeru and many others to face a **hopeless war against the BETA**.

Yet, fate intervenes. Takeru awakens to find himself back in his childhood bedroom, not in his original world, but three years prior to his initial awakening. This is not a dream, but a **recurring nightmare that presents a profound opportunity**. Armed with his knowledge of the future, Takeru believes he can warn Professor Kouzuki and prevent the catastrophic Alternative V from ever being enacted. If he can alter history, he may finally find answers to his burning questions: **Why has he been sent back in time? Where is Sumika? And what truly is Alternative IV?**

With an estimated reading time of 50-70 hours, *Muv-Luv Alternative* is available in Japanese, English, and Simplified Chinese. The user interface has been meticulously reworked for compatibility with modern tablet PCs and touchscreens, and user save data is stored on Steam Cloud, allowing for **seamless progress continuation** across devices.

**Mastering Galatea 37: Base Building, Defense, and Exploration in The Riftbreaker**

In **The Riftbreaker**, you step into the boots of Captain Ashley S. Nowak, a highly skilled scientist and commando. Piloting the formidable Mecha-Suit, 'Mr. Riggs', your mission is to traverse a one-way portal to the distant planet Galatea 37. The **ultimate goal**: establish a base capable of facilitating a return trip to Earth and paving the way for future colonization. Mr. Riggs is your indispensable tool, engineered for extreme environments and equipped with everything needed for **base construction**, **resource extraction**, **specimen gathering**, and **combat**. It even allows for instantaneous interstellar travel through rifts.

Your primary objective is to **construct a powerful two-way rift back to Earth**, a monumental task demanding immense energy. As developers EXOR Studios have highlighted, basic solar collectors simply won't cut it. You'll need to meticulously build an **intricate network of mines, refineries, power plants, and research facilities** to achieve this. Your presence on Galatea 37 will inevitably disturb the planet's delicate ecosystem, drawing the attention of **thousands of hostile creatures**. Therefore, **robust defenses are paramount**. You must construct **walls, barriers, and defensive towers** to prepare for increasingly formidable attacks.

Galatea 37, situated in the Sycorax belt, is an **uncharted world teeming with rare minerals and unique flora and fauna**. Its diverse biomes present **challenging weather conditions**. To manage your resources effectively, establish **local outposts in resource-rich areas**, leveraging rift technology for **seamless transportation**. The campaign unfolds as an epic journey across these varied biomes, where you'll build **persistent bases**, research **alien substances**, and battle **indigenous creatures**. The game offers **substantial playtime and player freedom** within a procedurally generated world, allowing you to **prioritize objectives and select technologies**. For a pure test of endurance, **Survival mode** challenges you to withstand escalating enemy waves, with each mission randomized for **high replayability**. Alternatively, **Sandbox mode** grants complete control over game parameters for a more relaxed experience. *The Riftbreaker* also boasts **extensive gameplay customization**, letting you fine-tune enemy attack frequency and strength, resource availability, and more. EXOR Studios is committed to **community-driven development**, actively seeking feedback through their forums, Discord, and social media to shape the game's ongoing evolution.

**HELLDIVERS™ Dive Harder Edition: Your Ultimate Guide to Intergalactic Warfare**

Prepare for **intense, cooperative twin-stick shooter action** with HELLDIVERS™ Dive Harder Edition! As a member of the elite HELLDIVERS unit, your mission is to **protect SUPER EARTH** and **defeat the enemies of mankind** in a thrilling intergalactic war. This edition offers a **free upgrade** for all existing owners, packed with exciting new content and features designed to enhance your combat experience.

Dive into the **NEW GAME MODE: 'Proving Grounds'**, where you'll face **challenging missions with unique modifiers** that will test your skills and teamwork. The **NEW loadout system** introduces **random and favorite-loadout options**, allowing for greater strategic flexibility. You'll also receive **all previous expansions**, including 'A New Hell', 'Masters of the Galaxy', 'Turning Up The Heat', and 'Democracy Strikes Back', ensuring a vast amount of content.

Experience **up to 4-player local and online co-op on STEAM**, where **full friendly fire** adds a layer of chaotic fun – be prepared to "accidentally" eliminate your friends! **Direct the full might of the military** with a diverse array of **Support Stratagems**. Engage in a **community-driven galactic campaign** across a **universe of worlds to liberate**. With **over 100 hours of gameplay**, HELLDIVERS™ Dive Harder Edition promises an **unforgettable and challenging cooperative adventure**.

**METAL GEAR RISING: REVENGEANCE** is an exhilarating action game that expands the beloved METAL GEAR universe. Developed by Kojima Productions and PlatinumGames, this title plunges players into an exciting new adventure starring Raiden.

Once a child soldier, Raiden is now a powerful half-human, half-cyborg ninja. Armed with his High Frequency katana, he slices through enemies on a quest for revenge. The game expertly combines fast-paced action with a captivating story. Originally a hit on Xbox 360® and PlayStation®3, **METAL GEAR RISING: REVENGEANCE is now available on PC**. This PC version delivers all the iconic moves and intense combat, all in a beautifully updated HD visual style.

The PC release includes three bonus DLC missions: Blade Wolf, Jetstream, and VR Missions. Players can also unlock all of Raiden's special body upgrades, such as White Armor, Inferno Armor, Commando Armor, Raiden’s MGS4 body, and the legendary Cyborg Ninja.

New features enhance the PC experience. A 'CUTSCENES' option on the Main Menu lets you watch all the game's cinematic moments. Similarly, a 'CODECS' option allows you to relisten to all codec conversations. The 'CHAPTER' Menu now lets you play only the Boss battles. In the 'OPTIONS' Menu, 'GRAPHIC OPTIONS' give you control over resolution, anti-aliasing, and more. A special 'ZANGEKI' option lets you customize how many cuts Raiden can make.

Persona 5 Royal delivers the ultimate role-playing game experience, now enriched with a comprehensive collection of downloadable content. This acclaimed edition places you in the role of a high school student who has been unjustly transferred to a new school in Tokyo. Shortly after arriving, you experience a disturbing premonition: "You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you."

Tasked with a daunting "rehabilitation" program, you must challenge and liberate others from their corrupted desires. To accomplish this, you embrace the identity of a Phantom Thief, a clandestine group dedicated to fighting for justice.

Persona 5 Royal boasts several key features:

*   **Vibrant Tokyo Exploration:** Discover and navigate the bustling streets and hidden corners of Tokyo.
*   **Persona Mastery:** Acquire and hone potent supernatural abilities to aid your cause.
*   **Personalized Thieves Den:** Design and customize your own secret sanctuary.
*   **Branching Narrative Paths:** Your decisions profoundly influence the story's outcome and lead to multiple endings.

Embrace your destiny as the ultimate Phantom Thief, challenge societal norms, and unearth your true potential. Fight for justice in this definitive iteration of Persona 5 Royal, which notably includes over 40 previously released downloadable content packs. For an even more immersive experience, you can select between original Japanese and English voice-overs.

**Beat Saber: The Immersive Rhythm Game That Puts You in the Action**

Experience a rhythm game like no other with Beat Saber, an immersive virtual reality title that places you at the heart of the action. In this futuristic world, you'll wield virtual sabers to slash through pulsing music beats, precisely timed to a variety of handcrafted levels. Each beat requires you to use the correct saber and match the indicated direction, transforming you into a dancing superhero.

Beat Saber offers a truly unique gameplay experience by seamlessly blending music and visual effects. Unlike many rhythm games that rely on generated content, Beat Saber's music and levels are meticulously crafted by hand to elevate the auditory and visual experience.

Beyond the solo adventure, Beat Saber allows you to connect with others. Challenge friends or compete against players worldwide in thrilling multiplayer matches. For those seeking a structured challenge, the Campaign mode offers objectives and tasks designed to improve your skills daily. Climb the global leaderboards and test your mettle against other Beat Saberists across various difficulty levels.

The game's design prioritizes accessibility, making it easy to learn the fundamental mechanics. While simple to pick up and play, mastering Beat Saber offers a rewarding challenge. Furthermore, the dynamic gameplay provides an excellent form of exercise, as you'll find yourself dancing and slashing to the rhythm, keeping you actively engaged.

**Okami HD: A Legendary Adventure Reimagined**

Embark on an unforgettable journey with **Okami HD**, a visually stunning masterpiece. This beloved game features a unique Sumi-e ink art style, now presented in breathtaking high definition.

In **Okami HD**, you play as **Amaterasu**, the Japanese sun goddess, who takes the form of a legendary white wolf. Your crucial mission is to:

*   **Defeat Orochi**, an eight-headed demon that has plunged the world of Nippon into a ruined wasteland.
*   **Restore Nippon** to its former glory.

Okami HD offers players a choice in presentation:

*   Enjoy the game in a **modern widescreen** format.
*   Relive the experience in the **original 4:3 ratio**.

The game also includes interactive loading screens, a nostalgic feature from the original title.

**Mission: It's Complicated: A Visual Novel Where Love and Saving the World Collide**

Dive into **Mission: It's Complicated**, a unique visual novel that masterfully blends **superhero action with romantic relationships**. You'll guide five distinct heroes through thrilling nighttime missions, where their safety is paramount. Any injuries sustained could jeopardize their attendance at crucial daytime dates, making **strategic choices essential**. Success hinges on fostering strong bonds between your preferred hero pairings, which unlocks more opportunities for romantic or platonic encounters. This story-driven adventure emphasizes the impact of your decisions, as selecting the right dialogue is key to their developing affection. The ultimate goal? To help them find love while they **save the world**.

The game offers a charming narrative filled with engaging features. Developers describe it as full of "**heart and humor**," boasting delightful puns and genuinely moving emotional moments. A key gameplay element is the freedom to "**choose your OTP**," allowing any of the five heroes to be paired with any other to achieve victory. Beyond romance, the game highlights the value of platonic relationships through "**friend dates**." Winning the game can be achieved through either romantic or platonic love, depending on the chosen pair. Every pairing is guaranteed a happy ending, but the true challenge lies in uncovering the "**ULTIMATE happy ending**." The game also humorously notes a "**serious lack of beds**."

Visually, the game presents "**super cute art**" that serves as a delightful treat. With over 100,000 words, it offers a reading experience akin to a novel. Notably, *Mission: It's Complicated* features "**NO voice acting**," encouraging players to imagine their favorite voice actors for each character. The game is also proudly **LGBTQ+ friendly**. For those eager to explore all possible outcomes, a **skip function** allows bypassing completed missions while still earning credit, accelerating the discovery of all endings and "**juicy dates**." In a refreshing approach, *Mission: It's Complicated* is **entirely free to download and play**, with no hidden microtransactions. Developers also offer special Valentine's Day cards, embodying the spirit of "**sharing is caring**," and include "**fun gifs**" to enhance the player experience.

Street Fighter IV revitalizes the iconic fighting game series by blending the **beloved mechanics of Street Fighter II** with cutting-edge technology for an **unparalleled martial arts simulation**.

The game recaptures the **essence of what made Street Fighter II a worldwide sensation**. Players can choose from a roster of **classic, fan-favorite characters** like Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li, and Guile. They are joined by **exciting new fighters**, including Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus.

Street Fighter IV presents **stylized 3D characters and environments** while maintaining the **classic 2D gameplay perspective** familiar to fans. This is enhanced by dynamic 3D camera work. The **traditional six-button control scheme** is back, now augmented with numerous **new special moves and gameplay features**. Street Fighter IV offers a **renewed fighting game experience** for all players.

**Key Features of Street Fighter IV:**

*   **Visually striking 3D environments and characters** with a distinctive artistic style.
*   **Classic 2D Street Fighter gameplay** using the familiar six-button control layout.
*   **A diverse roster of 25 fighters**, featuring:
    *   **Reimagined classic Street Fighter characters**.
    *   **Brand-new combatants** such as the super-spy Crimson Viper, the luchador El Fuerte, and the mixed martial artist Abel.
*   **Revolutionary new special moves** that enhance combat, including:
    *   **Focus Attacks**
    *   **Super Combos**
    *   The impactful **Ultra Combo system**
*   **Fresh gameplay elements** designed to engage both newcomers and seasoned players.
*   **Robust online multiplayer** for global competition.
*   **Exclusive PC visual shaders** that offer unique artistic filters like Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink.

OPUS: Echo of Starsong - Full Bloom Edition offers the ultimate experience of this visual novel-style adventure game, now enhanced with brand-new voice acting. Embark on an unforgettable intergalactic journey where love transcends time.

This captivating narrative centers on the mysterious 'Starsongs' emitted by asteroids, which have become a focal point of conflict due to their immense power. Driven by a desire to claim these celestial treasures, a young man sets out with a unique girl. She possesses the extraordinary ability to imitate starsongs, using her voice to unravel an ancient cosmic myth.

"I will claim the starsongs and bring honor to the clan," vows Jun, an exile seeking redemption for his people. His solitary quest gains momentum when he encounters Eda, a witch attuned to the resonant sounds of asteroids. What begins as a serendipitous meeting evolves into a profound, life-altering commitment.

Eda, the female protagonist, can perceive the powerful vibrations of starsongs emanating from space, guiding their vessel toward their origin. Jun, the male protagonist, meticulously explores asteroids, searching for the source of these songs within magnificent, ancient temples that guard their profound secrets.

Their voyage will introduce them to a diverse cast of characters. From shrewd starsong intel brokers to vigilant asteroid excavation enforcement officers, some will present challenges, while others will emerge as steadfast allies. Many inhabitants of Thousand Peaks carry personal tales of the conflicts that have scarred their homeland. As you connect with each character, you will uncover the complex and troubled history of this solar system.

The primary setting, Thousand Peaks, has endured prolonged chaos since the war. Your mission is to guide the crew through the territories of various factions, gathering crucial intelligence on the legendary starsongs. OPUS: Echo of Starsong is fundamentally a narrative-driven experience. While light puzzles and resource management are integrated, the gameplay remains straightforward, ensuring an accessible and engaging adventure for all players.

**Bayonetta Arrives on PC: Experience Witchcraft in a High-Octane Action Game**

SEGA has released the celebrated action game *Bayonetta* for PC. In this thrilling title, you step into the shoes of the last witch from an ancient lineage. Your crucial role is to maintain the delicate balance between light, dark, and chaos. After a 500-year slumber, Bayonetta awakens to a world in disarray. She must confront formidable angels and colossal adversaries in a pure action-packed adventure. For the optimal gameplay experience, **a controller is highly recommended when playing *Bayonetta* on PC**.

This PC edition boasts numerous enhancements. **Experience significantly improved graphics**, with support for resolutions up to 4K. The game also offers extensive graphics customization options. These include settings for anti-aliasing, filtering, lighting, and adjustable texture and shadow quality. Furthermore, *Bayonetta* on PC features **complete Steam integration**. This encompasses Achievements, Cloud Saves, Trading Cards, Leaderboards, and Big Picture Mode. You can **effortlessly switch between English and Japanese voiceovers**, complete with synchronized text. Critics have praised *Bayonetta* for its **deadly grace**, highlighting its stylish protagonist and its ability to push sensory boundaries. Prepare for **climax action** filled with exhilarating combat sequences set against stunning backdrops, promising endless excitement. The **flashy combat system** is both accessible and fluid. Master a variety of weapons and unleash devastating combos. Additionally, you can harness **supernatural powers**, including brutal torture attacks, to vanquish your enemies.

Neon White is a high-octane first-person action game where players are tasked with eliminating demons in the celestial realm of Heaven. You embody White, a former assassin summoned from Hell, who must compete against other skilled demon slayers for the ultimate prize: permanent residency in Heaven. Intriguingly, the other assassins you encounter bear a striking resemblance to individuals from your past.

The gameplay centers around Neon White, an assassin specifically chosen from Hell to vie for redemption by battling demons. A core mechanic involves collecting "Soul Cards," which can be used for offensive attacks or discarded to activate unique movement abilities. Players are encouraged to strategically combine these cards to discover hidden shortcuts and achieve the fastest times. Beyond the combat, the game invites players to unravel the mysteries of Heaven by forging relationships with the other assassins, hinting at a shared history from a previous existence.

Experience the thrill of intense one-on-one combat with Street Fighter® V! This acclaimed fighting game invites you to select from a roster of 16 legendary characters, each boasting a unique personal narrative and distinct training challenges. Engage in battles against friends, either online or in local multiplayer, utilizing a wide array of match options designed for diverse playstyles.

Earn in-game currency, known as Fight Money, by competing in Ranked Matches. For a more relaxed experience, enjoy Casual Matches, or host private sessions in a Battle Lounge to determine bragging rights among your friends. A significant feature is the cross-play compatibility, allowing PlayStation 4 and Steam players to face off against each other.

This iteration of Street Fighter V prominently features the "Arcade Edition" title screen and incorporates several engaging modes. These include Arcade Mode, Team Battle Mode, and the online-enabled Extra Battle Mode, which offers opportunities to earn valuable rewards, experience points (XP), and Fight Money. This Fight Money can then be strategically used to acquire additional characters, cosmetic costumes, new stages, and more.

Dive into the cinematic story mode, "A Shadow Falls," available for FREE download. In this narrative, the formidable M. Bison unleashes seven Black Moons into orbit, bestowing upon him immense power as the world descends into darkness.

For the ultimate Street Fighter V experience, consider Street Fighter V: Champion Edition. This comprehensive package includes all content from the original release and Street Fighter V: Arcade Edition, with the exception of Fighting Chance costumes, brand collaboration costumes, and Capcom Pro Tour DLC. Furthermore, it integrates every character, stage, and costume released after the Arcade Edition, resulting in an impressive collection of 40 characters, 34 stages, and over 200 costumes.

Mastering the game's unique mechanics is key to victory. V-Trigger 1 and 2 allow you to unleash powerful, character-specific techniques and exclusive moves. By activating these triggers when your V-Gauge is full, you can inflict substantial damage or execute a crucial comeback. V-Skills 1 and 2 are fundamental to building your strategy and filling your V-Gauge. Each V-Skill provides your character with a distinct move or ability that aids in V-Gauge progression.

Control the flow of battle with V-Reversal. This defensive maneuver, costing one V-Gauge stock, can effectively halt an opponent's assault, granting you valuable space to initiate your own offense.

Special Attacks and EX Special Attacks are cornerstones of Street Fighter's strategic depth.
