An entirely new campaign map that stretches from Macedonia to Greece and into the heart of the ancient Persian Empire New campaign game that tasks players with matching the exploits of Alexander the Great as he swept across Central Asia and dominated the Persian Empire Four new factions including the Macedonians, Persians and Indians Over 25 new units, including Alexander's own renowned historical troops Historical Alexander the Great campaign with six new historical battles that unlock sequentially, telling the story of Alexander and providing a historical backdrop to each of the battles All-new movies to support the Alexander campaign, with professional voiceovers by actor Brian Blessed (Alexander, Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace)

**Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition: A Grand Strategy Journey Through the Roman Republic**

Dive into the heart of ancient history with Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition, a comprehensive package that merges the acclaimed grand strategy game Europa Universalis: Rome with its substantial expansion, Vae Victis. This title invites you to experience a pivotal era of world history, meticulously crafted by masters of the genre. Immerse yourself in the grandeur of the greatest cultural and military civilizations, brought to life with remarkable strategic and tactical depth.

Set during the flourishing Roman Republic, a time when the Senate held sway over the vast empire, Vae Victis introduces a wealth of additions and enhancements to Europa Universalis: Rome. This expansion significantly enriches a game already renowned for its expansive portrayal of the era. A primary focus of Vae Victis is the overhaul of the game's government systems, designed to foster more fluid and balanced gameplay. The historical figures of the ancient world have also undergone a significant transformation, with improvements across various aspects. Furthermore, the addition of new missions, decisions, and laws ensures that Vae Victis is brimming with fresh content.

As noted by Paradox Development Studio, the creators of the game, "Vae Victis is an expansion packed with a huge amount of new content." This sentiment is echoed in the game's features.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive 3D Map:** Explore a fully 3D map with integrated graphics and detailed topography, offering a visually rich representation of the ancient world.
*   **Flexible Starting Dates:** Begin your campaign at any point between 280 B.C. and 27 B.C., allowing for diverse historical playthroughs.
*   **Vast Civilizations and Factions:** Choose from 10 distinct cultures, including Roman, Celtic, Greek, and Egyptian, with over 53 playable factions spread across hundreds of provinces.
*   **Dynamic Character Development:** Witness your characters evolve new traits through political intrigue and interactions with thousands of other individuals.
*   **Strategic Gameplay:** Engage in trade, diplomacy, and warfare with neighboring powers, and advance your technologies to achieve dominance over the Mediterranean World.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Challenge up to 32 players in competitive or cooperative multiplayer modes.

**New Key Features in Vae Victis:**

*   **Advanced Military AI:** Experience a completely revised military AI, particularly in the execution of military campaigns, leading to more challenging and realistic battles.
*   **Living Characters:** The characters within the Republic will truly come to life, possessing their own personal goals and agendas. As one developer stated, "The dynamics of the characters that live in the Republic will come to life as the men and women have their own personal goals and agendas."
*   **Senate Influence:** As a republic, you will now need to actively consider the Senate's influence. Characters will align with various parties based on their objectives, values, and ambitions.
*   **Monarchy and Tribal Courts:** Monarchies and Tribes will feature their own distinct courts. Be wary of ambitious individuals, as "bootlickers and sycophants who will stop at nothing to replace your divinely appointed ruler."

**Don Bradman Cricket 17: A New Era of Cricket Simulation**

**Don Bradman Cricket 17** offers a significant leap forward in cricket gaming. The game introduces an **enhanced control system** designed for greater **precision** in batting, bowling, and fielding. Players can now **execute a wider range of shots**, including the helicopter, reverse sweep, and scoop, enabling more **dynamic and aggressive batting**.

Bowling mechanics have also been refined. The game allows for **strategic bowling choices** to outsmart opponents. This includes the ability to seamlessly blend **fast bowling variations**, such as leg-cutters and off-cutters, with **spin deliveries** like the doosra and googly. The fielding system enhances realism with a new **'reflex catching' mechanic**, alongside lifelike slides, boundary saves, and relay throws.

A **comprehensive career mode** allows players to forge their own path, beginning as either an **established cricketer** or a **rookie** in club competitions. Notably, **Don Bradman Cricket 17** is the **first title in the series** to feature **motion-captured professional cricketers**, including **female athletes**, across all game modes.

The game also boasts a **groundbreaking stadium and logo creator**, empowering you to **design and share your unique creations**. Community engagement is further amplified through the ability to download and play with **a vast library of user-generated content**, including players, teams, umpires, stadiums, and logos.

*An internet connection is required for the initial launch of the game. Offline play is available once the main menu is loaded.*

**Cricket Captain 2014: Take the Helm of the Ultimate Cricket Simulation**

Get ready for the **2014 season** with Cricket Captain, the acclaimed cricket management simulation that's better than ever! This latest installment boasts a **stunning new interface**, a **revamped 3D graphics engine**, and the **meticulous attention to detail** that fans have come to expect. With one of the most thrilling cricket seasons in a decade on the horizon, it's the perfect time to **step into the captain's shoes** and lead your team to glory.

Cricket Captain 2014 offers a wealth of gameplay options and features designed to immerse you in the action:

*   **A Beautifully Redesigned Interface:** Experience a **sleek and intuitive design** that significantly enhances your overall gameplay.
*   **Enhanced Match Highlights:** Feel the **atmosphere and excitement** of the game with improved visual and audio cues.
*   **New Stadiums:** Look forward to the addition of **brand-new stadiums** shortly after the game's release.
*   **Classic Rivalries:** Relive iconic moments with **Classic England vs. India scenarios**, recreating legendary test series.
*   **Exciting Cup Modes:** Compete in the **World Cup, Twenty Over Cup, and Champions Cup** for ultimate bragging rights.
*   **Domestic and International Management:** Take charge of teams from the **English, Australian, and Indian leagues**, or lead an international squad – or even both!
*   **All-Time Greats Series:** Pit your skills against **current stars or legendary 'All-Time Greats'** in international series.
*   **Improved Online Play:** The **updated and enhanced online engine** allows for seamless internet play, including improved detection of edited teams.
*   **Refined Match Engine:** Experience **unparalleled realism** across all match formats thanks to further refinements to the core game engine.

**Choose Your Challenge:**

*   Captain teams in **twenty over, one-day, or first-class formats**, for both domestic and international competitions.

**Comprehensive Data and Statistics:**

*   **Complete Statistical Update:** Benefit from a **thorough update of all player and team statistics**.
*   **In-Depth Player Database:** Explore a **vast database of over 4000 players**, featuring every current first-class and limited-over player globally.
*   **Updated Records:** Access **revised partnership and team records** for first-class, one-day, and twenty-over matches.
*   **Up-to-Date Squads:** Get the latest **county, state, and domestic twenty over squads** for the new season.
*   **Detailed Fixtures:** Navigate **comprehensive domestic and international fixture lists**, complete with updated competition formats and rules.

**Cricket Captain 2016: The Ultimate Cricket Management Experience**

The highly acclaimed cricket management game is back with the release of **Cricket Captain 2016**. This installment offers cricket enthusiasts worldwide an unparalleled opportunity to showcase their strategic prowess. Developed in collaboration with Chris Rogers, captain of Somerset County Cricket Club and a former Australian opener, Cricket Captain 2016 boasts an expanded roster of playable teams and an array of exciting new features.

Widely recognized as the premier cricket management simulation, Cricket Captain 2016 elevates the gameplay to new heights. It introduces **new teams**, a **stunningly redesigned interface**, an **updated 3D graphics engine**, and the meticulous attention to detail that fans have come to expect from the series.

**Key features for 2016 include:**

*   **Extensive Playable Teams:** Engage with **79 playable domestic teams** spanning **5 domestic leagues**. This includes the addition of **12 new teams** from the New Zealand and South African domestic cricket leagues.
*   **World Cup Tournament Modes:** Experience updated **One Day International (ODI)** and **20-over (T20) World Cup Tournament modes**. You can now play as any international team that participated in the last two World Cups, including nations like Afghanistan, Hong Kong, Ireland, Netherlands, Oman, Scotland, and the UAE.
*   **New Match Features:** Enjoy the thrill of **Day/Night matches** enhanced by a **new 3D lighting system**.
*   **Improved Match Engine:** Benefit from an **improved One Day and T20 match engine**, coupled with **enhanced player form calculation** for these formats.
*   **Updated Visuals:** Features **updated kits for International teams**.
*   **Historical Scenarios:** Dive into **Sri Lanka and Pakistan historical scenarios**.
*   **Enhanced Database:** A **new database** offers **improved player ability ratings**.
*   **User-Friendly Interface:** Navigate the game with a **new and improved interface**.
*   **In-Game Support:** Access an **In-Game Help System** for assistance.
*   **Achievements:** Track your progress with **new Achievements**.

Name: VR Batting
Description:
'VR Batting' is a virtual reality cricket simulator made for the HTC Vive. Pickup the bat, take guard and play! From smashing the ball out of the park to playing textbook cover drives, play real cricket shots all over the ground in a virtual cricket field. Features: - 360 degree freedom of stroke-play. - Face deliveries of up to 100 miles per hour and challenge your reflexes. - Variations in deliveries: Medium-Fast, Fast, Conventional Swing, Reverse Spin and Spin. - Shred the ball past the fielders and battle against their AI to score runs. - Two game modes: 5 Overs Mode and Survival Mode. - Bat right handed or left handed. - Leaderboards for highest score, survival mode and six distance, to compete against players from around the world. - Immersive look and feel enhanced with haptic and audio feedback. Upcoming features: - Game achievements - Different fielding settings

**Cricket 19: Your Path to Global Championship Glory!**

**Experience the ultimate cricket simulation** with Cricket 19, the definitive game for aspiring champions. Developed by Big Ant Studios, renowned for their **authentic and realistic cricket experiences**, Cricket 19 puts you in complete command. **Guide your team from local club matches all the way to international stardom**, competing in thrilling T20, ODI, and Test Match formats.

**Unleash your creativity** with the acclaimed Cricket Academy. **Design your own clubs, stadiums, sponsor logos, and uniforms** to perfectly replicate your favorite local rivalries and dramatic moments. **Shape the destiny of a rookie player**, starting from their humble beginnings in junior club cricket. **Excel on the field, and you'll soon find yourself leading your nation** onto the grandest stages.

**Key features that set Cricket 19 apart include:**

*   **An incredibly deep creator suite:** **Craft unique players, stadiums, logos, and scenarios** to personalize your game.
*   **Comprehensive format support:** **Dominate in T20, ODI, and Test Matches**, experiencing the full spectrum of cricket.
*   **Intelligent AI and tactics:** **Face realistic opponents** that employ genuine world-class strategies.
*   **Vast team selection:** **Choose from dozens of teams** to begin your journey to victory.

**Cricket Captain 2017: A Deep Dive into Management Simulation**

Cricket Captain 2017 offers a rich cricket management experience, building on its established legacy with notable improvements. A significant highlight is the game's **largest-ever domestic team roster**, featuring **130 playable teams** across eight countries. This **major expansion**, influenced by cricket star Jimmy Anderson, introduces **new T20 leagues** in the West Indies, South Africa, Pakistan, and Bangladesh. Players can now **fully immerse themselves** in the domestic leagues of the West Indies and Pakistan, providing **considerable depth** for simulation enthusiasts. Gaming publications have praised the game's **improved statistics**, which include **detailed ground and international records**, alongside an **updated visual style** and a **more fluid match system**.

The game introduces **three new domestic structures**, granting players **greater control** over their management decisions. Key features include:

*   **Participation in all major global T20 leagues**: These span India, England, Australia, the West Indies, Pakistan, South Africa, Bangladesh, and New Zealand.
*   **Extensive records**: Access detailed records for individual players, teams, and partnerships across over 130 grounds and all ten Test-playing nations in various formats.
*   **New grounds**: Four new, meticulously designed grounds have been added: Cardiff, Taunton, Bristol, and Hobart. Existing grounds have also been refreshed.
*   **Historical scenarios**: Relive iconic cricket moments from England vs. South Africa and England vs. West Indies matches.

Early reviews from outlets like PC Gamer highlighted a **revamped database** that enhances player skill and type accuracy for **more realistic gameplay**.

The **expanded domestic play allows for deep immersion**. Here's a breakdown of the domestic leagues:

*   **Pakistan**: Manage one of **16 domestic teams** and **6 T20 franchise sides**.
*   **West Indies**: Features **12 playable teams** in both domestic and franchise leagues.
*   **Bangladesh**: Offers **8 playable T20 teams**.
*   **South Africa**: A **new T20 league begins** in this region.

The **updated season and interface** bring a fresh feel to the 2017 edition. This includes an updated English domestic season with 8 teams in Division 1, reflecting Durham's penalty. Tournament modes have also been updated, featuring the **significant 2017 Champions Trophy**. **New challenges** are available to unlock, further enhancing the simulation's **replay value**.

Name: JUST BAT (VR CRICKET)
Description:
JUST BAT is a revolutionary new VR CRICKET game that allows you to master the art of batting. An innovative new control system allows unrivalled control of shots in any style and direction. Set high scores and compete with others around the world. Features Include: - Spin and Fast Bowling - Ball Speed Control - Ball Line and Length Control - Helmet View - Feedback on Bat-Ball Collision Position - Force Feedback - Two Game Modes: 5 Over Challenge and Free Play - A Global Leader Board for the 5 Over Challenge - AI Fielders - Pick Gaps and Score Runs - Bowler Animation - Full Freedom with Shot Selection - Separate Field Settings and Bowling Configurations for Left and Right Hand Batsmen

Cricket Captain 2021 offers a deep dive into managing a dynamic cricket season. This year, the game introduces **exciting new competitions**, including the **inaugural Test Match Championship** and a **new ODI World Championship**. These events provide a clear path for teams to qualify for the 2023 World Cup. Reflecting the sport's evolution, the game also debuts the **100 Ball competition**, a fast-paced, strategic short-format game. You can guide your chosen team through these and many other thrilling tournaments and formats.

Significant improvements enhance the 20 Over match simulation in Cricket Captain 2021. A **rebalanced match engine** and an updated **batting aggression bar** provide finer control over scoring. Realism is boosted with more outfield catches when batsmen play aggressively. The old target Run Per Over (RPO) indicator is replaced by an **estimated RPO (E.RPO) system**, which incorporates bowler tactics for more accurate scoring predictions. In 20 Over matches, **dot ball percentage** now replaces maidens, offering a clearer view of bowler performance. The thrilling **Super Over**, a one-over tie-breaker, also makes its debut.

The English domestic system is fully updated with the latest competition rules and overseas player regulations. The South African domestic system has also been revitalized, adding **15 new teams**. Cricket Captain 2021 features a comprehensive database update with new statistics for the **fastest 50s and 100s** across various records, presenting opportunities to break historical benchmarks. The game continues to advance cricket management simulation, offering numerous options for achieving championship success.

**Ashes Cricket: Experience the Iconic Rivalry**

**Ashes Cricket** is the officially licensed video game that puts you right into the heart of cricket's most famous contest. This game captures the **excitement, powerful hitting, and strategic depth** that define this legendary competition. You'll experience the Ashes with incredible realism, feeling like you're part of the action. Lead your team to glory in the **2017/2018 men's and women's Ashes tours**.

Using Big Ant's advanced **photogrammetry technology**, Ashes Cricket features **realistic player models** for all the Australian and English men's and women's teams. This technology creates an immersive experience, making you feel like you're at the actual matches. As one developer mentioned, "Key Test players have been **fully motion-captured** for authentic on-field movements." Players can also customize their play by choosing their preferred **batting or bowling style**. Big Ant's most advanced cricket engine yet offers **true 360-degree batting**, ensuring a unique experience for every player.

This game is the most **complete and true-to-life cricket simulation** available, packed with features:

*   **Deep Career Mode:** Begin as a rookie, hone your skills in local matches, and climb to the international level, or jump straight in as a star player.
*   **Extensive Customization:** The **Cricket Academy** lets you create your own players, teams, and even umpires. You can then share your creations with players worldwide.
*   **Real Stadiums:** Play in all the **official stadiums** that hosted the 2017/18 Ashes tour.
*   **Create Your Own Tournaments:** Design your own **stadiums and logos** to make your gaming experience truly your own.
*   **Online Competition:** Compete against players globally in what is considered the **most challenging online cricket game** available.

Cricket Revolution offers an immersive PC cricket experience, placing you directly into the heart of the game. It boasts innovative gameplay mechanics, a variety of engaging modes, and intelligent AI opponents designed to provide a significant challenge. Get ready for thrilling online matches as you strive to ascend the global leaderboards.

Key features of Cricket Revolution include:

*   **Authentic Batting:** Experience precise shot control through intuitive controls. Player attributes, unique abilities, and lifelike animations contribute to a satisfying batting experience. As one developer noted, "Our goal was to give players complete command over every shot."
*   **Award System:** The game recognizes your achievements. Outstanding performances, high scores, hat-tricks, and extended winning streaks are celebrated with **special awards**.
*   **Comprehensive Statistics:** Every run, wicket, and century is meticulously recorded. Review past scores, your batting history, detailed averages, and wicket tallies to **strategize your climb** up the leaderboards.
*   **Enhanced Bowling:** A **reimagined bowling system** grants bowlers fine-tuned control over speed, spin, swing, seam movement, and specialized deliveries. This empowers bowlers to employ **clever strategies** to outmaneuver their adversaries.
*   **Worldwide Competition:** Engage with players globally on the **online leaderboards**. The game features a **vibrant online community** with features such as chat, friend lists, organized tournaments, and **sophisticated ranking systems**.

Name: OMORI
Description:
Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and foes. Navigate through the vibrant and the mundane in order to uncover a forgotten past. When the time comes, the path you’ve chosen will determine your fate... and perhaps the fate of others as well.

Rakuen is a touching adventure game that invites you to step into the shoes of a young boy in a hospital. His deepest wish is to visit the **magical world** from his beloved storybook and seek a favor from the Guardian of the Forest. To make this dream a reality, the Boy must aid his fellow patients by engaging with their fantasy counterparts and conquering various challenges.

These challenges include helping:

*   A **grumpy old man** who guards a broken music box and longs for companionship.
*   A young woman in a coma, whose **devoted husband** remains faithfully by her side.
*   A young girl grieving a friend she couldn't say goodbye to before becoming ill.

As the Boy ventures through the hospital, he uncovers that his neighbors' struggles and untold stories are **deeply intertwined** with the mysterious institution. A *GameSpot* review highlighted Rakuen's exploration of "themes of loss, memory, and the power of connection in a truly unique way."

**Key Features:**

*   **Heartfelt Story:** Immerse yourself in a moving narrative filled with **unforgettable characters**.
*   **Unique Gameplay:** This serene adventure combines charming dungeon exploration, clever escape room puzzles, and **story-driven mysteries**.
*   **Empathy and Healing:** Experience each character's unresolved issues to help them find **peace and closure**.
*   **Original Music:** Enjoy a **unique soundtrack** featuring vocal tracks, each reflecting a character's personal journey.
*   **Fostering Community:** Collect items and build relationships to cultivate a **warmer hospital environment**.
*   **Imaginative Quests:** Undertake **fantastical quests** alongside mythical creatures in a dreamlike setting.

Name: Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass
Description:
Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass is a Japanese-style RPG made by a guy from Texas. It was very much influenced by SNES-era jRPGs, particularly Earthbound , Final Fantasy 5 , and the Breath of Fire series, among others. It was also heavily influenced by Yume Nikki . The game takes place in the dream of an eight-year-old boy. When an alien entity appears and threatens his family and the stability of the dream world itself, Jimmy sets out on an adventure to save his family and eradicate the threat of the Pulsating Mass. Along the way, Jimmy will have to work with his family, confront his own shortcomings, and brave the creeping nightmares of his subconscious. Features: -Full-length Japanese-style RPG. -Classic turn-based combat with some modern sensibilities. -A big emphasis on exploration. -As an empathetic kid, Jimmy gains the ability to imagine himself as several of the monsters he meets, allowing him to interact with the world in new ways. -These different transformations can also be leveled up, granting Jimmy higher stats and new abilities. -A story for adults delivered from the perspective of a child. -Jokes. -Unspeakable horrors. Note: for some versions of Mac, the game may not be able to save if you've placed the game in the root '/Applications' folder. Instead, put it somewhere in your home folder, such as '~/Documents.'​​

**Reliving Life's Dreams: A Journey to the Moon**

In a remarkable service, Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts provide a profound opportunity: the chance to experience your entire life from its very beginning, all within the confines of your own mind. This unique procedure is designed for individuals on their deathbeds, offering them a final chance to realize lifelong dreams that remained unfulfilled. The life they construct becomes their ultimate memory, creating a deeply personal and meaningful conclusion.

This narrative centers on the doctors as they assist an elderly man named Johnny in fulfilling his most cherished dying wish. Their journey takes them through his past in reverse, uncovering scattered fragments of his life and gradually revealing the motivations behind his ultimate desire. Johnny's poignant wish is to **go to the moon**.

"To the Moon" is celebrated as a story-driven adventure that places a strong emphasis on emotional resonance and thoughtful exploration, rather than combat. It artfully combines adventure game mechanics with the classic aesthetics of RPGs, resulting in a distinctive gameplay experience. The critically acclaimed original soundtrack further elevates the emotional journey, and the entire experience is expertly crafted with a singular focus on narrative impact, ensuring no element detracts from the core story.

**Finding Paradise: A Second Chance at Life**

Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts provide a unique service: the chance to relive your life from the very beginning. This profound experience happens entirely within the patient's mind. Because the procedure is so intense, the new life becomes the final memory before the patient passes away. This operation is therefore reserved for those on their deathbeds, aiming to fulfill lifelong wishes that were never realized.

**Finding Paradise**, the second full episode in the **To the Moon** series, centers on the doctors' latest patient, Colin. As Rosalene and Watts delve into his memories, they must reconstruct a life that appears sharply divided. Their main challenge is to fulfill a wish that, at first glance, seems impossible to achieve. Importantly, **Finding Paradise** is a **standalone full game**, just like its predecessor **To the Moon**. This means you can enjoy Colin's story without playing any previous games in the series.

**Impostor Factory** is a **truly unique narrative adventure** that promises a **wild and unforgettable ride**. The game's core revolves around **Quincy**, who receives a **mysterious invitation** to an **exclusive, lavish party** held at a **secluded mansion**. Despite the **inherent suspicion** surrounding the location, Quincy succumbs to the **allure of the opulent event** and decides to attend.

Upon entering the mansion, Quincy stumbles upon an **astonishing discovery**: a **fully functional time machine** conveniently located in the bathroom. This peculiar amenity offers a **remarkably efficient way to multitask**, seamlessly blending personal hygiene with **temporal displacement**. However, the festivities soon take a **sinister turn** as guests begin to meet their demise. The situation rapidly escalates, introducing **unnerving Lovecraftian elements and writhing tentacles** into the unfolding chaos. This **bizarre and unsettling turn of events** comprises approximately **one-third of the game's entire plot**.

The game is meticulously crafted to **evoke powerful emotional responses** from players. It masterfully blends **classic adventure game mechanics** with **distinctive RPG visuals**, forging a **truly unique atmosphere**. The dialogue is deliberately written to be **unsettling yet strangely fitting**, contributing to the game's **eerie charm**. **Impostor Factory** is presented as a **tightly paced experience**, deliberately **free of any superfluous content or time-wasting elements**, ensuring every moment is impactful.

Regarding its place within a larger narrative, **Impostor Factory** can be thoroughly enjoyed as a **completely standalone experience**. While it shares thematic connections, it is **not strictly a sequel** to acclaimed titles like ***To the Moon*** or ***Finding Paradise***. Its precise relationship to these games is intentionally left **ambiguous**, leaving open the possibility of it being a sequel, a prequel, or even **both**. Crucially, **no prior knowledge** of any other games is necessary to fully appreciate and engage with **Impostor Factory**.

**OneShot: A Unique Puzzle Adventure with a Meta Twist**

Explore *OneShot*, a captivating puzzle adventure game offering a truly unique experience. Available at www.oneshot-game.com, you will guide a child through an enigmatic world on a monumental mission: to reignite its long-extinguished sun. This quest is far from straightforward, as the world is aware of your presence, and your actions have tangible consequences. The very possibility of saving this dying realm hangs precariously in the balance, a constant reminder that you only have **one shot**.

*OneShot* distinguishes itself with innovative gameplay mechanics that extend beyond the confines of the game window, creating a deeply immersive experience. This is complemented by:

*   A haunting original soundtrack
*   Distinctive artwork that perfectly captures the game's atmosphere

A profound and unique relationship develops between the game and its player. This fosters a persistent sense that the complete narrative unfolds only for those who delve deeper and seek out hidden clues.

**Content Warning:** While *OneShot* does not fall into the horror genre conventionally, certain elements within the game may evoke feelings of paranoia. Players are advised to proceed with caution.

**Regarding Closing the Game Window:**

*   It is entirely safe to close the game window.
*   This action serves solely to save your progress.

Name: The Chronicles of Nyanya
Description:
Thrilling like a payday, a story of cats in funny costumes that do RPGish things. It is full of many unexpected and incredible twists, the tragedies of an individual lured into the trap of an adventourist internship, and friendly pastry, which is very sensitive to nihilism. The game also contains many thrilling conversations, walking around the map with some logical puzzles sprinkled in here and there – but don’t worry, even a liberal arts student should be able to solve them – raising pastry, and deliberations about important moral and existential issues, the majority of which will affect the ending you get. The ending will sum up the fates of the most important characters, in-game achievements, your proficiency in fighting the ultimate bad guy, your finesse in raising pastry and the degree of faith in friendship. This results in dozens of possible ending combinations. After completing the game, you can try NewGame+ to unlock additional, normally unavailable skills for the main character. The world of Nyanya Nyanya is an enormous cat world that can take up to 20 hours to fully explore. The main plotline itself is good for more than 8 hours of fun, but the game also includes many side quests found on numerous maps, hundreds of interactions with NPCs and over a thousand descriptions of nearly everything. You can also find dozens of exciting items such as the legendary Excalipurr and the frightening Berserker Catnip. The role of the majority of animals is played by various kinds of rolls, which, together with cats, pidgins, and sneks, constitute the entirety of Nyanya’s fauna. Kibble is found in mines and on can triis, almost all buildings are boxes (because cardboard boxes are cats’ natural habitat) and cleaning fur is a matter of importance to the state. The sense and logic of this world are therefore highly debatable... But don’t worry about its coherence. We made sure that it is top-notch. All this mess is watched over by cat gods, such as the mysterious Great Bowl of Goodness – a giant stone leg, whose calf disappears in the clouds, Meowrida the Brave – goddess of shooting, and Overcat – the creator of everything that's feline. The game is produced in a retro jRPG style. Party The protagonist of the game is Catair, a meowsassin, who is as optimistic and sweet as sandpaper. When she sets out on her amazing journey, she has the chance to discover friendship, love, and revenge and to travel through many wonderful lands that she does not want to visit... And yet, she has no choice. She will join the party led by the veteran of the war in Furajevo – Francat the clericat. Their adventourist paths will cross with Purrgli, a yes-cat and an outstanding purrior, Catniss – a fighter for friendship and even more friendship, as well as meowmage Meowdledore, whose parents bought him gifts instead of giving him some attention. You can meet them here . Combat The game features tons of epic turn-based jRPG fights, where you will have an opportunity to use dozens of such unique cat techniques as Boot to the Head, Slipper Comet or a Hairball of Darkness. The characters represent traditional classes such as meowsassin, meowmage and purrior. With their powers combined, they are able to face adversities such as student internships and unpaid overtime. Among the dozens of opponents, you will find monstrosities such as orcats, aggressive cat fetuses enchanted in slime, or Purrevar, Prince of the Underpurr. What is more, The Chronicles of Nyanya is probably the only game in which you can charge Nazi furniture on your rollicorn or fight their mysterious Wundermöbelwaffe. Parody and pop culture The game is filled with familiar-sounding places and names. If you love comic books, memes or just pop culture in general, you will feel right at home in Nyanya. You will meet Cateris, talk with Granny Weathercat, Furry Catter and Nyoda and listen to the moving stories of Catmerian guards, who always wanted to be adventourists like you, but they took an arrow to their knees. In other games, references are Easter eggs, in Nyanya they are the main course. Creators The game was created by hamstercube studio, made up of Ilona, author of chatolandia and Adrian. The graphics were created mainly by Revv, known from her Tak bardzo źle blog; Ilona also had something to do with it. The moving music, which tickles your aesthetic sense was composed by Marcin Maślanka, an experienced composer of soundtracks for games and films.

**Echoes of Aetheria: An Epic RPG Adventure**

Prepare for an unforgettable journey with *Echoes of Aetheria*, the latest role-playing game epic from the acclaimed creators of *Skyborn*. This game begins with a classic, yet compelling, premise: a wedding ceremony abruptly interrupted, and the bride spirited away. Your heroes embark on a pursuit, their individual motivations soon converging as their seemingly simple quest to rescue the bride escalates into a grand saga filled with war, love, and profound betrayal.

As you navigate this rich narrative, you will find yourself entangled in a web of treason, defection, and rebellion. You will even play a pivotal role in the very creation of a new nation. The scope of the story expands dynamically with your heroes' progression, culminating in a grand finale where your decisions and their far-reaching consequences will determine the fate of entire nations.

**Key Features:**

*   **Characters Drive the Narrative:** *Echoes of Aetheria* transcends a mere story; it is a deeply personal tale centered on its characters. Each individual is meticulously crafted with distinct dreams, aspirations, motivations, and imperfections. These characters inhabit a world brimming with its own unique legends, intricate intrigue, and compelling drama. This rich tapestry sets the stage for a narrative that evolves from a lighthearted adventure into an epic campaign of unprecedented scale and ambition.

*   **A Welcoming Home Base:** Throughout your travels, you will always have a dedicated home base to return to. This sanctuary is far more than just a place to rest; it serves as the central hub around which the story's events revolve. Here, you can engage in commerce, hone your crafting skills, and converse with your party members to advance plot elements. Additionally, you can test your mettle in the Battle Arena, facing combat challenges for valuable loot and experience points.

*   **Exploration Yields Rich Rewards:** Discovering hidden loot through exploration is just one of the many benefits; you will also gain valuable experience from these concealed caches. Dedicate time to thoroughly explore the world, and you will be amply rewarded for your efforts.

*   **Master the Art of Crafting:** With thousands of items available to craft, salvage, or augment, the crafting system in *Echoes of Aetheria* is remarkably comprehensive. This integrated system allows you to create, purchase, or sell the necessary materials. Those who delve deeply into its intricacies will find themselves significantly rewarded in combat.

*   **Strategic Encounters, Not Randomness:** Enemies in *Echoes of Aetheria* possess their own distinct map artificial intelligence. Will you opt for a direct, forceful approach to overcome encounters, or will you employ stealth to conserve your resources? You can strategically position yourself behind an enemy to gain the crucial advantage of surprise. However, be vigilant, as your adversaries are equally capable of ambushing you.

*   **An Innovative Battle System:** Are you weary of JRPGs that cling to outdated mechanics? *Echoes of Aetheria* introduces a novel 15-tile combat system that utilizes both sides of the battlefield. The positioning and formations of your characters are as critical to success as the skills and spells you deploy.

*   **A Sweeping Orchestral Score:** Immerse yourself in the game's epic soundtrack, meticulously composed to enhance every moment of your adventure.

**Actual Sunlight: An Indie Game Confronting Life's Hardships**

**Actual Sunlight** is an indie game that delves into the **profound loneliness and depression** experienced by its protagonist, Evan Winter. The game poses a challenging question: "Why continue when life feels stagnant?" This text-based adventure is recognized for its **sharp, dark humor** and its candid portrayal of the human condition. It presents a narrative that begins powerfully and concludes with a significant impact, delivering a **challenging, memorable, and emotionally resonant** experience.

The game addresses several difficult themes, including:

*   **Video game addiction**
*   **Unfulfilling employment**
*   **Deep isolation**

Its **distinctive visual aesthetic**, which blends pixel art with CG elements, vividly recreates the city of Toronto, Canada. This visual style is complemented by a **melancholy soundtrack** that effectively establishes the game's atmosphere and mirrors the **cold indifference** of the real world. Creator Will O'Neill states, "**Actual Sunlight explores the search for meaning in a world that frequently appears devoid of it.**" The game contains **explicit language** and explores **mature themes**, such as depression and suicidal ideation, making it **unsuitable for individuals under 18**. Similar to other artistic works that confront difficult subjects, **Actual Sunlight** offers a deeply emotional and thought-provoking journey. For updates, follow creator Will O'Neill on Twitter.

**Football Manager 2019 (FM19)** immerses you in the role of a club manager, where your strategic decisions shape the team's destiny. While players execute plays on the pitch, your tactical acumen is paramount to achieving victory. FM19 delivers a profoundly engaging management experience, enhanced by **innovative features and significant improvements** that offer authentic and dynamic ways to lead your squad. This fosters a compelling narrative as your club progresses.

A standout addition is the **revolutionary new tactics system**. This empowers you to devise distinctive team strategies that mirror contemporary football approaches. The system incorporates novel tactics and game phases, accurately representing modern play. For immediate implementation, pre-set tactics are readily accessible. Furthermore, the **enhanced training system** provides granular control over player development. You can meticulously craft bespoke training sessions and comprehensive plans, mirroring the practices of professional clubs, or delegate this responsibility to your coaching staff. A **comprehensive new manager guide**, expertly curated by your Assistant Manager, systematically introduces the fundamentals of football management, establishing a clear trajectory toward success.

A significant new element in FM19 is the **inclusion of the Bundesliga**. For the first time, you can manage teams in Germany's premier two divisions. Both the Bundesliga and 2. Bundesliga are fully licensed, featuring official club emblems, authentic kits, and realistic player likenesses. The game also boasts a **striking new visual design**. Its contemporary aesthetic is widely regarded as the most **visually appealing and user-friendly** interface to date.

FM19 further introduces **crucial upgrades to match simulation**. These include the integration of **VAR and goal-line technology**, enhancing realism. You will also benefit from **improved agent feedback** during transfer negotiations. Managerial roles are now more dynamic, and pre-match team talks offer **greater detail and impact**. These enhancements, coupled with general interface refinements and new Steam achievements, solidify FM19 as a **more complete and immersive** Football Manager experience.

Rocket League is a popular sports game that blends fast-paced arcade soccer with exciting car action. Its physics-based gameplay and simple controls offer a smooth and fun experience for millions worldwide. The game is easy to learn but has plenty of depth for competitive players.

Players can choose from different modes. **Online matches** are available in casual and competitive play. For those who prefer playing alone, **Season Mode** provides a full campaign. **Extra Modes** add unique twists inspired by sports like hockey and basketball. **Mutators** let players change game rules for new challenges.

The game has many cosmetic options, letting players create over **500 trillion unique car designs**. This variety, along with its fun gameplay, has earned Rocket League more than **150 "Game of the Year" awards and nominations**. With over **57 million players**, the game keeps growing with regular updates that add new **DLCs, content, features, modes, and arenas**.

Recent updates aim to improve the player experience. The **Rocket Pass**, a paid feature, gives a **50% XP bonus** and lets players unlock up to **70 rewards**, including new cars and goal explosions. The **Challenge System** lets players earn special Rocket Pass rewards by completing **Weekly Challenges** in Online Matches. The **Esports Shop** lets fans support pro teams by buying in-game items like Decals, Wheels, and Player Banners.

Rocket League has also updated its platform support. The game now uses technologies like **DirectX 11** and a **64-bit client**. However, support for **macOS and Linux (SteamOS)** has ended. The last update for these systems was on **March 10, 2020**, which turned off online play. Offline modes, like Local Matches and splitscreen, are still available. Players on SteamOS and macOS might see bugs not in the Windows version, and these issues are not expected to be fixed.

Online multiplayer access is also limited in some areas due to agreements with the online service provider. Players in **China, Crimea, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, and Syria** cannot access online services. The developers apologize for any trouble this may cause. All software and online features follow the game's license, terms of use, and privacy policy, found at rocketleague.com/eula, rocketleague.com/tou, and rocketleague.com/privacy.

Name: Football Manager 2020
Description:
Run your football club, your way. Every decision counts in Football Manager 2020 with new features and polished game mechanics rewarding planning and progression like never before, empowering managers to develop and refine both your club’s and your own unique identity. Walk down the tunnel to a living, breathing football world with you at the very heart of it. Around here, your opinion matters! This is a world that rewards planning and knowledge but, unlike other games, there’s no pre-defined ending or script to follow – just endless possibilities and opportunities. Every club has a story to tell and it’s down to you to create it. They say football is a game of dreams. Well, managers are a special breed of dreamers. They don’t see problems, only opportunities: the chance to prove themselves against the best in the world, to develop and instil a new footballing philosophy, to nurture talent through the ranks, to lift the club to greater heights and end the wait for silverware. How you get to the top is up to you… you’ll own your decisions, and the consequences they bring… Base yourself in 50 of the biggest footballing countries worldwide Oversee a new era of success at one of 2,500 clubs at every level Sign the best and mould the future – scout more than 500,000 real players and staff Create your tactical vision and bring it to life on the training pitch Kick every ball with our most immersive and smartest match engine to date DEVELOPMENT CENTRE Take full control of your youth team operations in a new all-encompassing hub. Nurture your young stars from the moment they arrive at your club and through the youth ranks until they’re ready for first-team action. CLUB VISION Develop a culture, work with the board to achieve ongoing objectives and plot a course for your club to progress in seasons to come. Club vision goes far beyond the boardroom; impacting on transfers, playing style and competition expectations as you look to strengthen your club’s identity and meet the multi-year milestones. PLAYING TIME PATHWAY A whole new way to define a player’s standing in your squad. Build in current and future playing time across the length of a contract, defining a clear pathway from Fringe Player to Star Player and everything in between. BACKROOM STAFF New roles, advice and interaction make your staff more involved and important than ever. More collaboration across more areas brings the game closer to the structure of a real-life backroom team. GRAPHIC IMPROVEMENTS Redesigned player and manager models, improved lighting and overhauled pitch visuals combine to create the most realistic and best-looking match experience to date.

The **PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018: FC Barcelona Edition Bundle** offers a special package for fans of both FC Barcelona and the PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER game series. This bundle is designed to **fully immerse players** in the world of their favorite club, providing exclusive in-game content for the popular myClub mode. Konami, the game's developer, stated that this edition aims to **strengthen the bond** between players and the renowned FC Barcelona team within the virtual football environment.

This bundle provides a **significant boost** to players' progress in myClub with exclusive FC Barcelona content. Key in-game bonuses include:

*   A special FCB Agent
*   An FCB Legend Special Agent
*   **1,000 myClub coins**
*   Four Start Up Agents
*   One Partner Club Agent
*   **10,000 GP awarded weekly for ten weeks**

PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018 itself features numerous improvements. Gameplay enhancements include:

*   A "Gameplay Masterclass" with **better strategic dribbling**
*   Real Touch+ for improved ball control
*   Updated set pieces

The game's presentation is also enhanced with **new menus and authentic player images**. For competitive play, PES League modes, including myClub, offer new ways to compete. An **Online Co-op Mode** has been added for teamwork, and the popular Random Selection Match mode returns with updated features. The Master League has been significantly upgraded with new pre-season tournaments, a **better transfer system**, and improved presentations. These enhancements are supported by **improved visuals**, featuring new lighting effects, updated player models and animations, and detailed facial expressions and body movements, all contributing to a more **realistic football simulation**.

Pro Evolution Soccer 2019 (PES 2019) offers various editions, each with special bonuses for the myClub mode.

The **Standard Edition** includes a 10-match loan of David Beckham 2018 and Philippe Coutinho. You also get 10 weeks of Premium Agents, which provide three players weekly, and three Player Contracts.

For greater rewards, the **David Beckham Edition** grants you a permanent David Beckham 2018. This edition also includes a 10-match loan for Philippe Coutinho and doubles the Premium Agents and Player Contracts to 20 weeks each.

The **Legend Edition** is the most complete option. It features a special 3D scanned David Beckham from 2018, a PES Legend Player for myClub, a 10-match loan for Philippe Coutinho, and an extensive 30 weeks of Premium Agents (three players weekly) and Player Contracts.

PES 2019 also introduces exciting new gameplay features. The game includes **Authentic Leagues** with many officially licensed competitions. **Magic Moments** are enhanced by 11 new skill traits, adding more player individuality. Improved shooting mechanics and animations allow for spectacular goals. Furthermore, **Visible Fatigue** adds realism by affecting player stamina during matches.

The **New myClub** mode has been redesigned, changing how you get players and introducing special player versions released regularly. **The Beautiful Game** is presented with photo-realistic graphics, smooth animations, and 4K HDR support. Finally, **ML Real Season** lets you experience being a manager with three major updates: ICC pre-season tournaments, an improved transfer system, and new league licenses.

**Altitude: Experience the Thrill of Fast-Paced Aerial Combat**

Prepare for an exhilarating journey through cartoon skies in **Altitude**, a dynamic multiplayer action game by Nimbly Games. This title offers an **instantly accessible, deeply rewarding, and incredibly fun** experience. The alert is sounded: bogies are approaching fast!

Pilot the agile Loopy and unleash a **tactical EMP blast** to neutralize your foes from above. But don't linger – engage your afterburners quickly, as your Biplane support is ready to unleash a barrage of **20mm cannons**! Navigate the treacherous enemy minefield with a daring barrel roll and arm your nuke as you approach the drop zone.

The enemy base looms ahead, but beware! Two Mirandas have just warped in, their lasers primed, and an Explodet is lumbering into position over their hangar decks. Can you **carry your team to victory** in this high-stakes aerial showdown?

**Multiplayer Redefined:** Altitude masterfully blends the **perk system of Call of Duty** with the **gameplay diversity of Team Fortress 2**, creating a truly fresh multiplayer experience. Meticulously refined controls, robust netcode, and balanced gameplay promise **hundreds of hours of engaging and satisfying play**.

**Seven Captivating Game Modes:**

*   **Plane Ball:** This mode's relentless action makes it a hit with both new and casual players.
*   **Team Base Destruction:** Experience an intense, competitive environment where coordinated assaults and strategic loadout choices are paramount.
*   **1-life Deathmatch:** Test your ultimate dogfighting prowess in this challenging mode.
*   **Demolition:** Engage in a more tactical, objective-focused battle.
*   **Free For All & Team Deathmatch:** Enjoy classic, beloved game modes.

Whether you prefer a casual pickup game or aspire to join a clan and compete in the **'Altitude ProLeague'** – a competitive tournament scene curated by dedicated gamers from the Starcraft and Counter-Strike communities – Altitude offers a thrilling experience for every player.

Name: NBA 2K19
Description:
TAKE CONTROL WITH TAKEOVER Harness your MyPLAYER’s full basketball potential with the new Takeover feature. Unlock special moves and abilities never before seen on the court, or activate Team Takeover and unleash the power of your full squad. RUN THE NEIGHBORHOOD (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) You won’t want to miss a single day in the updated Neighborhood. Make a name for yourself on the court, at the Under Armour Cages, and during live events on the block. Ball until dawn with new day to night transitions, walk on at the Jordan Rec Center, or get the old Crew back together for exciting 3 on 3 streetball action. MyTEAM (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) Create your very first MyPLAYER card, and ball with LeBron, Kobe, and the rest of your collection in a variety of competitive modes. Introducing the new Unlimited mode, allowing you to pick any five cards from your deck without restrictions and battle against other players online. MyCAREER From neighborhood legend to global phenomenon. The original career story mode returns with an all-new, immersive narrative charting your journey from China to the G League and eventually the NBA. Featuring an all-star cast, endorsements tied to your popularity, and new team chemistry elements that allow you to dominate the hardwood

**Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions: Experience Arcade Football Action**

Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions injects arcade-style excitement into the football gaming genre, offering a departure from traditional simulations with its rapid gameplay and over-the-top, spectacular shots.

This title empowers players to construct their ideal squad by designing custom characters endowed with distinctive abilities. Subsequently, you can forge your ultimate team for both offline and online competitions. Up to four individuals can engage in local versus matches, while online modes provide opportunities to secure trophies and valuable rewards. Immerse yourself in two distinct story modes: one allows for a retrospective journey through the anime's narrative, and the other plunges you directly into the vibrant Captain Tsubasa universe.

## **Football Drama**: A Unique Football Management Experience

Step into the shoes of Rocco Galliano, a manager handed a **second chance** at Calchester Assembled Football Club in **Football Drama**. After a seven-year hiatus, billionaire president Boris Aluminovitch has hired you to restore the team's former glory. The previous manager's dismissal for poor performance means the spotlight is now firmly on you to lead the charge.

Your decisions are **paramount** to the unfolding narrative. Will you ignite your players' spirits with **passionate sideline speeches**, or perhaps consult the enigmatic "Book of Changes"? Be warned, your past may resurface, bringing with it potential entanglements with corruption, crime, drugs, and romance. Every choice carries **significant consequences**. Simply completing a season presents a challenge, but remember, **Football Drama** is about more than just clinching the championship title.

This **interactive story** allows your choices to directly shape the game's progression. Your personal life and in-game actions influence the outcome through a dynamic karma or chaos system. Matches unfold in a **turn-based format**, complete with live animations during an intense 18-week championship. The threat of being fired looms constantly! Your decisions and match results directly impact your card deck, which is packed with **humorous cards** that playfully mock football's eccentricities. Each match is documented with a detailed, illustrated log, featuring commentary from a **witty main commentator** and his sidekick. Every championship offers a unique experience, leading to multiple endings and **high replayability**. The game boasts a **superb interface** by Pino Panzarella, complemented by art from Daniele Giardini ('Demigiant').

The developers drew inspiration from football's **rich literary and film heritage**. They referenced authors like Pasolini and Hornby, and films such as "The Lost World Cup" and Wenders' "The Goalie's Anxiety at the Penalty Kick." Adam Hurrey's "Football Clichés" also fueled their fascination with the sport's unique appeal. Their ambition was to leverage gaming for **powerful storytelling**. **Football Drama** was crafted by a **small, self-funded team of three**. Recognizing it's not a blockbuster title, they've priced it accordingly. The Steam version enhances the experience with **additional content, achievements, and full-screen art**.

**Behold the Kickmen: A Unique Football Simulation**

What started as a humorous Twitter idea has evolved into **Behold the Kickmen**, a football simulation game that's notably unexciting and surprisingly inaccurate. It presents the sport from an unusual viewpoint, as if observed by someone unfamiliar with its rules. Players begin at the lowest level of the "Big Boring British Football Spreadsheet system," striving through challenging matches to ascend the professional leagues. The ultimate ambition is to achieve legendary status and secure a World Cup victory.

The primary gameplay mechanics involve:

*   **Kicking**
*   **Passing**
*   **Tackling**
*   **Squad management**
*   **Scoring goals**

A story mode is also featured, characterized by exaggerated drama and illogical decisions.

**Two Distinct Playstyles**

For those seeking an alternative to traditional football, **Behold the Kickmen** provides a surprising alternative. With a simple toggle, the game can be transformed into a **Dystopian Future Bloodsport**.

**Key Information:** **Behold the Kickmen** is exclusively a **single-player experience**. It does not offer any online or local multiplayer modes. The developer's stated intention was clear: "I wanted to make a Single Player game, I didn't want to make a Multiplayer game." Consequently, this game is not suited for players looking for a social gaming environment.

**BattleBlock Theater®: A Hilarious Cat-astrophe of Survival**

Prepare for **BattleBlock Theater®**, a game where you're shipwrecked and forced to entertain a horde of insatiable cats. This bizarre story sends you on a mission to save over 300 companions from evil, high-tech felines. The gameplay is a unique mix of tricky platforming and dark humor.

You'll explore dangerous areas with many creative weapon-tools. Hundreds of carefully made levels await, each with new challenges and clues about this strange theater show. For shared fun, BattleBlock Theater® has great online and local co-op modes. You can team up with a friend for the story or jump into competitive matches. Plus, a built-in level editor lets you create and share your own tricky levels, making the game endlessly replayable.

**Key Features of BattleBlock Theater®:**

*   **Co-Op Fun:** Play Story mode with up to two players, or join up to four in chaotic Arena modes. The game supports both online and local play, whether you want to work together or compete.
*   **Exciting Arenas:** BattleBlock Theater® has eight different arena modes. Each one is designed to test your skills and maybe make your opponents nervous.
*   **Insane Mode:** For the ultimate challenge, try the Insane Mode campaign. You get only one life, just like a real live show.
*   **Tons of Levels:** With over 450 levels across all modes, BattleBlock Theater® offers a huge amount of content to play.
*   **Save Your Friends:** Your goal is to free your captured pals from the cat villains. Collect gems from daring moves to earn their freedom.
*   **Wild Weapons and Fights:** Learn to jump, push, pull, and punch. Use unusual tactics like exploding, freezing, poisoning, or even eating your enemies. Swap between two weapons to beat obstacles and foes.
*   **Build and Share:** Use the easy Level Editor to make your own challenging levels with over 20 types of interactive blocks. Share your creations with friends and the community.

Explore the chaotic arcade-simulation adventure of **Russian Subway Dogs**, a game inspired by the remarkable resilience of stray dogs navigating Moscow's subway. Developed by the creators of They Bleed Pixels, this unique title plunges you into the gritty reality of scavenging for food amidst bustling Russian commuters. Your survival hinges on skillfully evading hazards like volatile vodka bottles, aggressive rival dogs, and the surprisingly formidable Subway Bear.

**Russian Subway Dogs** offers engaging gameplay through distinct modes. **Campaign Mode** features dozens of levels with over 100 unique challenges orchestrated by your demanding boss, The Proletaricat. These missions test your ingenuity, presenting scenarios like protecting a bear on a vegetarian diet or stopping pigeons from cannibalism. Successfully completing these trials leads you to the game's secret final station. For those seeking a competitive edge, **Endless Mode** provides a highly replayable experience. Compete for top spots on online leaderboards, where a dynamic score-driven difficulty algorithm ensures each playthrough is fresh and escalating. This mode is enhanced by random mini-challenges from The Proletaricat and their mischievous Kittens.

The game boasts visually stunning, detailed pixel art that recreates the ornate grandeur of Moscow's world-famous subway stations. Beyond the core gameplay, **Russian Subway Dogs** features a rich tapestry of simulated systems for players to discover and exploit. For instance, players can discover emergent strategies like **Culinary Exploitation**, where consuming tempting but toxic chocolate can yield a significant point boost or sabotage a rival dog's meal. Similarly, **Power-Up Potions** can be utilized; drinking hot sauce unleashes powerful fire barks, or feeding it to a pigeon can gain aerial support in the form of fiery droppings.

You can also play as a diverse cast of unlockable characters, including beloved animals from other indie games and comics. Special guests include Question Hound from KC Green's Gunshow, Fidel from Fidel Dungeon Rescue, Nacho & Rad Shiba from VA-11 HALL-A, Ratcoon from Ruin of the Reckless, Uay Chivo from Guacamelee!, Nidhogg from Nidhogg 2, and Clawed Kitty, inspired by They Bleed Pixels. **Russian Subway Dogs** is designed with simple controls but offers depth for seasoned players. Core mechanics involve running and jumping along subway platforms, barking at commuters to startle them into dropping food, and strategically bouncing vodka bottles. As you progress, you'll uncover advanced tactics, including the ability to cook and consume rival wildlife, often amplified by explosive vodka interactions. Ultimately, the game empowers you to utilize your acquired knowledge and unique abilities to fill your canine stomach and create as much delightful pandemonium as possible.

Complementing the engaging gameplay is an original soundtrack by Peter Chapman (COINS), whose previous work includes acclaimed titles like Guacamelee! and LittleBigPlanet Karting. This soundtrack masterfully blends Slavic sounds and Baltic beats with electronic dance music, creating an immersive auditory experience that perfectly complements the game's chaotic charm. Whether you're a devoted dog person or lean more towards feline companionship, **Russian Subway Dogs** offers an engaging and entertaining experience for all.

## Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin: A Goddess's Journey of Cultivation and Combat

**Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin** plunges players into the role of Sakuna, a spoiled harvest goddess unceremoniously banished from her celestial home to a demon-infested island. This wild new world forces her to confront her destiny as the daughter of a warrior god and a harvest goddess. To survive and thrive, Sakuna must master the elements, battle fearsome monsters, and, most importantly, cultivate rice – the very source of her divine power.

### Companions on Hinoe Island

Accompanying Sakuna on her exile is her loyal guardian, Tama, alongside a band of outcast humans. This unlikely fellowship must work together to tame both the untamed land and the demonic inhabitants of Hinoe Island. Developed by Edelweiss, the indie studio also known for **Astebreed**, **Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin** masterfully blends engaging side-scrolling action with intricate crafting and detailed rice cultivation. The game weaves a compelling narrative about self-discovery and finding one's purpose.

### Refined Side-Scrolling Action

Players will wield farm tools as formidable weapons, chaining together quick, heavy, and special attacks to vanquish demonic beasts. The magical "divine raiment" serves as a crucial tool, enabling Sakuna to grapple onto distant platforms, evade perilous attacks, and overcome formidable adversaries.

### Deep Simulation-Style Gameplay

The game invites players to learn the ancient art of agriculture through meticulously detailed steps, from the initial planting to the final harvest, all in pursuit of cultivating the perfect crop. As a harvest goddess, Sakuna's strength is directly tied to the quality of her rice harvests. Attributes such as aesthetic appeal and flavor directly influence her combat prowess.

### Building a Home in the Wilderness

Sakuna's mortal companions play a vital role in their survival, crafting weapons, armor, and nourishing meals using the materials Sakuna gathers. Completing their individual quests unlocks new opportunities for survival and advancement, further solidifying their home in the wilderness.

### A Unique Take on Japanese Mythology

The game's heroine and her world are inspired by a pantheon of gods and demons drawn from traditional Japanese mythology. **Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin** offers a fresh perspective on these familiar elements, introducing numerous unique twists. The narrative and the game's world are rich with lovingly rendered details, seamlessly blending well-known mythological concepts with original creations. As one developer noted, "We wanted to create a world that felt both familiar and entirely new, drawing on the depth of Japanese folklore while forging our own path."

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED!** is a **narrative-driven noir adventure** that plunges players into a world of mystery and detective work. This **cinematic experience** offers a **rich storyline** steeped in classic film-noir style, providing a unique gaming journey. The game features **professional voiceover** with **over 8 hours of spoken dialogue**, bringing to life a **carefully crafted world** inhabited by **30 fully voiced characters**. Players will uncover **numerous clues and collectibles** while enjoying a **beautiful original soundtrack**.

The story begins with a mysterious Dame, a peculiar case, and the wildest cops in the Wilderness. At its heart, the game follows **Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken**, once celebrated as the Chicken Police. Nearly a decade has passed, and their prime has waned. Sonny is now a **semi-alcoholic wreck on paid leave**, while Marty desperately clings to his former detective glory. Their last case nearly fractured their partnership, and they haven't spoken since. Now, Sonny and Marty are **forced to collaborate** on a case that is **stranger and more chaotic** than anything they've encountered before.

**Chicken Police** is a **story-rich, dialogue-heavy adventure** that expertly blends visual novel and classic adventure game elements. You'll interact with **over 30 characters**, some requiring intense interrogation. Gather a **wealth of clues and evidence** from Clawville's shady residents, which can be used strategically. Explore **over 30 distinct locations** in Clawville, many of which evolve as the story progresses. You can **revisit earlier locations** to uncover hidden secrets or gather vital information.

The game features a **strikingly unique visual style**, utilizing real photographs and photo-realistic 3D backgrounds, heavily inspired by classic film-noir movies and games like *Grim Fandango* and *L.A. Noire*. Additional inspiration is drawn from animated features like *Porco Rosso* and *BoJack Horseman*. The pervasive noir atmosphere is amplified by an **original musical score** and **professional voice acting** from the studio behind voices in *The Wolf Among Us* and *Horizon Zero Dawn*. The game is **fully voice-acted**, with over 8 hours of dialogue.

Clawville, once envisioned as a harmonious sanctuary, has devolved into the **darkest corner of the Wilderness**. **Chicken Police** serves as a **satire**, capturing the mood of 1940s film-noir. It is **gritty and bleak**, yet infused with a significant amount of **cynical humor**.

**Expert Opinions:**

*   **FORBES** noted, "It's also clear from the trailer that its dark story will be pretty funny, with plenty of scope to establish it as one of the more unique releases in its genre. Needless to say, there'll be absolutely nothing like it released during 2020, and hopefully, it'll be as brilliant as it is different."
*   **DESTRUCTOID** shared, "I know I mostly cover animal-based games, but few have ever stopped me dead in my tracks like this one. I mean, did you hear that song in the trailer? That's original music, baby! I'm a sucker for games with quirky themes and original music, so of course, I took notice to this one straight away. Mix that with the animals-as-people motif and spot-on detective visuals, and yeah I didn't really stand a chance."
*   **ROCK PAPER SHOTGUN** commented, "Fortunately I’m batting my jet-lagged eyes at Chicken Police, an upcoming noir detective adventure with grizzled chickens and a very good raccoon. It’s a point and clicker, which means I’ll almost certainly never play it. But I’d still like you to revel in this trailer with me. It’s a cinematographic masterpiece."
*   **ALPHA BETA GAMER** praised, "It really nails the film noir vibe it’s going for. Meanwhile, the voice acting is excellent throughout, the story is interesting and the writing is very witty, packed full of cynical humor and animal-based puns. A ridiculous and riveting hardboiled detective adventure that will give you a clucking good time."

**The Cat Lady: A Psychological Horror Experience**

**The Cat Lady** is a **psychological horror game** that plunges players into the somber reality of Susan Ashworth. Susan, a 40-year-old woman, grapples with profound loneliness and suicidal ideation. Her life, devoid of meaningful connections and hope, is on the brink of a significant transformation.

This compelling narrative, developed by Remigiusz Michalski of Harvester Games, introduces five key characters who will deeply impact Susan's path. The game is recognized for its **distinctive, stylized visuals** and **intuitive keyboard controls**, enhancing its immersive quality. It also features **full English voice acting** and a **memorable, atmospheric 70-minute soundtrack** by micAmic, which is now included free with every purchase. The soundtrack showcases music from artists such as Warmer, 5iah, and Tears Of Mars.

Creator Remigiusz Michalski explained, "The aim was to delve into the darker facets of the human mind." **The Cat Lady confronts mature themes**, making it **suitable only for players aged 18 and over**. For those who appreciate this game or are interested in the developer's broader portfolio, exploring their other titles is recommended.

Name: Gato Roboto
Description:
Pounce inside of your cozy armored mech and set off on a dangerous trek through an alien underworld full of irritable creatures and treacherous obstacles in a valiant effort to save your stranded captain and his crashed spaceship. Tiptoe outside the friendly confines of your technological marvel and follow your feline instincts through tight tunnels and mysterious waterways to scavenge for new weapons and gear. Adventure awaits the most curious of cats in Gato Roboto! * Explore the underground labyrinth of a deep space outpost and uncover the dastardly deeds that unfolded before your arrival. * Blast and dash your way through enemies and obstacles in an agile mech suit to face the guardians stationed precariously throughout the base. * Cautiously venture outside the mech and risk all nine lives to explore areas inaccessible to your bulky, mechanical armor. * Discover secrets abound and gather new weapons and items to help open up new areas on your journey through dozens of handcrafted environments.

Embark on an **epic open-world RPG adventure** in Cat Quest, a game where you play as a brave catventurer in the vibrant land of Felingard. Your primary mission is to **defeat the evil Drakoth** and rescue your kidnapped sister.

Explore Felingard's **vast overworld map**, venturing into dangerous dungeons to find **valuable loot and treasures**. Along the way, you'll encounter a variety of **feline characters**, each offering unique stories and side quests that enrich your journey.

Cat Quest offers **fast-paced, real-time combat**. Master your blade, dodge enemy attacks, and cast **powerful spells** such as Lightnyan, Flamepurr, and Healpaw to vanquish your foes.

**Customize your catventurer** to suit your preferred playstyle. Equip gear like arcane hoods and staffs to enhance your magical abilities, or opt for chainmail armor for greater health and defense. The ability to **mix and match weapons, armor, and spells** allows you to craft your ideal character build.

Discover **intriguing locations and memorable characters** across Felingard. You might help a town plagued by a peculiar meat craving or assist the mages Mewlin and Meowgan. Quests vary from locating lost deliveries to exploring captivating areas like Bermewda's Triangle and Pawt City. The game's **enchanting orchestral soundtrack** complements the vibrant world and engaging gameplay, fully immersing you in the magical realm of Cat Quest.

In **Atomicrops**, you'll dive into a **unique farming simulation** where the core objective is to **plant and harvest fast-growing crops before the day ends**, all while aiming for **maximum profit**. Your adventure will lead you through diverse biomes, where you'll unearth **valuable relics from ancient farms**. The **powerful loot** you discover will significantly **enhance your farming abilities and aid you in combat**.

A **crucial element of Atomicrops** is defending your precious crops from nightly attackers eager to consume your harvest, which could lead to starvation. You'll face **challenging bosses each season**, culminating in the ultimate trial of the Nuclear Winter. At the end of each day, you can visit the town to **purchase essential weapons and items**. Special shops offering **unique rewards** become available at the end of each season.

To boost your farming efficiency, you can **befriend animal companions** like pigs, chickens, and cows, who will automate various farming tasks. You can also pursue and **marry a town resident**, who will then join you in both farming and combat.

Atomicrops boasts a **robust system of permanent upgrades** for both farming and combat. Each playthrough earns a special currency for lasting improvements and unlocks. Prepare for a **demanding challenge**, as even the easiest setting will test your skills. Achieving victory is a **hard-earned and highly satisfying accomplishment**.

As you progress, you'll unlock new characters, spouses, difficulty levels, and permanent upgrades. Notably, you can unlock **numerous cats** that will roam your farm, and yes, you can **pet them**. Atomicrops is designed for **high replayability**, ensuring fresh surprises and item combinations are discovered with every playthrough.

Tired of urban living? Imagine inheriting your uncle's farm and relocating to the tranquil countryside for a fresh start. What could possibly go wrong? As it turns out, a nuclear apocalypse. You now find yourself in a wasteland, responsible for safeguarding the last food source – your crops – from mutants seeking a share. Like any sensible farmer, your mission is straightforward: **Farm. Marry. Kill.** As one player aptly described the experience, "It's a wild ride, but incredibly rewarding when you pull off a perfect harvest and defense."

Name: The Chronicles of Nyanya
Description:
Thrilling like a payday, a story of cats in funny costumes that do RPGish things. It is full of many unexpected and incredible twists, the tragedies of an individual lured into the trap of an adventourist internship, and friendly pastry, which is very sensitive to nihilism. The game also contains many thrilling conversations, walking around the map with some logical puzzles sprinkled in here and there – but don’t worry, even a liberal arts student should be able to solve them – raising pastry, and deliberations about important moral and existential issues, the majority of which will affect the ending you get. The ending will sum up the fates of the most important characters, in-game achievements, your proficiency in fighting the ultimate bad guy, your finesse in raising pastry and the degree of faith in friendship. This results in dozens of possible ending combinations. After completing the game, you can try NewGame+ to unlock additional, normally unavailable skills for the main character. The world of Nyanya Nyanya is an enormous cat world that can take up to 20 hours to fully explore. The main plotline itself is good for more than 8 hours of fun, but the game also includes many side quests found on numerous maps, hundreds of interactions with NPCs and over a thousand descriptions of nearly everything. You can also find dozens of exciting items such as the legendary Excalipurr and the frightening Berserker Catnip. The role of the majority of animals is played by various kinds of rolls, which, together with cats, pidgins, and sneks, constitute the entirety of Nyanya’s fauna. Kibble is found in mines and on can triis, almost all buildings are boxes (because cardboard boxes are cats’ natural habitat) and cleaning fur is a matter of importance to the state. The sense and logic of this world are therefore highly debatable... But don’t worry about its coherence. We made sure that it is top-notch. All this mess is watched over by cat gods, such as the mysterious Great Bowl of Goodness – a giant stone leg, whose calf disappears in the clouds, Meowrida the Brave – goddess of shooting, and Overcat – the creator of everything that's feline. The game is produced in a retro jRPG style. Party The protagonist of the game is Catair, a meowsassin, who is as optimistic and sweet as sandpaper. When she sets out on her amazing journey, she has the chance to discover friendship, love, and revenge and to travel through many wonderful lands that she does not want to visit... And yet, she has no choice. She will join the party led by the veteran of the war in Furajevo – Francat the clericat. Their adventourist paths will cross with Purrgli, a yes-cat and an outstanding purrior, Catniss – a fighter for friendship and even more friendship, as well as meowmage Meowdledore, whose parents bought him gifts instead of giving him some attention. You can meet them here .
