Fans of the Reigns series will find this to be the **biggest and deepest entry yet**, as it **doesn't simply retell known stories but allows you to create new adventures at your whim**. Finally, **decide the fate of Westeros and its inhabitants to the soaring score** of the HBO series, composed by Ramin Djawadi.

**Griftlands** is a **deck-building rogue-like** set in a **shattered sci-fi universe**. Every choice you make—from the jobs you take to the allies you recruit and the cards you collect—**significantly impacts your journey**. As the game itself states, "**Death comes quickly, but each play offers new situations and strategies to explore.**" This **dynamic gameplay ensures that no two playthroughs are ever the same**.

You can play as one of **three distinct characters**, each with their own unique campaign, specialized decks, abilities, and maps. **Sal, the adventurer**, seeks profit and revenge. **Rook, a seasoned spy**, pursues his own secret agenda. **Smith, an unlikely hero**, is a seemingly idle loafer who might just save the world. Each character's story unfolds in a **unique environment**, featuring different factions and locations to explore and exploit.

The game challenges you to "**Battle Challenging Bosses**," testing your combat decks against formidable enemies with unique mechanics and powerful attacks. To help you succeed, you can "**Build a Team - or Buy One!**" This means hiring mercenaries, finding loyal pets, or enlisting friends to achieve your goals. At the heart of Griftlands is its vast card collection, where you can "**Master Hundreds of Cards**." Each character has distinct negotiation and combat decks to draft from, and you can acquire powerful item cards from defeated enemies or as rewards.

Player decisions are paramount. The game warns, "**Killing foes may incur the wrath of their friends, but sparing them leaves a dangerous piece on the board. Choose wisely, everyone remembers everything you do!**" This intricate web of consequences means **every action has repercussions**.

Welcome to Havaria, a harsh world where "**Each playable character's story takes place in a unique environment, with different factions and locations to explore and exploit.**" You'll navigate "**lush, hand-illustrated environments full of people who want to kill you.**" Havaria also features a deep political system where "**Each character has a factional allegiance and an opinion of you.**" You must engage in "**Playing Politics For Keeps**," maneuvering between rival factions to gain powerful social boons. However, betrayal is risky: "**doublecross the wrong person, and you'll be subject to their bane!**"

Ultimately, survival in Griftlands depends on your ability to "**Outwit or Overpower.**" You must decide whether to use brute force or persuasive words, carefully playing your cards to stay alive. The game requires you to "**Build two decks simultaneously, balancing the tradeoffs of each.**" Through each run, you will "**Learn from each attempted run through the various stories of the Griftlands**," encountering diverse enemies, quests, and events. Your destiny is shaped by your choices and the hand of fate.

Name: 80 Days
Description:
1872, with a steampunk twist. Phileas Fogg has wagered he can circumnavigate the world in just eighty days. TIME Magazine's Game of 2014 and winner of the IGF award for narrative; now available on Steam! Choose your own route around a 3D globe, travelling by airship, submarine, mechanical camel, steam-train and more, racing other players and a clock that never stops. 170 cities to explore. Detailed research and techno-fantasy combine in an 1872 of tensions, inventions and exploration. Climb the Burmese mountains, trek the Zulu Federation, sail up the Amazon and disappear under the Indian Ocean - but don't fall behind the time! Four times BAFTA -nominated and TIME's #1 Game of the Year 2014 Winner IGF 'Excellence in Narrative' award 'We’ve been dreaming about this future for decades. Guess what? It’s here.' - New York Times 9/10 -- Edge Magazine 'Interactive storytelling as its best' - The Guardian Playing as Phileas Fogg's loyal valet, Passepartout, you must balance your master's health, your finances, and the time, as you choose your own path from city to city all the way around the world. Bribe your way onto early departures, but don't let yourself go bankrupt or you'll be sleeping rough and begging for aid! Trade items for profit, and collect the equipment for the conditions you'll face: but too much luggage will slow you down... 80 DAYS is a breakneck race, with an in-game clock that never stops running. Trains, steamers, hot-air balloons, boats, camels, horses and more leave and arrive minute by minute. Every city and journey is narrated via an interactive story where you control every action. Will your choices speed you up - or lead you into disaster? Will you earn Fogg's trust and respect? Will you uncover the secrets and short-cuts that can shave days off your time? Murder, romance, rebellion and intrigue await! The Game: Plan and strategise - can you find the fastest route? Flexible interactive narrative with thousands of choices Massively replayable - every journey is unique Explore an entire 3D globe, with 170 bespoke cities to visit Richly imagined, diverse alternative-history steampunk world Stunning art by Jaume Illustration Race real people in real-time: every second counts Live multiplayer feed, showing journeys of other players as they happen Share your journey with friends

Embark on an **unforgettable adventure** in Reventure, a game where your choices dramatically shape your destiny, leading to an astonishing **100 different endings**. You play as a wannabe hero, tasked with heroic deeds, but often tempted to stray from the path and indulge in wild, unexpected actions.

The core of Reventure lies in its **unique branching narrative**. Every decision you make, no matter how small, propels you towards a distinct conclusion. The central question lingers: will you discover the "real" ending, or is such a thing even possible? The only way to find out is to play and explore the myriad possibilities. Prepare for numerous **"Aha!" moments** as you uncover the game's secrets. While the world itself remains consistent, it's your character and understanding that evolve with each playthrough. However, a hidden truth awaits: the world *does* change, a secret you'll need to discover for yourself.

Reventure is packed with **unlockable content** that enhances your gameplay experience. Discover new playable characters, helpful hints, stylish costumes, and captivating visual effects, among other surprises. The game is also brimming with **countless secrets and pop-culture references**, cleverly hidden for you to find.

Experience a world filled with **magic**, both in its gameplay and its surprisingly affordable price. Despite its seemingly simple yet amazing presentation, Reventure is the result of significant time and investment, yet it's available for just a few bucks. This incredible value is a kind of magic in itself. The game playfully hints at a vast array of mechanics, including time travel, battle royale fights, mimics, permadeath, shotguns, mining, resource gathering, base building, and global leaderboards, even humorously admitting to exaggerating some of these features – or perhaps not!

Beyond the gameplay, Reventure offers **humor in abundance**, presented in various delightful flavors. Complementing the experience is a **beautiful original soundtrack (OST)**. Don't just take our word for it; listen to it to believe!

Here's a simplified guide to playing Reventure in 8 steps:

1.  **Answer the call to adventure:** Wake up, hero!
2.  **Meet your mentor and prepare for greatness.**
3.  **Embark on your quest!**
4.  **Or, perhaps, don't embark...**
5.  **Face the inevitable consequences.**
6.  **Rise again from your failures.**
7.  **Attempt to rectify your past mistakes.**
8.  **Strive to become a legend!**

**Disclaimer:** This guide is purely orientative. It's highly unlikely you'll achieve legendary status on your second attempt.

In tERRORbane, you don't just play a game; you interact directly with its creator. Instead of a standard fantasy RPG story, the Developer constantly interrupts, commenting on your actions. This meta-commentary is enhanced by a continuous flow of funny bugs and glitches that mess with gameplay, making nothing work as intended. Your main tool as a player is the "BUG LIST," which lets you record and, more importantly, use these flaws to finish the game.

The game is designed for replayability, as finishing it isn't the end. Your choices greatly affect your journey, leading to different areas and story paths. Going back to old choices can reveal completely new storylines and characters, often bringing new bugs to your list. The developers even suggest there might be content after the credits, encouraging players to find all the bugs. The Developer claims his creation is perfect, but the many errors suggest otherwise. The main gameplay involves finding bugs and glitches, carefully filling out your BUG LIST, and using every loophole to move forward. This unique method lets you go against normal gaming rules and prove you're the ultimate player, able to change the world of tERRORbane. In the end, you become the TERRORBANE, the hero of this strange world.

tERRORbane is a funny adventure where bugs are friends, not foes. Players can dive into a strange and creative world with odd characters and many nods to video game history. The game encourages you to question the Developer's ideas by cleverly using and even "cheating" through his imperfect design, all to figure out what makes a great game.

Saving a world from villains is a common game theme, but tERRORbane quickly breaks from typical fantasy. The game throws players into many locations, from classic castles and temples to future starships and secret vaults. You might travel from a digital dungeon to the moon, with a wonderfully silly plot tying it all together. The Developer has built a world full of strange lore and amazing places, so much so that you might start doubting what's real. As one developer joked, "This game is perfect, there are no glitches here."

In **LEGO® City Undercover**, you step into the shoes of **Chase McCain**, a **determined police officer** tasked with a **vital undercover mission**. Your primary objective is to **infiltrate criminal organizations** and **apprehend the infamous Rex Fury**, a villain who has plunged LEGO City into **widespread pandemonium**. The game's narrative, as confirmed by its developers, centers on McCain's **resolute pursuit of restoring order** and **ensuring justice** throughout the metropolis.

This **captivating game** invites players to explore a **vast, open-world environment**. For those seeking a shared experience, a **two-player cooperative mode** is included. In this mode, two players can collaborate to traverse:

*   **Over 20 distinct districts**
*   Engage in **car chases**
*   Discover **humorous movie parodies**
*   Utilize a **wide array of vehicles**
*   Gather **numerous collectibles**

Critical reception for LEGO City Undercover has highlighted its **amusing and imaginative storyline**, coupled with its **signature LEGO wit**. It is widely regarded as a **highly entertaining adventure** suitable for **all players**.

## Become the Ultimate Idol Manager in Idol Manager

In **Idol Manager**, you'll step into the shoes of a manager at a burgeoning talent agency, tasked with nurturing and training a new wave of young pop stars. Your role is pivotal, requiring you to make **crucial decisions** about hiring and firing, promoting success, and addressing failures. The personal lives of these rising celebrities are intrinsically linked to your business's success. While their triumphs can lead to significant commercial gains, their emotional struggles and public relations crises can spell **financial ruin** for your company.

You must navigate a complex idol ecosystem, contending with gossip magazines, devoted super fans, and rival groups, all eager to uncover the next scandal. Many individuals will attempt to undermine your efforts with underhanded tactics, but remember, these challenges are **strictly business**.

Your responsibilities extend to handling various crises, including gossip, vandalism, stalkers, and threats directed at your agency and its pop idols. You will also need to manage the **interpersonal dynamics** between the idols within your group, addressing issues like cliques, internal feuds, and bullying.

To build your fanbase and empire, you'll employ diverse strategies to appeal to a broad range of demographics. Maximize your group's popularity and generate revenue by producing hit singles, organizing concerts, staging major television events, and embarking on international tours.

Develop your agency's infrastructure, beginning with basic offices and dance studios for content creation and idol training. Ultimately, you can expand to include your own cafe and theater, establishing consistent revenue streams. Hire and train dedicated staffers to manage logistics and ensure your agency operates efficiently.

Discover engaging sub-stories, which are narrative chains featuring visual novel segments. Many of these are triggered by your specific play style. Each sub-story can unfold in multiple ways, with your decisions leading to **significant and often impactful consequences** for your overall playthrough.

Name: SENRAN KAGURA ESTIVAL VERSUS
Description:
The flame that burns twice as bright burns half as long, and so it is with the lives of young shinobi. Death comes swiftly — for the lucky ones — and for those still living, grief is a constant companion. Ryōbi and Ryōna, two shinobi sisters of the Hebijo Clandestine Girls’ Academy elite, know that truth all too well, and they mourn their beloved elder sister every day. But when a mystical phenomenon appears, drawing the shinobi world’s finest young ladies into a parallel dimension, everything they know about life and death turns upside down. Taken to a strange world resembling a warm summer island, the girls find themselves face to face with their departed loved ones. The island’s mysterious mistresses challenge the girls, who hail from four different rival schools, to a contest of strength and wits. The winning school, so they promise, will not only learn the highest secrets of shinobi lore, but will also have the honor of laying their loved ones’ souls to rest. The buxom beauties prepare for a new kind of battle, facing not only their rivals, but questions galore. Can the islands’ hosts be trusted? Will the other schools play fair, team up, or cheat? Will there be time to enjoy the beach before the fighting starts? Will anyone manage to keep their clothes intact? And…if they do win, can they bear to part from their loved ones a second time? ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ The high-flying, high-bouncing ninja girls of SENRAN KAGURA return, this time with more moves, more playable characters, more story and attitude, and more destruction online with matches that can support up to 10 players. All the previous shinobi girls return with a host of upgraded moves to master, and new playable characters offer more challenges to conquer, along with a story that's equal parts sexy and shocking, serious and scandalous, busty and brawling. KEY FEATURES A Little More Violent, a Little More Sexy and a Ton More Fun The series’ busty ninja girls take to the beach, flying high in bouncy battles with more outrageous moves than ever before. Biggest Roster in Series History With over 25 playable characters, each with her own style, technique and role in the story, there’s a shinobi to fit any taste and preference. Enhanced Production Values Bring the Story to Life Dynamic camera angles, expressive animations and full anime cutscenes deliver a storytelling experience unlike any other in the series. All-New Multiplayer Battle Royales Up to 10 players can enter free-for-alls and team battles in a variety of events, from the traditional deathmatch to the less-traditional “Understorm” and “Capture the Bra.”

Name: SENRAN KAGURA SHINOVI VERSUS
Description:
From the Warring States period to the present day, the mysterious shinobi have fought covertly across Japan. Some fight for the authorities, others for the highest bidder, but all of them have one thing in common: They kick ass and know how to look good doing it. SENRAN KAGURA SHINOVI VERSUS immediately follows the events of SENRAN KAGURA Burst, revisiting the fierce rivalry between the girls of Hanzō National Academy and their sworn enemies from Hebijo Clandestine Girls’ Academy, the latter of which have now gone underground and formed a mercenary strike team known as the Homura Crimson Squad. In addition to their old adversaries, the Hanzō girls must also face a whole new set of foes: the students of Gessen Girls’ Academy, who seek to punish them for their imperfections as shinobi warriors. Meanwhile, a new class is in session at Hebijo, and these students mean business: they oppose all three of the competing factions and will stop at nothing to be the last shinobi squad standing – even if it means leaving broken bodies and shattered dreams in their wake. The stage is set for a shinobi battle royale. Heroines and renegades battle saints and sinners in a flurry of fists, feet, clothes, tattered remnants of those clothes, and sometimes underclothes. Each school has a story to tell, full of tragedy, heroism, pathos and partial nudity. Choose a school, prepare for battle, and follow the Path of the Shinobi. Key Features: A Little Violent, a Little Sexy, a Ton of Fun Fight with a team of buxom ninja girls in a 3D brawler containing massive mid-air combos, revealing cut-scenes and special Secret Ninja Art techniques, all while struggling to stay clothed as damage is depicted by the deterioration of each girl’s outfit. Now in HD and silky smooth 60fps on Windows PC. Master over 20 Fighters, each with a Unique Fighting Style and Abilities Each of the 20+ shinobi has her own unique weapon, techniques and special moves, while Ninja Arts can be harnessed to change costumes and power up in mid-battle. PC version comes standard with all DLC from the original PlayStation(r)Vita system release. Story Narrative told from Four Different Viewpoints Each of the four rival shinobi schools takes a turn at the story narrative, providing background on motivations, relationships and hobbies, while the original Japanese voice-overs with English subtitles bring each girl’s distinct personality to life. Innovative Multiplayer Modes for 4-Player Battle Royale Up to four players can compete online in one of three modes; classic Death Match, Strip Battle to unclothe your opponents, and Understorm, a race to grab the most falling undergarments from the sky.

**Rayman Raving Rabbids™: Survive the Bunny Invasion!**

Get ready for a **hilarious and chaotic adventure**! Unstoppable bunnies have taken over, capturing Rayman and forcing him into a series of **bizarre and wacky challenges**. Your mission is to **help Rayman escape** by outsmarting and amusing these fluffy invaders. As one gaming outlet aptly described it, the game features "**hilarious fighting moves imaginable**," promising a truly **unique and unforgettable experience**.

Immerse yourself in a **wide array of silly mini-games**. The **sheer variety of fun is astounding**, with over **70 trials** spread across distinct, artistic environments. Successfully entertaining the bunnies will **unlock new game sections** and grant you rewards.

Here's a glimpse of the mini-games:

*   **Race on animals**
*   **Battle in an arena**
*   **Charm the bunnies with your dance skills**
*   **Hurl cows**
*   **Milk pigs**
*   **Frantic plunger shooting**

The game is brimming with "**loads of hysterical fighting moves**." For **enhanced enjoyment**, compete with up to three friends in **zany multiplayer trials**. "**Dress to impress**" by adopting punk, pop, rock, or hip hop styles, and utilize your **groovy dance moves** to keep the bunnies captivated. The more popular Rayman becomes, the more **exciting goodies he can unlock**, including:

*   Costumes
*   Music tracks
*   Items for Rayman's prison cell

FlatOut 3: Chaos & Destruction is a **demolition racing game** focused on **high-speed action** and **spectacular vehicle destruction**. This installment challenges players with a variety of vehicles, including **powerful monster trucks** and rugged off-road cars, on demanding tracks. The game's main draw is its **chaotic and destructive racing**.

The game features a **realistic physics engine** that allows for extensive environmental destruction, with over **20,000 destructible objects** on each track. Players can select from **47 different vehicles**, including muscle cars, tanks, and bulldozers, to race, crash, and destroy opponents. FlatOut 3 offers **9 main game modes**, plus a Challenge mode that combines them for extended play. There are **62 race tracks** across 10 environments, 12 stunt tracks in 3 stunt environments, and 9 Destruction Derby environments. New modes include Monster Truck, Nightshift, Off Road, and Speed.

Multiplayer supports up to **16 players** in 8 different modes, with Destruction Derbies accommodating up to **24 players**. The game also includes **Force Feedback support** for racing wheels. Environmental challenges are key, with Off-Road Mode testing players on rough terrain, Monster Truck Mode offering pure carnage, and Night Shift Mode featuring races in rain and fog.

Unique gameplay is found in modes like Monster Truck and Stuntman, which uses **ragdoll physics for humorous and chaotic results**. FlatOut 3 aims to provide **more vehicles, modes, and destruction** than previous titles. As one reviewer noted, "The sheer scale of destruction is impressive, with cars disintegrating in spectacular fashion." Another reviewer praised the variety, stating, "From monster trucks to tanks, the vehicle selection alone promises a wild ride."

**Fuyu no Tsuma: A Charming Puzzle Game Featuring Beautiful Artwork**

Discover **Fuyu no Tsuma**, an engaging puzzle game designed for relaxation. This captivating experience offers a delightful atmosphere, **great music**, and numerous levels showcasing **high-definition artwork** of lovely girls. It's the ideal way to unwind after a busy day.

The game provides **multiple difficulty levels** to match your playstyle. Enjoy a relaxing experience enhanced by five distinct **HD quality art pieces** featuring beautiful girls, all contributing to a pleasant atmosphere. Explore various game modes, including EASY (4x4), MEDIUM (4x6), ADVANCED (6x10), HARD (8x14), and EPIC (10x16), each offering a unique challenge.

Name: Love in Belarus
Description:
Love in Belarus tells about the love story of a cute little dictator of Belarus. Aleksadr Lukashenko is the last dictator in Europe, desperately clinging to power and does not want to give it to anyone. But all this is only because of love. Help Lukashenka cope with this crisis and bring love to the territory of Belarus. Classic JRPG gameplay and turn-based combat system with many classes. (All characters and events are fictional)

Name: Mosaique Neko Waifus 2
Description:
How have you been? Crazy times we live in huh? Luckily you know just the right Neko girls! Care to recite some poetry with Sara? Or eat cookies with Niko? I think Sayouri and Sara have a secret romance going on. So sweet to look at them cuddling together! • Solve puzzles by rotating the right elements • Navigate the different dialogue choices, show the girls your charm! • Use special abilities that help you solve puzzles • Level up special abilities • Collect items that will boost your skills • view all the scenes unlocked in the gallery

Embark on a delightful journey in **Happy Quest**, a casual match-3 adventure where you play as a kind hunter in a charming town. Your primary mission is to assist beautiful girls in their quest to defeat formidable monsters, ultimately bringing them happiness.

### Meet the Characters

Happy Quest features a cast of engaging characters, each with their unique personalities and backstories.

*   **Rena: The Potent Potion Master**
    Rena is a sweet and funny girl who becomes remarkably serious when business calls. Though petite, she possesses unshakeable courage and isn't afraid to stand up to anyone. She reserves her playful teasing for those she cares about, including the protagonist. Rena excels in crafting potions, a talent she possesses in abundance but never boasts about. She understands that her appearance might lead others to underestimate her, but she has proven her formidable capabilities through sheer hard work.

*   **Sana: The Wise Elf Warrior**
    Sana is an elf warrior whose personality extends far beyond her martial prowess. Despite her stern demeanor, she deeply values life and believes that strategic retreat is often wiser than a heroic death. Sana is an intelligent and strong woman who harbors affection for humans and other races, even though her own kind often faces opposition. Her existing friendship with Rena facilitates her growing trust in the protagonist, who hails from Rena's circle.

*   **Georgia: The Respected Blacksmith**
    Georgia is a woman of immense physical and mental strength, commanding a team of men in her blacksmith shop with unyielding authority. She is a highly respected figure and the most skilled artisan in town, crafting weapons and armor for the king and his inner circle. The loss of a close friend in battle has led her to withdraw from such conflicts, though she keeps this pain private. While she forges instruments of war, Georgia views battles not as inherently evil, but as a necessary, albeit regrettable, aspect of life.

*   **Angami: The Enigmatic Naga Warrior**
    Angami is a powerful yet peculiar naga warrior tasked with watching over the protagonist. Despite this duty sometimes being an inconvenience, she rarely complains. Her responsibilities include training recruits across the kingdom. Beneath her tough exterior, Angami enjoys joking and teasing, particularly with those close to her. Though twelve years older than the protagonist, this fact is unknown to others. Her involvement began by assisting Georgia, but she has since grown fond of the protagonist, even bringing him food from her own home.

*   **Yuna: The Bewitched Succubus**
    Yuna is a playful succubus who typically targets the most desirable men in town. However, she finds herself unexpectedly captivated by the protagonist's kindness, experiencing love for the first time in her long existence. Her natural allure has always made attracting others effortless, making the protagonist's initial resistance to her advances a profound mystery. While usually lighthearted, Yuna develops an interest in human customs and even cooks for the protagonist as a token of her gratitude. Her attempts to tease him often backfire, leaving her embarrassed and the protagonist playfully teasing her in return.

### Game Features

Happy Quest offers an engaging experience with the following features:

*   **Engaging Gameplay:** Enjoy fun and challenging **match-3 puzzles**.
*   **Character Progression:** **Upgrade your character's stats and skills**.
*   **Diverse Enemies:** Encounter **over 50 animated enemies**.

**Step into the Future of Rhythm Gaming with Beat Saber**

**Beat Saber** is a **revolutionary rhythm game** that plunges you into a **vibrant, futuristic world**. As a **virtual warrior**, your objective is to slash through incoming blocks using your lightsabers. The game provides clear instructions on which saber to use and the required swing direction, creating an **incredibly engaging and fun gameplay experience**.

Key features of Beat Saber include:

*   **Meticulously designed levels:** Each level is crafted to be fresh and exciting.
*   **Energetic soundtrack:** Gameplay is perfectly synchronized with the music.
*   **Exceptional fusion of music and visuals:** This delivers a truly captivating sensory adventure.

Unlike games that use random generation, every song and level in Beat Saber is **expertly handcrafted by designers**. This ensures a flawless harmony between the gameplay and the music.

For those looking for a challenge, you can:

*   **Join players from across the globe** in exhilarating multiplayer matches.
*   Challenge friends and rivals worldwide.

The core mechanics of Beat Saber are **remarkably intuitive and easy to grasp**. This means anyone can start playing almost immediately. While mastering the game offers a deeply satisfying sense of accomplishment, its **dynamic gameplay also serves as a fantastic way to get exercise**. Beat Saber transforms your fitness routine into an enjoyable gaming session.

**Out of the Park Baseball 17: The Ultimate Baseball Strategy Simulation**

**Out of the Park Baseball 17 (OOTP 17)** is the **premier baseball strategy game**, recognized with Metacritic's prestigious PC Game of the Year award for 2016 and holding official licenses from MLB.com and the MLBPA. This game offers an unparalleled experience for baseball enthusiasts, allowing you to assume the role of a General Manager and/or Field Manager. You have the power to shape the destiny of your favorite real-world franchise, either by guiding its future or by rewriting its historical achievements. The depth of gameplay is truly **astonishing**, offering endless possibilities for any baseball aficionado.

You can begin a new career with any of the 2016 MLB teams or delve into nearly 150 years of baseball history to manage any team from the past. For those with a creative spark, OOTP 17 also allows you to construct your own fictional baseball universe or engage in competitive online leagues with other players. The game features a meticulously crafted 2016 MLB roster set, including all projected Opening Day MLB rosters and the complete minor league system down to rookie leagues, as well as future draft classes. You can ponder critical questions about player performance and team success, and the game empowers you to **find out and guide your favorite MLB franchise to glory!**

OOTP 17 provides a deeply engaging management experience. You can meticulously set your team's lineups, pitching staffs, and in-game strategies. Whether you prefer to oversee your league from a high-level strategic perspective or immerse yourself in the action by playing out each game, managing play-by-play or even pitch-by-pitch, the choice is yours. Player progression is remarkably realistic over time, allowing you to build a championship team through the draft or secure crucial free agent signings.

Revolutionary new features elevate the experience. The **all-new MLBPA license** brings players to life with **authentic FaceGen images of real players**, enhancing visual immersion. With realistic player aging, real-time emotional responses, and automatic uniform adjustments for trades and free agency for most major leaguers, you'll feel more connected to your club than ever before. The game also boasts new **3D animation** with moving player symbols executing plays, and greatly improved, authentic 3D major league ballparks, delivering the most powerful in-game experience to date. The **all-new Historical Exhibition mode** allows you to pit any two major league teams from 1901 to 2015 against each other, even recreating past World Series matchups with authentic rosters.

Explore "What if...?" scenarios with authentic historical minor league systems from 1919 through 2015, featuring over 100,000 real players. New support for multi-core processors means OOTP 17 **cranks through simulations and other demanding tasks up to 60% faster** than the previous iteration. Automatically generated game recap headlines and stories provide engaging reports. General Managers will face **smarter, more cunning AI GMs and managers** with individualized approaches to roster-building, scouting, and financial management. A beautifully redesigned game interface makes it effortless to construct your baseball empire. Dozens of additional new features await, including recoded scouting, enhanced AI, more realistic player development, and definable trade needs.

**Own the future – rewrite the past!**

Visit us on www.ootpdevelopments.com

Twitter: [Link Placeholder]

Visit www.MLBPLAYERS.com, the Players Choice on the web.

**NBA 2K17: A New Standard in Basketball Simulation**

Building on the success of NBA 2K16, NBA 2K17 continues to set the benchmark for **authentic sports gaming**. This latest installment aims to be the **ultimate basketball simulation**, offering an experience that truly mirrors the sport itself.

NBA 2K17 elevates the gameplay, bringing players closer to the **real-world basketball experience** than ever before. Get ready for an immersive simulation that redefines the genre.

**Inertial Drift: A Unique Arcade Racer with Twin-Stick Drifting**

Inertial Drift stands out in the arcade racing genre with its distinctive 90s retro-future aesthetic and a truly unique handling model. The game introduces an innovative twin-stick drift mechanic that offers both accessibility for newcomers and a deep challenge for seasoned players. This dual-stick control system separates steering (left stick) from drifting (right stick), providing an independent and satisfying way to navigate corners. According to the developers, this approach creates a driving experience that is genuinely unlike anything players have encountered before.

The game features 16 distinct cars, each possessing unique characteristics that players will need to master. These vehicles range from sport hatchbacks and coupes to supercars, offering a variety of driving styles. Players can test their skills on a diverse set of 7 race event types, including traditional races, head-to-heads, time trials, and style showdowns. The racetracks themselves are set within bold and distinctive environments, from neon-lit city streets and rural temple complexes to winding mountain passes. These environments are further enhanced by vibrant cityscapes, coastal sunsets, starry skies, and snow-capped peaks. To further test mastery, Inertial Drift offers local co-op and online multiplayer modes, allowing players to compete against others and prove their drifting prowess.

Name: Pinball FX3
Description:
Williams™ Pinball classics are now available -- and Fish Tales™ is yours for FREE! Zen is proud to bring these amazing games to players around the world. Enjoy! Pinball FX3 is the biggest, most community focused pinball game ever created. Multiplayer matchups, user generated tournaments and league play create endless opportunity for pinball competition. FREE backwards compatibility! Bring your previous Pinball FX2 purchases with you to Pinball FX3 at no charge! Not so hot with the flippers? Pinball FX3 features new single player modes that will help you become a better player! All tables have received graphics updates including real-time lighting and shadow projection. Zen Studios will continue to support Pinball FX3 with frequent content releases and new features!

**F1™ 2017: Master the Track and Forge Your Legend**

Dive into the thrilling world of the 2017 Formula 1 Championship with F1™ 2017. **Pilot the fastest F1 cars ever built** and relive motorsport history with legendary classic vehicles. This game offers an unmatched Formula 1 experience, featuring a **vastly expanded ten-year Career mode**, innovative gameplay in the new ‘Championships’ mode, and numerous improvements for both online and offline racing.

Beyond the track, F1™ 2017 delivers a complete F1 experience. The career mode is significantly enhanced, offering more practice programs to hone your skills, a **deeper Research and Development system** for car upgrades, and detailed management of engines and gearboxes throughout the season. With new circuits and compelling characters, this is the **most complete F1 simulation to date**.

**Shape Your Career and Drive Iconic Classics**

**Craft your racing destiny** across multiple seasons in the revamped career mode. Strategically manage your resources to improve performance, ensure car reliability, and avoid penalties. You'll oversee critical power unit components and develop team skills like pit stop efficiency and R&D progress. New practice programs, such as ‘Fuel Management’ and ‘Race Pace,’ help you earn valuable in-game resources. **Classic cars are a key part of career mode**, appearing in new ‘invitational events.’ Players can now choose female driver avatars, change their car number and helmet design mid-season, and claim the coveted number 1 designation after winning the Driver’s Championship. **Iconic F1 cars from Ferrari, McLaren, Red Bull Racing, Renault, and Williams** are available in all game modes, integrated into career progression and for various event types.

**Boost Your Multiplayer and Discover New Modes**

**Compete online with up to 20 cars** in public or private sessions, complete with spectator features. Improved matchmaking, updated online stats, and a robust leveling system create a more engaging competitive environment. You can race either the 2017 season cars or the classic vehicles in any multiplayer session. The ‘Event mode’ has been expanded with a new scoring system. The **brand-new ‘Championships’ mode** introduces unique race events with distinct rule sets, offering fresh gameplay within a structured championship framework. For the first time, F1 2017 includes **four alternative track layouts** alongside the 20 official circuits, plus a stunning ‘Monaco at Night’ circuit. Tobii Eye Tracking support further enhances immersion by allowing camera control through gaze, helping you stay focused on the race.

Get ready to **embrace your inner Viking** in Ragnarock, the ultimate VR rhythm game! This exhilarating experience lets you **smash incoming runes** to the beat of **epic Viking music**, all while racing in a longship.

Your goal is to **hit every rune perfectly** in sync with a **powerful soundtrack**. This collection features legendary bands like Alestorm, Gloryhammer, Saltatio Mortis, and Wind Rose. As you **master each beat**, you'll charge up your hammers with **combo energy**, unlocking a **speed boost** to pull ahead in the race. The game's tracklist is a **carefully chosen mix** of festive Viking, Celtic, and pirate-themed rock and metal anthems, designed to **fuel your Viking spirit**.

Ragnarock follows the **classic arcade game principle**: **simple to pick up, but difficult to master**. Your **rhythm is key** for moving forward, but **true success requires skill and practice**. With **various difficulty levels**, you can improve your abilities over time. Only the **most committed players** will earn all the gold medals, break high scores, and claim their place on the **prestigious leaderboard**.

Engage in **intense cross-platform multiplayer** by challenging friends or other players in live PvP races. You can host public or private games for up to six players and **compete for first place**. For solo players, race against **ghost ships** – representing your best times or top players – for added competitive excitement.

Immerse yourself in **beautiful, stylized environments** inspired by Norse mythology, placing you right in the heart of Viking lands.

Want to play your own music? Ragnarock **supports custom songs**, letting you turn any track from your music library into a solo mode challenge. Find more information in our FAQ at (-vr.com/faq).

OlliOlli World is a vibrant skateboarding action-platformer that invites players into the imaginative world of Radlandia. This game emphasizes fluid movement and creative expression, allowing players to grind, trick, and air their way through visually rich environments. The core objective involves discovering the mystical skate gods on a quest for Gnarvana, encountering a cast of colorful characters and navigating a world that is both delightful and peculiar.

As players traverse Radlandia, they will undertake missions and challenges, fostering new connections along the way. A significant aspect of OlliOlli World is the deep customization options, enabling players to personalize their character's appearance, tricks, and overall style. The game features explorable levels with multiple branching paths, offering a wide array of opportunities for players to showcase their unique approach to gameplay. According to Roll7, the BAFTA and multi-award-winning studio behind the game, OlliOlli World marks the third installment in the critically acclaimed OlliOlli series.

The game's design encourages exploration of a lush skateboarding utopia, brimming with eccentric characters and captivating locations. Players can discover new routes, side quests, and trick opportunities in areas like Inflatable Alley or Los Vulgas. This exploration is enhanced by a curated soundtrack of IDM and Electronica tracks. Roll7 highlights that the game's super-tight controls and refined gameplay create a remarkably smooth experience.

OlliOlli World is designed to be accessible to newcomers, with mechanics that allow new players to perform impressive tricks without the frustration of frequent failures. For those seeking a challenge, the game offers millions of unique levels in its sandbox mode, alongside global competitions in Leagues. A deep combo system, featuring over 100 moves to master and combine, provides ample opportunity for players to achieve high scores. Players can also unlock special rewards to further customize their character's look, tricks, and style, with the game embracing a philosophy of player freedom where "as long as you’re on board anything goes!"

**Download Burnout™ Paradise: The Ultimate Box** and experience the **definitive open-world racing adventure**. This edition places you in **Paradise City**, the largest and most exhilarating environment in the celebrated Burnout series.

Here's what awaits you:

*   **Vast Open World:** Explore an expansive, open-ended city filled with **over 70 unique cars**.
*   **Extensive Road Network:** Navigate **hundreds of miles of roads**, including **hidden underground passages**.

Your progress in Paradise City is tracked by your driver's license, which you advance by earning points through various racing events. The ultimate objective is to achieve the **prestigious "Burnout" license**. This is earned by performing **daring feats**, such as:

*   Smashing through billboards
*   Executing massive jumps
*   Surviving spectacular crashes

The game's enhanced damage system makes these moments incredibly impactful.

**Burnout™ Paradise: The Ultimate Box** builds upon the original game's acclaimed gameplay and modes by introducing **exciting new features specifically for PC players**.

Key additions include:

*   **Day/Night Cycles:** Experience **cruising Paradise City at night**, offering a fresh visual perspective.
*   **Motorcycles:** A new vehicle type adds a new dimension of excitement, featuring **70 motorcycle-specific challenges**. Begin with two powerful bikes, the FV1100 and Nakamura Firehawk V4, and unlock more as you play.
*   **Dynamic Weather Systems:** These ensure that no two races feel the same.

Even if you're a returning player, you've **never encountered a challenge quite like The Burnout™ Paradise: The Ultimate Box**. Download this definitive edition for PC today.

Name: DiRT Rally
Description:
DiRT Rally out now for macOS and Linux DiRT Rally is the most authentic and thrilling rally game ever made, road-tested over 80 million miles by the DiRT community. It perfectly captures that white knuckle feeling of racing on the edge as you hurtle along dangerous roads at breakneck speed, knowing that one crash could irreparably harm your stage time. DiRT Rally also includes officially licensed World Rallycross content, allowing you to experience the breathless, high-speed thrills of some of the world’s fastest off-road cars as you trade paint with other drivers at some of the series’ best-loved circuits, in both singleplayer and high-intensity multiplayer races. • ICONIC RALLY CARS - DiRT Rally boasts over 40 of the most iconic and relevant cars from yesteryear through to modern day, representing the cars that the players want, and the ones that make the most sense for the surfaces they race on. • SIX MASSIVE RALLIES WITH OVER 70 STAGES - Head to the muddy paths of Wales, the dusty trails of Greece and the icy tarmac of Monte Carlo. Take on the legendary hillclimb of Pikes Peak, the snowy thrills of Sweden, and the epic scenery of Finland. • OFFICIAL FIA WORLD RALLYCROSS CONTENT – Race at the Lydden Hill, Holjes and Hell tracks in six of the fastest off-road cars and take on your friends in high intensity, bumper-to-bumper multiplayer racing. • CUSTOM RALLY EVENTS: Take any car on any track – configure and compete in single or multi-stage events. • RALLY CHAMPIONSHIPS: Start on the bottom rung of the rally ladder and compete in a succession of events, earning points and money on your way to promotion. Use skilful driving and manage your repair schedules as you work your way to the top division and earn the most lucrative rewards. • UPGRADES, REPAIRS, SETUP AND TUNING - DiRT Rally delivers depth in areas beyond driving – elements such as repairs, upgrades, and setup & tuning add a rich and strategic dimension to your rally experience. • CHALLENGING, UNCOMPROMISING HANDLING MODEL - Codemasters has completely rebuilt the physical simulation for DIRT Rally to adequately capture how it feels to race across changing surfaces and has created brand new models for differential, suspension, engine mapping and turbo modelling. • TEAM MANAGEMENT - Hire and fire your crew members each of whom which will have different skills, improving repair times for different parts of the car. Teach them new skills as they gain experience and work together as a team to improve your performance in events. • PLAYER LEAGUE SUPPORT - Get together with friends and run your very own racing league. Join or create unlimited leagues and run them how and when you want. • DAILY, WEEKLY AND MONTHLY ONLINE CHALLENGES - It’s you versus the entire DiRT community in a series of one-day, week-long and month-long challenges to earn in-game credits to improve your car and team.

In the vibrant world of Victusia, the esteemed Battle Chef Brigade stands as a testament to the thrilling fusion of monster hunting and culinary artistry. This elite organization honors individuals who not only conquer formidable beasts but also transform them into exquisite culinary creations. For those with aspirations of joining their ranks, a rigorous competition awaits, offering a challenging path to becoming a Brigadier.

Players step into the shoes of either Mina or Thrash, two ambitious contestants vying for a coveted spot in the Brigade. To achieve Brigadier status, participants must master the art of monster hunting, employing strategic combo attacks to defeat their quarry. Following the hunt, the acquired ingredients are then prepared through engaging puzzle-based cooking challenges. The ultimate objective is to present delectable dishes that captivate the judges before the clock runs out. Developers at [Developer Name, if known] have characterized the gameplay as a dynamic blend of "old-school brawling and intricate combo puzzling," enhanced with elements of role-playing.

The Deluxe edition elevates the experience with the inclusion of new content and characters, notably Ziggy, the Undead Necromancer Chef, who is now a playable character. This enhanced version also introduces significant improvements to multiplayer functionality, featuring Local Multiplayer. Players can now select Mina, Thrash, or Ziggy to participate in battles. The game provides a diverse array of modes designed to test players' abilities, including Daily Cook-Off, Restaurant Rush, Break the Dishes, and Survival Mode, complete with leaderboards. A newly added Free Play Mode encourages experimentation with various cooking combinations, while the Art Gallery offers a visual journey through the game's distinctive illustrations. As articulated by a representative from [Developer Name, if known], "The experience is designed to be a captivating blend of old-school brawling and intricate combo puzzling."

## Wobbledogs: A Unique 3D Pet Simulation Focused on Mutation and Evolution

**Wobbledogs** is a distinctive 3D pet simulation where you nurture a collection of **dogs that rapidly mutate and evolve**. These virtual pets are physically simulated, offering a relaxed and engaging environment for pet ownership. The game centers on the captivating process of **evolutionary mutation and genetics**, making it a casual sandbox experience suitable for all ages.

Your Wobbledogs start as ordinary puppies, but as they progress through their evolutionary lines, they undergo **surprising mutations and develop unpredictable behaviors**. This transformation is governed by a simulated genetics system that dictates their highly varied physical forms. As your dogs mature, they enter a pupal stage, leading to significant physical changes. The game's mechanics ensure that **each dog has unique personality traits that affect their typical behaviors and how they interact with others and objects**. Furthermore, the **diet your Wobbledogs eat is crucial for their mutations**. Their digestive systems host different flora, which in turn influences their physical development, allowing you to actively shape your dogs according to your vision.

Creating a suitable habitat is essential for your Wobbledogs to thrive. As you play, you'll unlock a variety of objects and decorations. You can connect rooms and customize them, designing comfortable resting spots, building intricate mazes, or cultivating lush gardens for your canine companions. **Wobbledogs has no set goals**, allowing you to pursue your preferred activities. The game's physically simulated dogs add a unique layer to their actions. As the developers explain, **dogs with different body structures will naturally interact with the world in distinct ways.**

While **Wobbledogs is enjoyable through passive observation, direct interaction is also highly rewarding**. You can pet your dogs to reduce their stress, toss a puppy to see it tumble, or help a dog that finds itself in a difficult situation. These dogs always try their best, but sometimes they need a little assistance!

Name: Grow: Song of the Evertree
Description:
Over time, the Worlds of Alaria faded. The Evertree – where many worlds resided on its countless branches – is now nothing more than a sapling, its splendor long erased from memory. No one knows how to make it grow. But you are different. You hear the sun as it sings across the sky. You hear the language of rain against the earth. You are the last of the Everheart Alchemists and it is your ancestral task and privilege to care for the Evertree. Discover a Vibrant Unique World… at Your Own Pace Find unique places, blooming with fantastic fauna and flora as you are encouraged to explore this beautiful world at your own pace. How do you want to spend your time? Exploring caves and solving puzzles, collecting minerals and flowers, fishing or catching bugs … it’s up to you! Grow Your Own Worlds! Learn to craft World Seeds through Alchemy to generate totally new worlds with unique characteristics. Tend those worlds to rejuvenate them and see how they change, and watch as new properties emerge before your very eyes! You can generate unique meadows, deserts, frozen worlds and… oh, well… Alchemy is not an exact science, some seeds may contain unexpected surprises. Meet New People and Create A Community! Get to know interesting and unique characters, listen to their stories, and help them when they need it. You can make them happier by finding a place for them to stay, helping them land their dream job, or gifting them accessories and decorations. Build the Town of Your Dreams Grow offers an impressive catalogue of the cutest buildings and structures to create the town you want. Place them freely and customize them to make sure it feels like home! A Beautiful Soundtrack A Beautiful Soundtrack by games and anime composer, Kevin Penkin. Mystery! Ruins, caves, secret areas… explore and unveil the long-lost knowledge of the Evertree by accessing its very heart.

Embark on a captivating single-player adventure in **Omno**, an exploration game where you'll journey through an ancient world filled with puzzles, secrets, and challenges. You'll use the power of a lost civilization to travel across a variety of stunning landscapes. These diverse environments include:

*   Lush forests
*   Sun-blasted deserts
*   Frozen tundras
*   And even ethereal clouds

As you explore Omno, you'll encounter a vibrant world alive with unique creatures. From small, charming critters to mysterious giants, there's a wealth of life to discover. This remarkable game was created by Jonas Manke, a solo developer and father of three. He dedicated five years to this passion project, drawing on his extensive background as an animator in the gaming and film industries.

Name: QT
Description:
FUN FEATURES ☀️ 3 CUTE GAMES (QT, MUSEUM and KOUEN) 🐤 1000's OF FRIENDS TO MEET · ◡ · ⭐ OVER 60 FUN ACHIEVEMENTS 🐕 SHORT-ISH WEIRD GAMES · ◡ · 🌞 A BILLION SECRETS TO UNCOVER 🎉QT ANNIVERSARY!!!🎉 Trading cards, badges and emotes now added!

Name: A Building Full of Cats
Description:
A Building Full of Cats is a hidden object game where you need to pet all the cats in the building. Don't leave any cats behind! 300+ cats 5+ Floors 50+ hidden cats Secret cats? Who knows...

Name: Button City
Description:
Fennel is a shy little fox who just moved into town. After discovering the local arcade, he makes new friends and gets swept up in a whirlwind adventure to save it from being shut down at the paws of greedy fat cat Peppermint Pepperbottom! Button City is a narrative adventure game about friendship and community. Enter a pastel diorama world inspired by 90’s nostalgia and filled with cute characters to befriend. Complete quirky quests around town, play arcade games, collect fun costumes, solve puzzles and more as you follow a story from beginning to end about growing up and saving the things that are important to you. Explore a beautiful and lovingly crafted world in a low poly art style. Befriend a cast of charming animal characters. Complete fun and silly side quests at your own pace. Master arcade games to unlock new game modes and prize items! Dress up in fun costumes and decorate your room. ★ Gobabots is the latest craze sweeping the arcade. Two teams of four cute fruit robots battle it out in an intergalactic competition to make the biggest smoothie! Each Gobabot has its own unique weapons and attacks -- collect them all at the arcade prize counter, form your perfect team, and become arcade champions! ★ Zoom down Watermelon Mountain in tuned-up electric cars in rEVolution Racer , a pastel take on classic arcade racing games. Race as Evie in her custom EV Sprinter against her fierce rival Spin. Drift to charge your batteries then unleash extreme boosts to speed past the competition! ★ Prisma Beats is a rainbow rhythm game with funky visuals and awesome tunes! Hit notes on the beat and show off your best dance moves -- and try out the challenge modes, if you’re feeling competitive.

**Master Time in "Meet Me at NooN": A Puzzle Adventure Where Time Itself is the Key**

"Meet Me at NooN" is a captivating puzzle adventure where time itself is broken. The **Grand Hourglass has shattered**, releasing two temporal spirits. Your mission is to command these spirits, who create daily time loops, to solve increasingly complex puzzles. Success hinges on understanding their unique behaviors, how they influence each other, and how their interactions reshape the flow of time. Are you ready to explore the new rules of the continuum?

The core gameplay revolves around controlling two distinct characters: the **Day Spirit** and the **Night Spirit**. While they may appear similar, their mechanics are fundamentally different, and you'll need to leverage these distinctions to your advantage. Every action you perform with one spirit is recorded and then replayed when you switch to the other, creating intricate, interconnected time loops. The **Day Spirit** possesses the ability to **rewind its actions**, allowing for immediate corrections and strategic adjustments. In contrast, the **Night Spirit** **replays its actions precisely as they occurred**, generating a predictable echo that can be used to your advantage. "Meet Me at NooN" offers a **pressure-free experience**, free from failure states or time limits. This design encourages experimentation and exploration, allowing you to freely move through the timeline and return to any previous point without worry.

**Spring Falls** is a **meditative puzzle game** that invites you to explore the fascinating processes of **water, erosion, and growth**. Your goal is to **manipulate the landscape** and nurture wildflowers as you descend a **peaceful mountainside**.

The game offers a **relaxing experience** through its **soft visuals**, **ambient guitar music**, and **environmental sounds**.

Key features include:

*   **60 hand-crafted levels** to challenge your puzzle-solving skills.
*   **Unique gameplay** centered around the dynamic flow of water.
*   An **ambient-folk soundtrack** complemented by **organic atmospheric sounds**.
*   **Gorgeous mountain vista backdrops** that enhance the serene atmosphere.

**Rainy City: Pandemic - A Cyberpunk Tale of Survival and Hope**

"It's like the Papers, Please of 2020," exclaims TooStupidGamerz, capturing the essence of *Rainy City: Pandemic*. This compelling story-based game plunges players into a cyberpunk future where a relentless pandemic has reshaped society. As a dedicated worker, your primary mission is to save your sister, Naomi, who is falling ill. You must earn enough money for her treatment before her condition deteriorates further.

Your journey will take you through the rain-slicked streets of Rainy City, making deliveries for Betty's Pizza. Along the way, you'll encounter a diverse cast of characters, each with their own stories and struggles. From friendly neighbors to those living on the fringes of society, you'll hear firsthand accounts of how their lives have been impacted by the ongoing pandemic. These interactions offer a chance to reflect on your own past and the broader human experience.

Despite the grim realities of Rainy City, the game emphasizes that hope and optimism can still be found. The core gameplay revolves around navigating the city and completing deliveries, a task that becomes increasingly urgent as Naomi's health hangs in the balance. Can you manage your time and resources effectively to secure the treatment your sister desperately needs?

The evocative trailer music, 'Chill Wave' by Kevin MacLeod, licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0, further enhances the game's atmospheric and introspective mood.

Name: Hades
Description:
Hades is a god-like rogue-like dungeon crawler that combines the best aspects of Supergiant's critically acclaimed titles, including the fast-paced action of Bastion , the rich atmosphere and depth of Transistor , and the character-driven storytelling of Pyre . BATTLE OUT OF HELL As the immortal Prince of the Underworld, you'll wield the powers and mythic weapons of Olympus to break free from the clutches of the god of the dead himself, while growing stronger and unraveling more of the story with each unique escape attempt. UNLEASH THE FURY OF OLYMPUS The Olympians have your back! Meet Zeus, Athena, Poseidon, and many more, and choose from their dozens of powerful Boons that enhance your abilities. There are thousands of viable character builds to discover as you go. BEFRIEND GODS, GHOSTS, AND MONSTERS A fully-voiced cast of colorful, larger-than-life characters is waiting to meet you! Grow your relationships with them, and experience thousands of unique story events as you learn about what's really at stake for this big, dysfunctional family. BUILT FOR REPLAYABILITY New surprises await each time you delve into the ever-shifting Underworld, whose guardian bosses will remember you. Use the powerful Mirror of Night to grow permanently stronger, and give yourself a leg up the next time you run away from home. NOTHING IS IMPOSSIBLE Permanent upgrades mean you don't have to be a god yourself to experience the exciting combat and gripping story. Though, if you happen to be one, crank up the challenge and get ready for some white-knuckle action that will put your well-practiced skills to the test. SIGNATURE SUPERGIANT STYLE The rich, atmospheric presentation and unique melding of gameplay and narrative that's been core to Supergiant's games is here in full force: spectacular hand-painted environments and a blood-pumping original score bring the Underworld to life.

**Spelunky 2: A Vastly Expanded Roguelike Adventure**

Prepare for an **even bigger and more dynamic world** in Spelunky 2, the highly anticipated sequel to the beloved roguelike platformer. This time, a new generation of explorers ventures to the Moon, driven by the search for **treasures and missing family**. Spelunky 2 takes the **unique, randomized challenges** that defined the original and elevates them, offering a **massive adventure** designed to captivate both seasoned players and newcomers alike.

The game's world is significantly denser, packed with **more areas, characters, traps, and items** than ever before. You'll discover **new ways for elements to interact**, creating unpredictable and exciting scenarios. Spelunky 2 also introduces a **third dimension** to its classic 2D platforming, with **branching paths and multi-layered levels**. Imagine exploring behind the main playfield to uncover **treasure rooms and hidden passages**! Furthermore, you can now **tame and ride animals**, adding a whole new layer of gameplay. The **dynamic liquid physics** further enhance the reactivity of the world, presenting fresh challenges as water and lava behave with **realistic fluidity**.

Beyond the perilous caves, Spelunky 2 introduces a **thriving Base Camp**. Here, **unlocked characters** gather between your daring expeditions, offering **encouragement and valuable advice**. As you progress, your camp will **expand and develop into a welcoming community**, providing a safe haven when you need a break. Base Camp also serves as a place to access **shortcuts and practice your skills** without consequence.

Spelunky 2 is more than just a game about mastering its mechanics; it's an **endlessly replayable playground** for experimentation. You'll forge your own unique stories within its **expansive, deeply interactive world brimming with secrets**. The more you play, the more the game truly becomes **yours**.

**Key Features at a Glance:**

*   **A Bigger World:** Explore **all-new areas, encounter unique monsters, navigate treacherous traps, and discover exciting items**.
*   **An Extra Dimension:** Access a **second layer behind the normal playfield**, potentially revealing **treasure rooms and secret passages**.
*   **Multiple Routes:** Experience **greater variety and personalize your runs** with numerous paths through the game.
*   **Find and Ride Mounts:** Discover creatures like **turkeys** with special abilities, and watch out – enemies might ride them too!
*   **New NPCs:** Encounter **new characters** whose fates are in your hands, making each run feel like a **unique story**.
*   **Classic Concepts Evolved:** Veteran players will need to **rethink strategies** with variations on familiar elements like shops and ghosts.
*   **Improved Liquid Physics:** Witness **realistic water and lava movement** that dramatically impacts gameplay.
*   **Deadly Status Effects:** Face the threat of **poison and curses**, which can affect both players and enemies.
*   **Build a Permanent Home:** Develop your **Base Camp** into a permanent sanctuary as you explore.
*   **Enhanced Visuals and Audio:** Immerse yourself in **richer design with improved lighting and special effects**.
*   **Deeper Mysteries:** Unravel **complex secrets** that might even require a **community effort**.
*   **Possibly More Eggplants!**

**Into the Breach: Advanced Edition - A Deeper Dive into Turn-Based Strategy**

The critically acclaimed turn-based strategy game, *Into the Breach*, has just received a massive free update: *Advanced Edition*. This expansion significantly broadens the gameplay experience with a wealth of new content. Prepare for an even greater challenge with five new mech squads and nearly forty new weapons to master. The threat has escalated, introducing more formidable enemies, tougher bosses, and expanded mission objectives. To aid in your fight, four new pilots join the fray, bringing with them triple the amount of pilot skills to customize your approach. For those seeking the ultimate test, the new "Unfair" Mode offers a punishing difficulty designed for the most seasoned tacticians.

In *Into the Breach*, you command powerful mechs from the future to defend the last vestiges of human civilization. Gigantic creatures, known as Vek, are emerging from beneath the earth, threatening to extinguish humanity. Each playthrough offers a unique, randomly generated challenge, demanding careful planning and tactical execution. The core gameplay loop revolves around defending vital civilian buildings that power your mechs. Protecting these structures from the Vek is paramount, and you must be mindful of your own attacks to avoid collateral damage. The game's minimalistic, turn-based combat features telegraphed enemy attacks, allowing you to analyze your opponent's moves and devise the perfect counter-strategy each turn. As you battle the Vek infestation across diverse Corporate-Nation islands, you'll discover powerful new weapons and unique pilots to assemble the ultimate mech. Even in defeat, *Into the Breach* offers a glimmer of hope: failure isn't the end, as you can send aid back through time to save another timeline.

Spelunky is a distinctive platformer that delivers a fresh and unpredictable adventure with its randomized levels. Embark on an expedition into the depths of the earth, discovering wondrous locales teeming with a variety of creatures, perilous traps, and valuable treasures. You possess absolute autonomy as you traverse environments that are entirely destructible, uncovering their numerous hidden secrets. The decisions you make—whether to persist or retreat, to save or abandon, to purchase or pilfer—are entirely yours, and their outcomes will follow.

This game offers a "roguelike" platforming experience, featuring randomly generated and fully destructible levels packed with hazards. Swift decision-making and a thorough comprehension of the game's mechanics are essential for survival.

A key feature is the explorer's journal, provided by your mentor Yang, which allows you to meticulously document your journey and progress.

Spelunky also supports local cooperative play for up to four players, enabling both collaborative efforts and chaotic competition. For those seeking direct confrontation, 72 distinct and lethal arenas are available for Deathmatch battles against friends or AI opponents.

The Daily Challenge presents a unique opportunity: each day, a new set of levels is generated, allowing you to compete online against the global Steam community with a single attempt.

The game boasts a vibrant ensemble of 20 explorers, 16 of which can be unlocked, each with their own aspirations for riches.

Be prepared for a challenging yet rewarding experience. You will encounter numerous painful, amusing, and unexpected ways to meet your demise. However, each failure serves as a learning opportunity, deepening your understanding of Spelunky's intricate workings and bringing you closer to unraveling its profound enigmas.

**Slay the Spire** is a **highly acclaimed single-player deckbuilder** that masterfully blends the strategic depth of card games with the thrilling unpredictability of roguelikes. Your mission is to **forge a unique deck**, confront **bizarre creatures**, unearth **relics of immense power**, and ultimately, **Slay the Spire!**

The game features **dynamic deck building**, where you'll choose your cards wisely from hundreds available to add to your deck during each ascent. Discovering cards that synergize effectively is key to efficiently dispatching foes and reaching the summit. The Spire itself is ever-changing; each journey presents a **different layout**, forcing you to choose between risky or safe paths, face varied enemies, select new cards, find different relics, and even battle unique bosses.

Throughout your climb, you'll encounter **powerful relics**, items that can significantly enhance your deck through potent interactions. However, be warned: acquiring these powerful artifacts may come at a cost beyond mere gold.

**Slay the Spire** has officially left Early Access, boasting an impressive array of content:

*   **Four distinct characters**, each with their own unique card sets.
*   **Over 350 fully implemented cards** to discover and utilize.
*   **More than 200 different items** to find, offering strategic advantages.
*   **Over 50 unique combat encounters** to test your mettle.
*   **More than 50 mysterious events** that can either aid or hinder your progress.
*   **Daily Climbs** allow you to compare your performance with players worldwide.
*   A **Custom mode** lets you mix and match various run modifiers for truly unique challenges.

Embark on a **thrilling post-apocalyptic journey** in Nuclear Throne, a top-down shooter packed with **roguelike challenges**. You'll be thrust into a **desolate world** where humanity has vanished, leaving **mutated creatures** to rule the barren lands. Your **primary objective** is to fight your way through these **treacherous wastelands**.

To conquer this harsh environment, you must:

*   **Wield powerful weapons**: Discover and master a variety of destructive armaments.
*   **Gather radiation**: This is your key to survival and progression.
*   **Mutate and evolve**: Radiation allows you to gain new limbs and **game-changing abilities**, fundamentally altering your playstyle.

The **ultimate prize**? Reaching the **legendary Nuclear Throne**. However, be warned: this **epic quest** demands **significant skill and dedicated practice**.

**Dead Cells: A RogueVania Masterpiece**

Are you a seasoned gamer who has navigated the evolution of roguelikes, witnessed the explosion of roguelites, and perhaps even encountered the niche of roguelite-lites? Prepare yourself for **Dead Cells**, a groundbreaking **RogueVania** that masterfully blends the addictive replayability of modern roguelites like *Rogue Legacy*, *Binding of Isaac*, *Enter the Gungeon*, and *Spelunky*, with the intricate world design and progressive exploration of classic Metroidvanias such as *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night*.

**Dead Cells** delivers an unparalleled gaming experience through its unique **RogueVania** structure. This means you'll embark on a journey of **progressive exploration** through an **interconnected world**, all while enjoying the **replayability** inherent in roguelites and the **thrilling threat of permadeath**.

The combat in **Dead Cells** is a **2D Souls-lite action** marvel. Expect **tough but fair combat** that demands precision and skill. You'll wield **more than fifty unique weapons and spells**, each offering distinct gameplay mechanics. And when the pressure mounts, the **emergency panic roll** is your trusty escape.

**Nonlinear progression** is a cornerstone of the **Dead Cells** experience. Will you brave the Sewers, the Ossuary, or the Ramparts? Once you unlock **special permanent abilities**, new paths and secrets become accessible, allowing you to tailor your route to your current **build**, **play style**, or simply your **mood**.

**Exploration** is richly rewarded. Discover **secret rooms**, **hidden passages**, and **charming landscapes**. Take a moment to ascend the towers and **breathe in the fresh sea mist**. The **interconnected levels** and the **progressive unlocking of access** to the island serve as a powerful **incentive to explore**. Coupled with character **evolution** and **permanent weapon upgrades**, it's clear how **Dead Cells** draws inspiration from its Metroidvania predecessors. Ultimately, however, your **player skills** are paramount. Roguelites thrive on constant improvement, transforming seemingly insurmountable challenges into manageable feats. The **unforgiving combat**, combined with the absence of a safety net, creates an **adrenaline-pumping ride** with **unrivaled replayability** on every single run.

**Dead Cells** officially launched out of Early Access on August 7th, 2018, and boasts an impressive array of content:

*   **13 Levels**: Each level presents a distinct atmosphere, unique foes, and secrets waiting to be uncovered.
*   **4 Bosses**: Crafted by developers renowned for their sadistic tendencies and honed by rigorous tester feedback.
*   **Approximately 90 Weapons and Skills**: From spears and swords to bows and freeze blasts, the arsenal is vast.
*   **4 Special Powers**: These act as Metroidvania-style gear locks, unlocking new areas and paths.
*   **1 Epic Combat System**: Responsive, fluid, and incredibly fun to master.
*   **1 Daily Run Mode**: Complete with leaderboards, allowing you to boast your prowess to your friends.
*   **Hours of Fun**: Expect anywhere from 10 to 30 hours or more, heavily dependent on your skill level.
*   **A Few Rage-Quits**: Okay, perhaps a lot of rage quits… But you’ll **git gud**… Eventually.

Name: Rogue Legacy 2
Description:
Rogue Legacy is back! But now it's got a 2 on the end of it! Rogue Legacy 2 is a genealogical rogue-LITE. That means it has all the trappings of a typical rogue-like (randomized runs, changing characters, and more), but with persistent upgrades, and persistent dead heirs. In this game, your legacy defines you. Spend your parents’ inheritance and grow the family manor to give your children a better fighting chance. Each child is unique, with their own traits and abilities. Your daughter could be a Ranger. She could also be vegan. It’s a new experience every time. Rogue Legacy 2 also lets you play how you want to. Go hard and fast, and dive deeper into the depths of a randomly-generated world. Or take it slow and steady and build your character up until you’re ready for greater challenges. Every Adventure is Unique New monsters, new traps, and new layouts await you every time you enter the Kingdom. This is a world where improvisation, and not memorization is the key to success. Wildly New Classes No two classes play the same. Hide atop Ivy Canopies as the Ranger, and rain poisoned arrows down onto your foes. Take to the skies as a Dragon Lancer and fly across the skies striking foes at massive speeds. Or sing and dance through your enemies, as the joyous bard, leaving only a trail of bodies behind you. Rogue Legacy 2 supports 15 new classes, with 15 distinct styles of play. Brand New Style We’re taking a whole new artistic approach to Rogue Legacy 2. The sequel features 2.5D stylings, with 3D characters against hand-drawn backdrops. The art uses heavy shading and all animations are done using stepping techniques to keep the familiar RL look and feel. Revamped Biome Generation We went all-out with biome generation to make each area in RL2 feel completely new. Each biome adopts different “build strategies” to create completely unique yet-still-randomly-generated regions. True Metroidvania To really push the metroidvania flair, RL2 introduces heirlooms: special items that permanently give your heroes new abilities that fully reveal the world’s secrets. These are not basic lock-in-key abilities, but powers that fundamentally change how you play. And heirlooms are not simply handed to you. You must prove your worth, provided you can find them. Traits 2.0 Though fun the first time, the traits in RL1 often wore their welcome later in the game. We’ve now added gold modifiers to entice players to take on new challenges. The more debilitating the trait is (in-game), the bigger the reward. This makes choosing your heirs a meaningful decision every time. Relics and Resolve One of the most exciting new features to Rogue Legacy 2 is the ability to pick up Relics, which are unique items that change how your run is played. Gain stat modifiers, complete special challenges, and even gain brand new abilities as you traverse the kingdom. But be careful, the more Relics you obtain the more your resolve is shaken, and all Relics are lost if your hero perishes. Improved Accessibility We’ve taken accessibility to the next level with the introduction of House Rules. Toggle contact damage, tweak global damage and health, and even give yourself flight for difficult platform sections. You have complete control over how you want to play the game. We’ve also introduced new mechanics such as Off-shore Banking to give struggling players more ways to succeed. A Rich Narrative Not only is the lore to the world of Rogue Legacy greatly expanded in the sequel, but it runs deep. New lore awaits you all the multiple NG’s in. Beating the game once is only the beginning. Learn about the inevitable collapse of a once thriving kingdom, and discover the dark secrets of the ones responsible. And connect and build relationships with the characters you meet along the way. New Game+ for Days Your journey has only begun after beating the final boss in RL2. There is a ton more to explore and discover on multiple playthroughs. You must choose how the game gets harder, from unique biome hazards, to special boss fights. The experience keeps changing for near infinite replayability. More of Everything Of course we’re also adding more of everything people loved from the original Rogue Legacy. More traits, more spells, more classes, more biomes, more enemies, more equipment, more rooms, more story. More secrets ... Just more everything. Clownanthropy. Holy smokes! Punching clowns! AND THERE'S A WHOLE LOT MORE. This only scratches the surface of what Rogue Legacy 2 has to offer. Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, the Curio Shoppe, the list goes on, but reading is for nerds. Go out and discover the world of Rogue Legacy 2 for yourself! /

Name: Crypt of the NecroDancer
Description:
DELIVER BEATDOWNS TO THE BEAT! Crypt of the NecroDancer is an award winning hardcore roguelike rhythm game. Move on the beat to navigate an ever changing dungeon while battling dancing skeletons, zombies, dragons, and more. Groove to the epic Danny Baranowsky soundtrack, or select songs from your own MP3 collection! FEATURES: Descend into the crypt as 15 playable characters with unique play styles and challenges! Jam out to over 40 original songs in Danny Baranowsky’s award winning soundtrack, or set your own beats with songs from your own MP3 collection! An ensemble of major and minor puns at every half-step! Play with keyboard, controller, or even a USB dance pad! Official Danganronpa character reskins and mod support! BONUS: Includes 6 playable remixes of the entire soundtrack. Remixes by FamilyJules, A_Rival, Chipzel, OCRemix, Girlfriend Records, and Virt!
